name: =?utf-8?Q?Haneefah?=
subject: 56 Minutes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hoosiers for Haneefah
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
#### Announcement
**>From the Desk of Haneefah Khaaliq** Last year, I showed you what it took to see a U.S. Senate candidate right in your city and town. Without a million-dollar budget, our team canvassed the state and showed up at your summer events. Together, we visited over 60 counties and held 30+ town halls free and open to the public. Many of you were shocked at the time I took to personally visit you. Doing it came naturally to me since I wanted to do it.

Yet and still, my opponent manages to not only receive his party's nomination but raise millions in record time without holding a single town hall. It's not unbelievable. It's impossible for the hard work we put in to pay off amidst potential scandal. Nevertheless, we press on!

On a side note, I'm making a prediction that Senator Todd Young won't participate in any debates this year. Do you remember when on April 14, 2022, the Republican National Committee pulled out of its participation in presidential debates? What's to stop our friends across the aisle from pulling out of debates altogether? I rest my case.
**Texas**
56 minutes. On May 24th at 11:33 a.m., school shooter Salvador Ramos entered Robb Elementary School in Uvalde, Texas, and opened fire. You may have heard reports that the police didn't enter the school until nearly an hour later. Every single timeline reveals police entering the school approximately two minutes later, exchanging fire, and calling for backup.

In tragic situations like this, it can be easy to place blame, except on the folks actually responsible. Now, here's the hard truth. Since Senator Young's election in 2016, there have been roughly 3,000 mass shootings in America resulting in close to 1,000 deaths. Let that sink in for a moment.

By refusing to take any action whatsoever, Mr. Young continues to contribute to this carnage. It's not a mystery. Together, our two senators have amassed $4,147,549 from the NRA this year alone. Sadly, their acceptance of this money results in their inaction. They have failed to find a way to protect our 2nd Amendment rights while also protecting the American people from gun violence.

Don't believe what they say. Guns do not equal safety. Right now, there are more guns in America than people! If guns meant safety, America would be the safest place on earth. Instead, we're one of the most dangerous.
**Buffalo**
**How can you give prayers and condolences to one tragic mass shooting and not another?** That's exactly what I saw our senators do. On May 14, 2022, Buffalo, NY experienced a racially motivated grocery store shooting that claimed the lives of ten innocent people. Neither one of our senators offered the slightest condolence, and yet, on May 24, 2022, in the wake of the Uvalde, Texas school shooting, we saw tweets and official statements from them. Shame on them.

Gun violence is gun violence. A mass shooting is a mass shooting. It doesn't matter where it takes place (from Buffalo to Chicago to Milwaukee to Uvalde), it's a tragedy for us all and deserving of our attention. The fact that our senators don't recognize this is disgraceful.

To make matters worse, just this week, they both voted against the **Domestic Terrorism Act of 2022** , which, following the Buffalo shooting, would simply allow authorities to track and analyze domestic terrorist activity for the goal of prevention.
**Our Senators Are Responsible for**
**America's Baby Formula Shortage**
Our senators are hypocrites. While they tout the preservation of life, they vote against every piece of legislation that would possibly protect it and refuse to pay attention to issues that could arise later as national crises. The baby formula shortage is a prime example.

Here's how. As early as September 2019-21, the FDA conducted investigations revealing infractions on a baby formula plant, stating that personnel weren't washing their hands or changing gloves after touching certain surfaces. Why in the world didn't our senators act when the whistleblower report came out during this same period?

To add insult to injury, they started this year off with a bang by voting against the Women's Health Protection Act which would advance women's reproductive rights. They fail to remember the tens of thousands of women nationwide who lose their lives annually to unsafe at-home abortions. They also fail to recognize the anguish women face when forced to give birth without healthcare and a failing adoption system.

**How can you force women to have babies and then oppose legislation that feeds them?** It just doesn't make sense. $28M. That's how much is needed to help counter the formula shortage issue in America. I'll be watching closely to see how our senators vote on H.R. 7790, a bill that would simply expand the FDA's ability to help end this madness. Without a doubt, this is where we should see our taxpayer dollars being put to good use!
**Inflation**
No matter who's president, our nation would be experiencing inflation right now. When demand for goods and services exceeds supply, the demand pushes prices up. This leads to inflation. Our senators like to point fingers at Biden, but the truth is, we're aiding the war in Ukraine. We're also in the middle of a pandemic. What did you expect?

What if I told you we could all have higher incomes to meet rising costs? That we could all have healthcare. That we could all have more COVID relief and be prepared for the next surge. What if it was possible for us _not_ to be dependent on fossil fuels? I don't know about you, but I'm tired of being lied to.

Our senators know good and well that there's a way the rising cost of gas and food wouldn't have much of an impact on us. Instead, they dare to introduce senseless legislation on ways we can save for retirement. **How in the world can we think about _saving_ for anything at a time like this?**
**Ukraine**
On Monday, May 23, 2022, the first Russian soldier was found guilty of war crimes in Ukraine and sentenced to life in prison. An event like this is particularly rare, especially while the war in question still rages on. As the Ukrainian people continue to face obstacle after obstacle, it's encouraging to see them activating their judicial system early on to bring swift justice to the victims' families. My hope is that this will continue and help curtail the senseless violence we've seen.
**Happy Memorial Day! **
From my family to yours, I'm wishing you a safe and Happy Memorial Day! On this Memorial Day, I'll be gathering with my own family and quietly reflecting on lives lost that were dear to me and also dear to our country. May God bless you! May God bless America! May God bless our troops!
**Now, here's what I need you to do right now: **
* Forward this message to nine (9) of your friends and family. Choose three (3) of them to personally call and inform them that I meant what I said in the beginning of my campaign when I said I would run for the Senate until _**_we_**_ won!
* Commit to my campaign now by [donating $9](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=73c9bedf1e&e=a49cb82bb3) or more to keep this true grassroots campaign going.
* [Subscribe and follow me on social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=dbae622fd0&e=a49cb82bb3) where I'm active and live often. Share a post or two!

Visit [haneefahkhaaliq.org](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=c2912ce237&e=a49cb82bb3), view my 33 national policies and agendas, and become a volunteer today! I am Indiana. You are Indiana. Together, we are Indiana!

Sincerely,
Haneefah Khaaliq, Esq.
Indiana Candidate for U.S. Senate
2022
---
|
---
In honor of Memorial Day, May 30, 2022.

You must be a registered voter in order to support me in the General Election. Set a goal to ask nine (9) other people this week if they are registered to vote in Indiana. We can't afford to wait until the last minute.
* **Have questions? Email hoosiersforhaneefah@gmail.com or call or text 317-999-5592 right now! **
* Check out and share my [social media](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=699731d201&e=a49cb82bb3) posts and [donate](https://haneefahkhaaliq.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b985b4d189b8b7b204cdd6958&id=9008441efb&e=a49cb82bb3) your first $9 or more to this grassroots campaign now!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Heidi=20St.=20John?=
subject: The left will never fail to capitalize on a tragedy!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Heidi St
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/heidistjohnforcongress/the-left-will-never-fail-to-capitalize-on-a-tragedy?e=b0bcc6b4f9)
---
| | |
---
| | | 05/28/2022 Hi Friends,

Once again the unthinkable has happened. This time it was 19 precious fourth graders and two beloved teachers. Americans collectively lift their hands in horror and sorrow. “How could this happen? Where is God? We must repeal the 2nd Amendment!”

Democrat political opportunists (who never let a crisis go to waste) and leftist media elites, want us to believe the narrative that life is precious—unless we are talking about our unborn.

In America, we used to believe that all life is precious. What changed? Since the passage of Roe, over 63 million unborn children have been killed under the guise of an “essential civil right.” Friends, the death of _any_ child, born or unborn, is a tragedy.

Predictably, Democrats are using this tragedy to call for an end to the 2nd Amendment. Because of the lawless act of a murderer, our right to self-defense is once again at risk. The Democrats would love to take this tragedy and see law-abiding citizens defenseless. We must never let this happen.

In the past three days, I’ve heard accusations fly about “assault rifles” and “automatic weapons,” (they’re not automatic, btw) while America stumbles over the root causes like a blind man in a minefield.

How did we get here? What’s happening to our America?

Leftists, socialists, and Democrats have intentionally crafted legislation over the past half century to remove punishment for criminals while simultaneously dismantling the nuclear family. Their efforts to banish faith and prayer from government, public schools, and the marketplace while promoting “freedom of speech” including violent video games underscores the need for new leadership in DC.

Woke Hollywood pours gasoline on the flames of senseless violence and we scratch our heads and wonder “How could this happen?”

Guns are not the issue. People are.

Semi-automatic rifles have been around for nearly 140 years but this phenomenon of senseless slaughter is relatively new on the American landscape. It’s the result of the nihilistic worldview that the moral collapse of America has given birth to.

Today’s teens live in an America where life has no purpose and human life has no value. As a woman of faith, and as a someone who cares about the people in my community, I have a different message. I believe that all life has value, from our oldest to our unborn. One of my highest priorities in Congress will be to stand firm against the continuing assault of the family unit and the relentless attacks against America’s faith foundations. I proudly and unabashedly support every American's right to self defense as clearly defined in the 2nd amendment.

It’s time to tell the truth: without the protection of our 2nd Amendment, we are sitting ducks for a tyrannical government and lawless people.

If we believe life is precious and should be protected, we need to elect leaders who will protect life, not devalue it.

Please help me get to Congress by [Donating Here](https://heidistjohnforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=46e715d1574a19c15defda548&id=34dab56e90&e=b0bcc6b4f9) Sincerely,
---
|
---
| _**Heidi St. John**_
_Candidate for Congress, WA-03_
---
| | Introducing, Endorsed by We The People!

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | 05/28/2022 Hi Friends, Once again the unthinkable has happened. This time it was 19 precious fourth graders and two beloved teachers. Americans collectively lift their hands in horror and sorrow. “How could this happen? Where is God? We must repeal the 2nd Amendment!” Democrat political opportunists (who never let a crisis go to waste) and leftist media elites, want us to believe the narrative that life is precious—unless we are talking about our unborn. In America, we used to believe that all life is precious. What changed? Since the passage of Roe, over 63 million unborn children have been killed under the guise of an “essential civil right.” Friends, the death of any child, born or unborn, is a tragedy. Predictably, Democrats are using this tragedy to call for an end to the 2nd Amendment. Because of the lawless act of a murderer, our right to self-defense is once again at risk. The Democrats would love to take this tragedy and see law-abiding citizens defenseless. We must never let this happen. In the past three days, I’ve heard accusations fly about “assault rifles” and “automatic weapons,” (they’re not automatic, btw) while America stumbles over the root causes like a blind man in a minefield. How did we get here? What’s happening to our America? Leftists, socialists, and Democrats have intentionally crafted legislation over the past half century to remove punishment for criminals while simultaneously dismantling the nuclear family. Their efforts to banish faith and prayer from government, public schools, and the marketplace while promoting “freedom of speech” including violent video games underscores the need for new leadership in DC. Woke Hollywood pours gasoline on the flames of senseless violence and we scratch our heads and wonder “How could this happen?” Guns are not the issue. People are. Semi-automatic rifles have been around for nearly 140 years but this phenomenon of senseless slaughter is relatively new on the American landscape. It’s the result of the nihilistic worldview that the moral collapse of America has given birth to. Today’s teens live in an America where life has no purpose and human life has no value. As a woman of faith, and as a someone who cares about the people in my community, I have a different message. I believe that all life has value, from our oldest to our unborn. One of my highest priorities in Congress will be to stand firm against the continuing assault of the family unit and the relentless attacks against America’s faith foundations. I proudly and unabashedly support every American's right to self defense as clearly defined in the 2nd amendment. It’s time to tell the truth: without the protection of our 2nd Amendment, we are sitting ducks for a tyrannical government and lawless people. If we believe life is precious and should be protected, we need to elect leaders who will protect life, not devalue it. Please help me get to Congress by Sincerely, | | Heidi St. John Candidate for Congress, WA-03 | | Introducing, Endorsed by We The People! | The Heidi St. John Campaign is built on the promise of representing those described in the constitution "We The People". Let Heidi know that she has your endorsement and every week we will add your name to the Website under the "endorsements" tab. name: Senate Majority Update
subject: 50/50 isn’t cutting it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
A 50/50 Senate majority just isn’t cutting it, folks.

Democrats need to flip Republican seats, and right now, major election forecasters are calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election.

The latest head-to-head poll shows Sarah Godlewski is the ONLY Democrat who can defeat Ron Johnson, and _The Washington Post_ called her “the best chance” to get rid of him. It's clear we have a really good shot at flipping this seat, which is why **the GOP just moved Wisconsin to the top of their list of defensive priorities.**

Republicans are getting nervous! If Democrats flip Wisconsin, we are virtually guaranteed to hold and expand the Senate majority. That's why the NRSC and Mitch McConnell's Super PAC are already flooding millions into our race in order to protect Ron Johnson and blunt our momentum. We need to fight back immediately.

**[With so much on the line, this is a race we can — and must — win. That’s why we need you on this team. Will you consider rushing a donation of any amount to Sarah Godlewski’s campaign today? It’s important that we collect as many resources as possible to take on the GOP and flip this seat. clean_body: A 50/50 Senate majority just isn’t cutting it, folks. Democrats need to flip Republican seats, and right now, major election forecasters are calling Ron Johnson the most vulnerable GOP Senator up for re-election. The latest head-to-head poll shows Sarah Godlewski is the ONLY Democrat who can defeat Ron Johnson, and The Washington Post called her “the best chance” to get rid of him. It's clear we have a really good shot at flipping this seat, which is why the GOP just moved Wisconsin to the top of their list of defensive priorities. Republicans are getting nervous! If Democrats flip Wisconsin, we are virtually guaranteed to hold and expand the Senate majority. That's why the NRSC and Mitch McConnell's Super PAC are already flooding millions into our race in order to protect Ron Johnson and blunt our momentum. We need to fight back immediately. = | = We couldn’t do this without you. Every time grassroots supporters like you decide to pitch in, your generous contributions allow us to grow our momentum so we can expand our lead against Ron Johnson in the polls and make sure Democrats win in November. Thanks for everything you have done, and will continue to do, to support the campaign. — Team Sarah Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin

name: Mark McCloskey
subject: I won't back down
body:
[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-r/) Friends, If you don't recognize my name, before you read the rest of this email, I want to jog your memory about who I am... [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-y/) BLM attacked the community I was living in. We were threatened with violence and death by as many as one thousand people. We were told that abandoning our home and fleeing was the only way we would survive.Many in the same situation would likely have left their home, just as many of our politicians abandoned the fight for our values. That's why our country is in trouble.I didn't back down. I doubled down, protected my family and secured my home. With the help of almost two dozen armed patriots, we stood up for what is right despite the dire physical risk. We turned back the mob and achieved peace through superior firepower when they reached our house the second night!**But now, America is in crisis thanks to Joe Biden and his radical enablers that believe in unlimited abortion, no 2nd Amendment right and no difference between a man and a woman. ****And just like I didn 't back down when we were attacked, I'm not going to back down now. That's why I'm running for the U.S. Senate in Missouri. ** **Watch my video:** [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-j/) If you are inspired into action by this video, please keep reading...[I want to make sure every person in Missouri gets the chance to watch this before they vote. To do that, I need to raise ](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-t/)[**$350,000**](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-i/)[ as soon as possible. Please will you help make this a reality?](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-d/) [DONATE NOW TO SHARE THE VIDEO](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-h/) [DONATE $350](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-o/) [DONATE $35](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-b/) Your support is critically important and will not be forgotten!Thank you,Mark McCloskey [](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-n/)[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-p/)[](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-m/) | [McCloskeyforM](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-c/)[issouri](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-l-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-q/) | 4579 Laclede Ave PMB 335, Saint Louis, MO 63108[Unsubscribe](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-u-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-a/) [Preferences](https://markmccloskeyformissouri.updatemyprofile.com/r-tyiyirkk-9A790A88-bjututkitk-f) | [Unsubscribe](https://admin.beautifulinbox.com/t/r-u-tyiyirkk-bjututkitk-z/)

name: Rep. Andrew Clyde
subject: These boots are made for…Battling Biden
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLYDE FOR CONGRESS, INC
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60472977:JT-WfnoeN:m:1:3103520637:025DFF7D255F8C943BD594D339CB0ED3:r "Andrew Clyde") Dear Peter, Joe Biden's failed leadership is causing America itself to fail...and I will not stand for it. I'm Rep. Andrew Clyde, and as a combat veteran, I was proud to serve my country in uniform, and I'm honored to continue my service to America in Congress. **I 'm lacing up my boots once again with one goal in mind--stopping the radical left's disastrous policies that have made the country I love unrecognizable.** **[Now I'm calling on YOU to serve alongside me in my current mission with your contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, or any amount you can afford up to the maximum contribution of $2,900.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60472977:JT-WfnoeN:m:1:3103520637:025DFF7D255F8C943BD594D339CB0ED3:r "Now I’m calling on YOU to serve alongside me in my current
mission with your contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, or any amount you can afford up to the maximum contribution of $2,900.")** Inflation is out of control and Americans can't afford to fill up their gas tanks to go to the grocery store, where they will be seeing empty shelves thanks to Biden's promised food shortages. America can literally no longer afford to live under the thumb of Biden, Pelosi, and their liberal allies. The lives of our children, who can't get formula, or our families, who can't afford food, is now on the line. **The consequences are truly dire. Life and Death. No hyperbole needed.** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60472977:JT-WfnoeN:m:1:3103520637:025DFF7D255F8C943BD594D339CB0ED3:r "Big Spending Biden")And to make matters worse, the Democrats have pushed through TRILLIONS in new pork-laden spending rife with their liberal pet projects, like New Green Deal spending, that will increase our debt from $30.2 trillion to more than $44.8 trillion over the next decade. Our children and grandchildren will never be able to dig themselves out of this hole Biden has put them in. **[I could go on, but instead, I'm going to focus on a brighter future for America; a future that is only possible if I win in November. That's why I need your IMMEDIATE contribution of $500, $250, $100, or $50, so I can keep up the fight in Washington.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60472977:JT-WfnoeN:m:1:3103520637:025DFF7D255F8C943BD594D339CB0ED3:r "I could go on, but instead, I’m going to focus on a
brighter future for America; a future that is only possible if I win in November. That’s why I need your IMMEDIATE contribution of $500, $250,
$100, or $50, so I can keep up the fight in Washington.")** The freedoms and values we so dearly hold are under assault like never before under Biden and the Democrats:
* For the first time in decades, Biden's budget fails to include the Hyde Amendment that's saved 2.4 million lives since 1976.
* The Left continuously sides with BLM/Antifa and the Defund the Police agenda instead of standing with law enforcement.
* Biden has weaponized the federal government against parents who speak out against Critical Race Theory and who don't want their daughters changing in the same locker rooms as biological boys.

**[If you are tired of Biden prioritizing his left-wing agenda items over what's best for America and its citizens, I need you to dig deep and contribute $500, $250, $100, $50, or any amount you can afford so I can keep up the fight in Washington.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60472977:JT-WfnoeN:m:1:3103520637:025DFF7D255F8C943BD594D339CB0ED3:r "If
you are tired of Biden prioritizing his left-wing agenda items over what’s best for America and its citizens, I need you to dig deep and
contribute $500, $250, $100, $50, or any amount you can afford so I can keep up the fight in Washington.")** My combined military experience, coupled with my service in Congress, makes me the perfect foil to Joe Biden's ongoing campaign to destroy America. I know what it means to serve. I know real leadership. And I know that's what America lacks under Joe Biden. But we are on a precipice that will determine if we live as free citizens or subjects ruled by King Joe and Queen Kamala. That future course will be charted in November. But with your help, we're going to ride the Red Wave to victory this November and put a final end to Biden's daily destruction of America. **[Please help me Save America today.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60472977:JT-WfnoeN:m:1:3103520637:025DFF7D255F8C943BD594D339CB0ED3:r "Please help me Save America today.")** For our children, [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/60472977:JT-WfnoeN:m:1:3103520637:025DFF7D255F8C943BD594D339CB0ED3:r "Andrew Clyde") Andrew Clyde
---
| **PAID FOR BY CLYDE FOR CONGRESS, INC.**
---

name: Laura Gralton, Finance Director
subject: Fwd: 200% IMPACT from the Red Wave
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, did you see our previous email? We must take advantage of this incredible opportunity, and we could use your help.
Peter,**Did you already see Bryan's message from the other day? Thanks to some generous donors, we have an incredible opportunity to fight back against the far left.** Your donation will make a 200% impact. If you donate $10, the donors will donate $20. [**We must take advantage of this incredible opportunity, and we could use your help.**](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-vlujdik-idtjvlhlh-r/) We've had enough of the far left. Now it's time to fuel the Red Wave.Thank you,Laura
--
**Laura Gralton**
Finance Director

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
**From:** Bryan Steil, Congressman
**Subject:** 200% IMPACT from the Red Wave
**Date:** Friday, May 27, 2022 at 1:30 PM CT
**To:** Peter Willis dpwillis67@gmail.comHi Peter,**This week voters made their voices heard across the country.****_Several states held primary elections and saw HUGE increases in Republican turnout. As a result, generous donors from across the country are stepping up to help our campaign._**_For every dollar raised before the end of the month, they will DOUBLE MATCH your donation. name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMMjgxNDEifQ/8fytK-J9LT9lHyFO5WIHqA)
---
Peter, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ \- but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I'm honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Peter, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMMjgxNDEifQ/v76Fx-R8b1rqJYflufd_lQ)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMMjgxNDEifQ/psbtppcG4x7rAIrbVncofQ)
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMMjgxNDEifQ/L_LEysuaVHdbAsdkOM8tew)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they're bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our "Greatest Generation" heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country - the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ \- as this year's event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation's heroes deserve.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMMjgxNDEifQ/3TklaZtoY6G8DI71ezi6vw)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMMjgxNDEifQ/ew9tB_JrTLP1ZKbfoFmLhw)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that's contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMMjgxNDEifQ/OcaZeFUBzMt1usgaS75tYQ)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMMjgxNDEifQ/47I6LhZaz0k_W3MYNZPIGA) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day - this year and every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Peter, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please - [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMMjgxNDEifQ/KzDpBs7LM1OoGRYEMNXELA)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUxMMjgxNDEifQ/TcEEmPuySD2jzVfgG-1pDg)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._dw)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTQ5LWE4ODNkYTZmNmJjNjQzNmNhNDQ1ODBhOTU5YTgzZGM5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/bfdGOuE5d1CHb-OwKXQbvA) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: We need to fix our broken education system
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh32ge2l3ia041q60a8j6hdi0s6a11h171sfck3g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqm5dpgslhb5c3661hn1d1jm9hj4t9h69rr5chj6cq78tlj65hb4ptjm1j30orgsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6dj3cp5jchjr4cj661ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clj61p30s5h6coh5u)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z551vuj5rg3bmdhl10s6s823p3kqn1i2ot85llt8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2cph2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv248tbp2stig69t0vkkuo3orsnk2fmb039tlf0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2cph2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! This year I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl2cssm1rjsoi7ngtn67r612q0o877bcfnspope8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2cph2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl12inntfsreumpor7vi360ugg1f047v4sqsnnoo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2cph2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

---

name: Great America Update
subject: Have you felt the pinch of inflation?
body:
Inflation is on the rise in America. And there’s no sign of it slowing down. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6064%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=jFgNEjBCf0uuBp6o9EehoQ&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62710%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w63IFknBdfG3SEWKJ63EDw&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear fellow American, Inflation is on the rise in America. And there’s no sign of it slowing down. In February, consumer prices rose 7.9 percent--the highest annual inflation rate increase since January 1982. Economic historian John Steele Gordon discussed inflation in a recent issue of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty. And he noted that adding trillions more to the national debt is not the solution. In fact, it will only make the problem worse. Nevertheless, support for socialism and other ideologies destructive of the free market also appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among younger Americans. That’s why you’re receiving this email today. Hillsdale College seeks to understand more clearly what Americans think about our nation’s economy and the inflation we’re experiencing. And I’m hoping you can help by completing our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62711%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b8qWa33ZZcwHSt8T0CC34A&sysid=1)** The survey will take you only a few minutes to complete. But the results will help us develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about free market economics. This educational effort is critical to reining in the growing appetite in Washington, D.C., to print more money to pay for ever-expanding government programs. We think education is the surest way to reverse this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is vital as we expand our efforts to defend liberty nationwide by reaching and teaching millions. So please don’t wait. Share your opinions on inflation and the state of our nation’s economy by completing the **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62711%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b8qWa33ZZcwHSt8T0CC34A&sysid=1)**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Inflation in the United States is on the rise. We need your opinions to develop an effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about this growing threat to liberty. Please complete our **National Survey on Inflation in the United States** using the secure link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/national-survey-on-inflation/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62711%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b8qWa33ZZcwHSt8T0CC34A&sysid=1)**
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6064%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=jFgNEjBCf0uuBp6o9EehoQ&sysid=1)_

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile — but the role that change
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztf63smabut6vdcp4nd334op1df8155altc4ve2o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbpb4plk6kq66t1gcgpndd36coq72s5km3gbbd32eap7cdlhecoe6ornclhncpr0sv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3i6dj3cp5jchjr4cj66jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933clj61p30s5h64oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd5rv46hpu9lvh0tm02ebndhlqgt1hmofrqriuoo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2c9h2bs)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ — but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvn6hse443v5ocams6sn2ipk4sg4h4l4pepjta7g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2c9h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuucppmagq93q3p56eq9edjqj2sjpuu2ua7c0jvg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1e362sto69sndgqd8c58clpmhrp7r9afbjo81pg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2c9h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country — the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ — as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zktnsgsti3u54lqsrv9cif0pt0l35h8phuev7am8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2c9h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgqerpg3lrgup6cpjneb1qns11jf33rse5fni0a0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2c9h2bs)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za65co3e1er9heb4r6d97n90t1ang4gpjitbgid8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2c9h2bs)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmrj350vqkukkjdauf3mbf40o9ib4jp6b3k8g7qg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2c9h2bs) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day — this year and every year — please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9sf62e4qfqrgnootao88hqr6i9oj2adqiph7oa8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2c9h2bs)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zetl37j904qujhkr24k3b0b0hn5g7o91gr45jn58_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2c9h2bs)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7kjeov1scnon8vvmvagmhi90pbelgstps9hu2eg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2c9h2bs)
---
|
---
The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zu7af7gmnlg963o51iq66m9gfpn7g4gft9un4d0g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs1of6o98p8aiki01pbsviegr5011lktpb20l2e0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob2c9h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please — Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade | The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center 1100 N. subject: Didn't think I'd say this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
Still defending America's future

---

Peter - This is former Navy SEAL Rob O'Neill. I don't send emails like this often, but I need to tell you about something important today. Look, I'm the guy who took out Osama Bin Laden, so I know exactly what it means to be in a tough situation - and that's why I'm asking for your help. Everything is on the line in the must-win race in Wisconsin's Third District, and my good friend and fellow SEAL, Derrick Van Orden, is facing the fight of his life against Nancy Pelosi and the radical left. The Democrats have already raised **$350 MILLION** to smear every Pro-Trump conservative in America - and they will do ANYTHING to crush a common-sense conservative patriot like Derrick. [**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help and hoping you will join me by stepping up and chipping in right now to help us win this race, flip the seat RED, and send Nancy Pelosi packing. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480640:Jd1dnnouN:m:1:3253819041:DEC1578818B9EB65C330F2F9F8DB9937:r) I was part of 400 combat missions - and defending America's future has been my life's work. But if we don't step up now, there may not be an America left. **Derrick Van Orden and I took a blood oath to defend this country. Derrick has President Trump 's endorsement, and he has my endorsement-and I hope he has yours too.** This is THE race that will decide the House majority, but we'll NEVER win without your help: ****[**CONTRIBUTE $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480640:Jd1dnnouN:m:1:3253819041:DEC1578818B9EB65C330F2F9F8DB9937:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480640:Jd1dnnouN:m:1:3253819041:DEC1578818B9EB65C330F2F9F8DB9937:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480640:Jd1dnnouN:m:1:3253819041:DEC1578818B9EB65C330F2F9F8DB9937:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $200**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480640:Jd1dnnouN:m:1:3253819041:DEC1578818B9EB65C330F2F9F8DB9937:r)**** ** ** Thank you for your support, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480640:Jd1dnnouN:m:1:3253819041:DEC1578818B9EB65C330F2F9F8DB9937:r)

Rob O'Neill

name: Mike Lee
subject: Here’s how you and I can fight“Wokeism” in our schools
body:
Our schools are no longer safe havens; woke activists and cultural Marxists have recognized the impact they can have by influenc
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z24gtut4lkl7qarsqfej99udf6t8mlhcmffr0a48_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob4clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1dll6phbao9gc2q6apjlmkpred1imjjm2t5ncdq79c9jchjm8sphmjj78c5jm1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8pmcdj4mdi6fchhcoor1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | Hello, Our schools are no longer safe havens; woke activists and cultural Marxists have recognized the impact they can have by influencing our children with things like Critical Race Theory and socialism in our schools. _So what are we supposed to do? Trust politicians to save us? _ No, I don’t believe politicians can save us—and I am one! Ultimately, saving our country requires brave parents and patriots to respond to these threats. **I suspect you get a dozen emails asking you to donate every week. ** This is much different. _This isn’t for some campaign or candidate that needs money._ This is for a powerful solution to help teach and protect our kids. I am emailing you to introduce my friend, Connor Boyack, who is educating our country’s youth against the dangers of socialism, and teaching them about the ideas of liberty. Connor Boyack is the author of the Tuttle Twins, a series of children’s books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, entrepreneurship, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers.
---
---
**_He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books into the hands of homeschool families, public schools, and libraries. _**
---
[Each $10 donation helps Connor distribute one copy of the Tuttle Twins to a family, homeschooler, school, or library. You can donate ANY amount by clicking here >>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zus72fqcd610dsgt6oqcroj9s5s2eia8hjv7dteo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob4clh2bs) So far, Connor has distributed over 2.5 million copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and children across the country. **Connor is leading the fight against socialist influence in our schools by creating a new generation of young people who love the ideas of liberty and our country.** [Here is how Connor and his nonprofit, Libertas Institute, plan to distribute 1,000,000 new copies of the Tuttle Twins:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf6o2nkn4ndst3a7eokmipq656q5jpadv30d3avg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob4clh2bs)
---
1. Homeschool children and parents actively teaching their kids about the ideas of freedom and U.S. history can receive copies and additional materials for education at home.
2. The Libertas Institute then plans to place tens of thousands of copies in public schools and libraries to give kids an alternative to the dangerous ideas of socialism.
3. In order to do this, they must raise funds to print and distribute these books. [It costs roughly $10 to produce and ship each book. ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztihb7da05t3e7rr94vlediqsj2tgrc8moeq391g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob4clh2bs)

---
The reality is politicians cannot save us. Brave parents and patriots who are willing to stand up and fight for the rising generation can defeat bad ideas including Critical Race Theory, “Woke” culture, and socialism. Connor is a personal friend of mine. In 2010, he helped me win my first election to the United States Senate. Since then, he’s founded Libertas Institute, a free market non-profit organization, and created the Tuttle Twins to teach kids about the ideas of freedom. As a personal favor to me, please help Connor and Libertas Institute save the younger generation from socialism by supplying these children and their families with Tuttle Twins books! _**Please consider donating the most generous amount you can to help put a Tuttle Twins book in the hands of a young child! I told Connor I would help reach a $20,000 goal in the next 48 hours.**_ The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them.
---
_**All online donations are MATCHED by one of the Libertas Institute’s biggest supporters, John P. This means your donation is DOUBLED! If you donate $100, John P. will personally match it with another $100 gift.**_ _**[Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 Here>>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt3foskdrr5p0sfjtvnpam6ancpa8qmfib3tbgi8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob4clh2bs)**_ _**[Donate 2 Tuttle Twins book for $20 Here>>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3m6ih9di8d45cf8bbtje5cvk93toj3r8d7vka18_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob4clh2bs)**_ _**[Donate 5 Tuttle Twins book for $50 Here>>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z99ssdbdla0mgolnkuaqkuigvfv1bsf59k4inl68_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob4clh2bs)**_ _**[Donate 10 Tuttle Twins book for $100 Here>>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z71evsm8mcvhmtp3070c92fqa13oh6u7ulm59nn8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob4clh2bs)**_ _**[Donate 25 Tuttle Twins book for $250 Here>>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z680r6teag0b1ll512ijvn52fu8s3l092h73jgig_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob4clh2bs)**_ _**[Donate 50 Tuttle Twins book for $500 Here>>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9atqofn9tu4bciuu8vdmq8j980lag40mbasia9o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob4clh2bs)**_ _**[Donate 100 Tuttle Twins book for $1,000 Here>>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1pnelk0q6djsn137ri5r2pnc1lkrcj5uh90vui8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob4clh2bs)**_ _**[Donate Any Amount Here>>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlrs92impfm5s9f6nkc62osdm9n712nui2avt9u8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob4clh2bs)**_
---
The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them.
---
---
As I said, Connor is a great friend of mine and I believe in what he is doing. The Libertas Institute and the Tuttle Twins are transforming this country and are one of our most promising ways to fight back against socialism in schools. **This is the most promising path to save our kids from indoctrination and the dangers of socialism. With the massive rise in homeschooling, let’s make sure every family has a copy available to them.** [Please help me raise $20,000 in the next 48 hours by clicking here to make a donation and distribute copies of the Tuttle Twins to thousands of kids across the country! ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlg0uplgrb8iu6nvqmn97lutvehcafn52knkhsd8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob4clh2bs) If you love our country, love our Constitution, and love the ideas of freedom, I encourage you to donate to Libertas Institute’s project, the Tuttle Twins. Please consider this a personal and urgent request from me. [Here is the link to donate again.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2618g55n9hhel18buufqm0fnd27hm07h6gfp3ig_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3i61ob4clh2bs) Thank you for everything you do to fight and preserve liberty and our Republic,
---
---
Senator Mike Lee
---

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: Resign. Recall. Replace.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480902:JoHwBno2N:m:1:3317145305:39EC4EDC909BAF93E34F9217FD47858C:r) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you're thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I'll tell you why. I've seen what's happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I'm sure you have too. Public schools all over the country are relentlessly pushing Critical Race Theory, and convincing America's children that they need to change their sexual preferences and gender identities. _[**It 's state-sanctioned leftist indoctrination, plain and simple.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480902:JoHwBno2N:m:1:3317145305:39EC4EDC909BAF93E34F9217FD47858C:r)_** ** As I discussed on **_Tucker Carlson Tonight_** , I get rid of the people who are indoctrinating our children by replacing them with SANE conservative Americans. **[But, I can 't do any of this without your help. Would you consider making a generous donation of ANY amount to help me put an end to state sanctioned leftist indoctrination?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480902:JoHwBno2N:m:1:3317145305:39EC4EDC909BAF93E34F9217FD47858C:r)** For decades, shady dark-money billionaires like **_George Soros_** have funneled massive amounts of cash into the pockets of radical left-wing activists to take up government positions in communities all over the country. **[One of Soros's favorite targets is local school board races](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480902:JoHwBno2N:m:1:3317145305:39EC4EDC909BAF93E34F9217FD47858C:r).** _And I hate to break it to you, but his plan has been wildly successful. _ Right now, in EVERY STATE IN AMERICA (including the red states), teachers are indoctrinating our students with CRT. If you're not familiar with CRT, it's the doctrine that all white people are oppressors, and that your skin color determines everything about you. Beyond this, _CRT teaches kids that America is evil to its core, and that everything that makes our country great, is secretly racist._** ** **_Then, what 's worse is that these radical school boards allow, hire, and encourage teachers who have been caught ACTIVELY recruiting children to become transgender._** And friend, you may not have seen it happening at the time, but for too long Republicans have neglected local races and instead focused on "BIG" races for President, Governor, and Congress. But in the process, we've left room for people like George Soros to take over local governments all over the country, right under our noses. Now, with all this doom and gloom, it's easy to feel defeated. **But I know, and Tucker Carlson knows that this fight is far from over... ** And we CAN take back our schools from the radical left. [**HELP US TAKE BACK OUR SCHOOLS TODAY!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480902:JoHwBno2N:m:1:3317145305:39EC4EDC909BAF93E34F9217FD47858C:r) Let me introduce myself. [**My name is Ryan Girdusky, and I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our local school boards from the radical left. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480902:JoHwBno2N:m:1:3317145305:39EC4EDC909BAF93E34F9217FD47858C:r) **_And I have the 3 R 's Battle Plan to do just that!_** **_Resign:_** we'll turn up the public pressure with TV, Radio, and Print media campaigns calling for far left school board members to quit. **_Recall:_** we'll help collect petitions signatures and aid local parents, grandparents, and concerned taxpayers in efforts to recall radical school board members who must be removed from office. **_Replace:_** We'll support the campaigns of pro-America conservatives who run for local school board against liberal pro-CRT school board members. In the coming year, we are hoping to triple our impact! [**But, friend, we can't roll out this plan without your support. Will you rush in $17.76 to the 1776 Project PAC as we prepared to target more than 200 races this year??**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480902:JoHwBno2N:m:1:3317145305:39EC4EDC909BAF93E34F9217FD47858C:r) Now, I'm guessing you've never heard of me before... **....But, I 'd be willing to bet you've heard Tucker, Laura Ingraham, and Donald Trump Jr. ** I've had the chance to discuss my plan with them, and they all believe that _the 1776 Project PAC 's 3 R's Campaign Battle Plan is a game-changer!_ Here's what each of them said: **> >>> Tucker Carlson: "**Parents have almost no support, _but now they do_. The **_1776 Project PAC_** __ is a political action committee designed to help school boards and communities elect sane people.... If you're thinking of writing a check... Think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky." **> >>> Laura Ingraham: **"For all the parents out there looking to reclaim your local school boards from radical leftists, help is on the way, a new political action committee called the **_1776 Project_** is going to support school board candidates who oppose indoctrinating kids with things like Critical Race Theory." **> >>> Donald Trump Jr.: **"The **_1776 Project_** is the very first Political Action Committee of it's kind, specifically created to take on this sinister attack on our way of life from within our own communities by working to take local schools boards out of the hands of these America-hating radical liberals..." Even the failing and biased New York Times admitted that we _" lit a fire"_ that is only growing as more conservative patriots like you join the fight in supporting the 1776 Project PAC.** ** **But here is the best part. The 1776 Project PAC has only been around for a year, and we already have a track-record of success. ** In November of 2021, we flipped 44 seats. In the coming year, as long as we have your help, we are set to more than TRIPLE our impact. **After 30 years of left-wing billionaires like George Soros flooding cash into local school board races, we finally have a way to fight back with the 1776 Project PAC.** [**Please consider helping us fight back against George Soros and the radical socialist left in our school boards with a generous contribution of $17.76, $25, $50, or $100.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480902:JoHwBno2N:m:1:3317145305:39EC4EDC909BAF93E34F9217FD47858C:r) _With your help, we will rid our schools of radical leftists who are hell-bent on turning our kids against conservative, American values.._. **And we'll replace them with sane, America-loving citizens.** Sincerely, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480902:JoHwBno2N:m:1:3317145305:39EC4EDC909BAF93E34F9217FD47858C:r) Ryan Girdusky P.S. I know you may not know anything about me, but I hope that the endorsements from incredible conservative leaders like my friends Tucker, Laura, and Donald Trump Jr. give you confidence in my dedication to the mission of taking school boards back from radical liberals. name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9034%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=80%2fJvIgmPAm7jK8fbubsfQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22473%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I5GgfZ2z88j%2bPmhHiax8ZQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22474%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y0xPqMLers0LaZw3uY1UaQ&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c22474%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y0xPqMLers0LaZw3uY1UaQ&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9034%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=80%2fJvIgmPAm7jK8fbubsfQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9034%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=80%2fJvIgmPAm7jK8fbubsfQ&sysid=1)

clean_body: = Hello, Former Senator Claire McCaskill just issued a dire warning on MSNBC: Senate Democrats must URGENTLY act on voting rights – now. Republicans tried to steal the election in 2020, even encouraging an armed insurrection at the capitol. Since then, they’ve been gerrymandering districts, suppressing voters, and enacting laws that everyone from President Joe Biden to Stacey Abrams are calling Jim Crow 2.0 We have a razor-thin 50-50 majority in the Senate. Only one seat would give control back to Mitch McConnell and the Republicans. That’s why Admiral Mike Franken’s campaign against Chuck Grassley in Iowa is so important. Senate control will likely be decided in Iowa and the polls are showing an extremely close race. But if Mike Franken is going to defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate, we’re counting on grassroots donors like you now. We need to raise another $250,000 before our end-of-month deadline to fight back against Grassley’s corporate PAC money and McConnell’s Super PACs, but right now we’re still $72,950 short with time running out: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

I’ll be straight with you, friend: Executing the NDRC’s strategy is going to be a tall order.

That’s because we don’t have one mission, we have three: **reverse** Republican gerrymandering, **protect** the gains we’ve made toward fairness, and **build** the infrastructure that will secure the **future** of fair redistricting.

It’s a tall order but I know we can get it done – IF supporters like you help us hit our May goal. **I’m asking you to rush a donation of any amount to help us get there before midnight on Tuesday.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The U.S. Supreme Court has been highly inconsistent when it comes to gerrymandering.
→ **_[Your gift](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45860464/347822094/2144045629?amount=20&refcode=20220529.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhNzJjMWRmLTQ2ZGYtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qaNZxuZYq0ows-QO0ALSXeubNuw89b1xtmjixMf4x2E=)_** will help us work at every level so that our strategy succeeds no matter what SCOTUS does.
Republicans are trying to stack state supreme courts by funneling “record amounts” into judicial elections.
→ **_[Your gift](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45860465/347822095/2144045629?amount=20&refcode=20220529.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhNzJjMWRmLTQ2ZGYtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qaNZxuZYq0ows-QO0ALSXeubNuw89b1xtmjixMf4x2E=)_** will help us overcome their spending and keep state courts balanced and independent.
Extremist politicians like Ron DeSantis are determined to keep their gerrymandered maps.
→ **_[Your gift](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45860466/347822096/2144045629?amount=20&refcode=20220529.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFhNzJjMWRmLTQ2ZGYtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qaNZxuZYq0ows-QO0ALSXeubNuw89b1xtmjixMf4x2E=)_** will help us hold Republicans like DeSantis accountable in the 2022 elections.
Friend, with the support of this grassroots community, we now have a congressional map that’s the most balanced in a generation. But we have SO much more to do, and it won’t happen without everyone who’s reading this email pitching in.

clean_body: I’ll be straight with you, friend | I’ll be straight with you, friend: Executing the NDRC’s strategy is going to be a tall order. That’s because we don’t have one mission, we have three: reverse Republican gerrymandering, protect the gains we’ve made toward fairness, and build the infrastructure that will secure the future of fair redistricting. It’s a tall order but I know we can get it done – IF supporters like you help us hit our May goal. I’m asking you to rush a donation of any amount to help us get there before midnight on Tuesday. | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = There are a number of obstacles in our path, but = will help us overcome them. The U.S. Supreme Court has been highly inconsistent when it comes to gerrymandering. → = will help us work at every level so that our strategy succeeds no matter what SCOTUS does. Republicans are trying to stack state supreme courts by funneling “record amounts” into judicial elections. → = will help us overcome their spending and keep state courts balanced and independent. Extremist politicians like Ron DeSantis are determined to keep their gerrymandered maps. → = will help us hold Republicans like DeSantis accountable in the 2022 elections. Friend, with the support of this grassroots community, we now have a congressional map that’s the most balanced in a generation. But we have SO much more to do, and it won’t happen without everyone who’s reading this email pitching in. = Thanks for everything, Ben = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: I don’t know how to say this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zedst5nbce13s80s0f4g57k3qa6crl042nj10q78_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3h6aor4c9h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onkm9gr8tdmc1rb6tr164rr4ob76loe0ob1m8pm1o76ckrjec36mson9o70ejir0puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6ccdimdi6fcllcooj9cr1cuobapbi4no)
It’s worse than I thought.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs1la55e0kelmguvoodqf7rs1igud9omqddortq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3h6aor4c9h2bs)
---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **
| | [RUSH AN EMERGENCY $500 DONATION](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl2an8vvntd1bgee6i5n4caiq3p50grds8d63hbo_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3h6aor4c9h2bs)
