name: Ann Coulter
subject: They want your kids
body:
This is your opportunity to get conservatives on to school boards -- and Critical Race Theory out of classrooms. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6086%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=DXvQYA7BYjnbDROF3niDzA&sysid=1)
This is your opportunity to get conservatives on to school boards -- and Critical Race Theory out of classrooms.
|
---
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62714%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vvroHi4s%2bo5jFgZtSesqww&sysid=1) Fellow Conservative, Liberals can’t keep their story straight about Critical Race Theory. They insist, “Critical Race Theory isn’t being taught in schools!” Critical Race Theory most certainly _is_ being taught in the schools. Parents all over the country have noticed _and they’re not happy about it_. But the instruction in anti-whiteness is part of a much larger plan to **“fundamentally transform”** our country. (Remember Barack Obama?). These steely-eye zealots have taken over our schools, our universities, our media, our corporations -- even our sports leagues for Pete’s sake! Why might that be? **_Because they want your kids._** This is your opportunity to get conservatives **_on_** to school boards -- and Critical Race Theory **_out_** of classrooms. [ **I want to stop Critical Race Theory** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62725%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=w7vco9ItudfR%2fnRHIO22VA&sysid=1) It’s called the **School Board Campaign Training**. It’s run by the best conservative training group in America called the **Leadership Institute**. With this new training, the Leadership Institute brings savvy, experienced campaign experts and teachers to teach conservatives how to overcome the odds and win those school board races. **What a great way to help thousands of “Davids” beat the odds -- and the left!** Morton and his staff started this newest training online. Because in these COVID-crazy times, it’s still not easy to bring together big crowds in restrictive, liberal-run states. By having most of these trainings online, the Leadership Institute can reach much, much larger audiences (maybe you shouldn’t have shut down the country, liberals!). Experienced LI trainers can now get to any potential conservative school board candidate **_anywhere, anytime_**. The LI team put together eleven hours of nuts-and-bolts videos detailing everything conservatives need to need to know to beat back the left and save kids from brainwashing **in hating America**. **Conservatives who take the course learn how to:**
* Plan a winning campaign.
* Design and run a successful Get-Out-the-Vote operation.
* Craft a compelling message.
* Handle scrutiny from their opponent and the media.
* And much more.

To get a conservative parent through the online training costs $50 -- and to send someone through the in-person version costs $100. The folks at LI don’t play around. They aim to train as many conservatives as possible. But for this month, their goal is to raise $20,000 -- to train 200 more conservatives online and 100 in-person. [**Will you donate $50 today to train someone online? Or give $100 to send a conservative through the in-person training?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62726%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ush9EYA2Mp053w2OqKWJ0w&sysid=1) [ **Yes, I'll help train one more conservative school board candidate** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62727%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cUhWAf5IvQQNpSXvImoTwQ&sysid=1) With many school board positions up for election this year, now’s the time to act. **Your gift by the end of this month** will train one more conservative how to run for their local school board -- and win. **HERE'S WHAT ONE conservative who took the training, Natalie from Colorado, had to say:** “After learning about Critical Race Theory last summer and seeing what is being taught in our schools, I’ve come to understand the damage caused for students and our country.

**I can no longer sit on the sidelines and wait for someone else to solve the problem.** It’s time to overhaul the public school system, and we must start locally.” **In its first few months, LI’s School Board Campaign Training has enrolled 1,700 conservatives.** [**Your gift of $50, $100, or more will help the Leadership Institute stop leftists from warping kids’ minds and ruining our country.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62728%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=re9tti1GkuBN%2b2Y7wlYo6A&sysid=1) Please don’t wait to [**make your tax-deductible contribution**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62729%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=30cjRuzwC5FLxmP7WOrc2Q&sysid=1) to the Leadership Institute today. Thank you! Let’s Save America, Ann Coulter
Author and Columnist P.S. Let’s get Critical Race Theory insanity _out of our classrooms_ and _into the dustbin of history_ **Please help these efforts with your generous gift today. You’ll drive the left nuts -- while you save America.** So what are you waiting for? [**Please give right away!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62720%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2blXnxCRaw7zCw9yuZI8SGQ&sysid=1) Thank you. [**>> $50 to train one person online**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62721%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p4rbiX1UP01CqlqTdzhx9Q&sysid=1)
[**>> $100 to train someone in-person**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62722%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o4Oc9DVQ2KglZSPtn8cHeA&sysid=1)
[**>> $200 train 2 people in person**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62723%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kThLUN2eV%2blAlW07wPDw4Q&sysid=1)
[**>> $300 train 3 people in person**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62724%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Mu44gE8IvuddsKGZRuag1g&sysid=1)
[**>> $3,000 sponsor one entire in-person training**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62735%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yIomAwZNJFowcX%2fL8m7dGQ&sysid=1)
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6086%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=DXvQYA7BYjnbDROF3niDzA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6086%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=DXvQYA7BYjnbDROF3niDzA&sysid=1)

name: Tiffany Smiley
subject: We need your help to bounce back! 🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Smiley for Washington, Inc
body:
We're this close

An update on the state of my race

Patriot,
As you may have seen,**the most recent polling out of Washington State shows us JUST 3 POINTS behind our far-Left opponent, Patty Murray. **

It's not lost on me that this incredible surge in support is all in thanks to supporters like YOU. **THANK YOU for your support thus far.**

**While we 've made headway in this fight, there's still SO much work to be done.
[
Last quarter's fundraising numbers confirm that Murray *significantly* outraised us, and we need your help to bounce back and close the gap today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60482507:JVw8tnoNB:m:1:3299561967:A6D7903C7F778717F76AD539432CCE3A:r)**
| **[**CLOSE THE GAP**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60482507:JVw8tnoNB:m:1:3299561967:A6D7903C7F778717F76AD539432CCE3A:r)**
---

Let me remind you what I'm fighting for. -- I am a political outsider running to protect the American Dream for all Americans, after my own family's American Dream was nearly shattered back in 2005 when my husband Scotty was severely wounded by a suicide bomber, permanently blinding him.

Since then, I've fought to ensure that every veteran has access to the quality of care they deserve, and to improve the lives of everyday Americans the D.C. establishment have long forgotten.

As an outsider, **I don 't count on career politicians like Chuck Schumer to funnel money like he's doing for Patty Murray.** Support for our movement comes from everyday Americans like yourself.

[**We 've come such a long way to get here, but to maintain this momentum, I'm personally asking YOU to step up today and express donate $10 or $25 to my campaign TODAY.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60482507:JVw8tnoNB:m:1:3299561967:A6D7903C7F778717F76AD539432CCE3A:r)

**[**CONTINUE THE FIGHT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60482507:JVw8tnoNB:m:1:3299561967:A6D7903C7F778717F76AD539432CCE3A:r)**
---

Any donation to my campaign will help show D.C. elites that **campaigns like mine start with who I 'm running for- _everyday Americans like you._**

[**Thank you so much for your time and support, together let 's make a difference not only in the great State of Washington, but nationwide.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60482507:JVw8tnoNB:m:1:3299561967:A6D7903C7F778717F76AD539432CCE3A:r)

Thank you,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60482507:JVw8tnoNB:m:1:3299561967:A6D7903C7F778717F76AD539432CCE3A:r)

Tiffany Smiley
Candidate for US Senate (R-WA)

* * *

**Our country needs leadership, Friend.**
We need someone who will stand up and work to solve our nation's problems. I'm a proven leader, I've stood up to the DC bureaucrats at the VA to pave the way for ALL veterans to receive the care and treatment they deserve when they return home.
Our veterans are willing to pay the ultimate price for our everyday freedoms. But when they come back home, their service is often overlooked by our very own government.
After serving our nation and laying their lives on the line overseas, our veterans should **NOT** have to beg to get the care they deserve here at home. We need to do better for those who defend our nation, Friend.
**That is why I 'm running for Senate. **

name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: The state of America’s energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkf44htnar0page1atp4t3efrcev2lmc34d1flf0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onnc9ir2c72edhjctlmmcqnbd36ccr7fcj0cjhb2obl64on0s9hmoqe2otgecqmfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74cr66pgb6p9nm8pmcdb0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66pb6c3h6eob6c5h2bs)
| | | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zilqnbbr3uu4a4h713pelfkftck0t1jbk23ee8a8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3h6eob6c5h2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zihdackdpinio8unobb9cnl7rq2tqtfdv5uc1n4o_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3h6eob6c5h2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ze28tqdslodsuujbpta6676gnd38pb93gevlku48_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3h6eob6c5h2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development

clean_body: Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. You can get started right now using this secure link: Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmvmjdfps2gr3k30ovgon2eo9so19cs5d3cnuqfg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3h69oj0slh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6p76mpp61c3m6qoj6d3hmepmcd75edj73cjgcdpj8c5jeoq6cc9h66qnecbie3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor5cr4cupb2pjkssqj8dtgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za6dsmbrni8h5kc24e8e3unvf8dis4sn0f0pi6k0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3h69oj0slh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvjaae34a1rrotf9u679aab08dpidu0oeca0jgs8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3h69oj0slh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7g4l9ab9j9280q2ia5g6hd7l5tnqhvle5ormdm8_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3h69oj0slh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. name: Trump News HQ
subject: Americans find this “British Bulldog”captivating
body:
You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, “Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,” on DVD.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgr2ipjuk203d0ec1pjabvvns9ojr2gpupcvte90_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr63cjjmoqm9dtncsrb2obhcurm4c5imlj60phiedjr3cpjelir0p9icarb2djgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666pb6p37maomcsdkmmp6fc5lclp238h1e8he4933clj61oj4slim2oh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znqpsu22epchpufr8rr8sp0gdbugvn61c7eucom0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3h69pb5c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, You can now own one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”** on DVD. Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, _**and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.**_ In recent years Winston Churchill, who is best known for his leadership during World War II, has been portrayed in numerous films and television shows, proving without a doubt that Americans find the “British Bulldog” captivating. The reasons for this sustained interest in Churchill are profound. No statesman has better diagnosed the threat of modern technology; no statesman has spoken more effectively in opposition to socialism; and, no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny. It should come as little surprise that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear his legacy, which makes studying a true account of Churchill’s accomplishments more important than ever. **For precisely this reason, I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set:** **_[https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn8jemin720a582hkfddknu563pqkdu1th23cap0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3h69pb5c5h2bs)_** As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than any of the many books and videos available to you, and they will reveal profound lessons that can be applied to the urgent problems of today. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6j8tsdjp9sci88hfdt3gn0gbsncjd8din99hpc0_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3h69pb5c5h2bs) Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhfqp1dobe8ihntt184aq2fbgj90bqdgfq0dst0g_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3h69pb5c5h2bs)_ You’ll undoubtedly enjoy this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College |
---

After one year of campaigning, Gov. DeSantis and his team will be scouring all the available data to gauge our campaign’s resources and see if we have what it takes to take on his big money backers and win.**We need to show them that we absolutely do!

Your contribution of $250 or less will be MATCHED by the state. There’s never been a better time to make a donation. **

We may not have DeSantis’s billionaire backers on our side, but with your help, we’ll have the resources to contact and mobilize Floridians all over the state so they get out and VOTE this November!

**So friend, please don’t wait. Pitch in before midnight on May 31 to help us keep up our momentum and show _everyone_ that we’ve got what it takes to defeat Ron DeSantis on Election Day! **

We may not have DeSantis’s billionaire backers on our side, but with your help, we’ll have the resources to contact and mobilize Floridians all over the state so they get out and VOTE this November! So friend, please don’t wait. Pitch in before midnight on May 31 to help us keep up our momentum and show everyone that we’ve got what it takes to defeat Ron DeSantis on Election Day! name: John
subject: They told me no.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
When we started this race, people told me “no” a lot. They told me to wait my turn. That my chance at winning and becoming Maryland’s first Black governor was a long shot.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45864865/347839507/-1166286532?source=email-ngp-20220529-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220529-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220529&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=6e48506f-53df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTQ4NTA2Zi01M2RmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=629U83IHVMBdmC1t8acYqOprseHP5tnTlhorCd6eMxM=)
---
| Peter, When we started this race, people told me “no” a lot. They told me to wait my turn. That my chance at winning and becoming Maryland’s first Black governor was a long shot. **Well, my entire life has been a long shot.** I lost both of my parents by the time I was 12. I bounced around between family members, and like so many kids who experience trauma, I struggled — so much so that I was kicked out of high school my junior year. But with the help of those around me, especially my public school teachers and my school counselor, I was given a lifesaving second chance and opportunities I otherwise would never have known. Because they invested in me and steered me to get my life back on track, I went on to become the second African American and first Puerto Rican person to lead the U.S. Department of Education – and one of the youngest Cabinet secretaries in history. So when members of the Maryland Democratic Party establishment told me things like:
* A Black candidate can’t win in Maryland
* Your progressive ideas — like ensuring world-class schools for all of our kids or making Maryland one of the first states to be net-zero greenhouse gas emissions — are too bold
* Teachers can’t be leaders outside the classroom

Peter, I knew that with the right people by my side, we would prove them wrong. In just a few months, our campaign has surged in the polls and proven that we can pull this off. We started 2022 polling at 6%, and since January we have risen to 16% — just 1 POINT behind my establishment opponent Peter Franchot. I’m so proud of this grassroots team for fueling us to where we are today, less than two months from our primary. But with our May fundraising deadline just days away, I need you to step up today to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal and fuel the next phase of this campaign. [_**Can I count on you to chip in right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45864866/347839508/-1166286532?source=email-ngp-20220529-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220529-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220529&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=6e48506f-53df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTQ4NTA2Zi01M2RmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=629U83IHVMBdmC1t8acYqOprseHP5tnTlhorCd6eMxM=) | | [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45864867/347839509/-1166286532?source=email-ngp-20220529-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220529-fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220529&&&&utm_content=fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=6e48506f-53df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZTQ4NTA2Zi01M2RmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=629U83IHVMBdmC1t8acYqOprseHP5tnTlhorCd6eMxM=)

I know that together we can win this election and bring real change to Maryland, and it would mean so much to know I have your support now.
I am so grateful for all that you do,
John King

clean_body: When we started this race, people told me “no” a lot. They told me to wait my turn. That my chance at winning and becoming Maryland’s first Black governor was a long shot. | = | Peter, When we started this race, people told me “no” a lot. They told me to wait my turn. That my chance at winning and becoming Maryland’s first Black governor was a long shot. Well, my entire life has been a long shot. I lost both of my parents by the time I was 12. I bounced around between family members, and like so many kids who experience trauma, I struggled — so much so that I was kicked out of high school my junior year. But with the help of those around me, especially my public school teachers and my school counselor, I was given a lifesaving second chance and opportunities I otherwise would never have known. Because they invested in me and steered me to get my life back on track, I went on to become the second African American and first Puerto Rican person to lead the U.S. Department of Education – and one of the youngest Cabinet secretaries in history. So when members of the Maryland Democratic Party establishment told me things like: A Black candidate can’t win in Maryland Your progressive ideas — like ensuring world-class schools for all of our kids or making Maryland one of the first states to be net-zero greenhouse gas emissions — are too bold Teachers can’t be leaders outside the classroom Peter, I knew that with the right people by my side, we would prove them wrong. In just a few months, our campaign has surged in the polls and proven that we can pull this off. We started 2022 polling at 6%, and since January we have risen to 16% — just 1 POINT behind my establishment opponent Peter Franchot. I’m so proud of this grassroots team for fueling us to where we are today, less than two months from our primary. But with our May fundraising deadline just days away, I need you to step up today to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal and fuel the next phase of this campaign. = | | = I know that together we can win this election and bring real change to Maryland, and it would mean so much to know I have your support now. I am so grateful for all that you do, John King | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20907 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178, or visit our . name: Josh Shapiro
subject: The general election just started in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Senator Hassan said I could reach out to you.
| | |
---
Friend, it’s Josh Shapiro here, and I asked Senator Hassan if I could reach out to you.

I’m humbled and honored to officially be the Democratic nominee for Governor of Pennsylvania. **[The general election starts now — will you join me and Maggie Hassan, and donate $3 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45866600/347843177/-916850662?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1089-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTBlOTIyNi01NGRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MX3iMiiB32o7A3npuw1zuiilAaY0gLEoS6Y0nT_xJSw=)**

I’m a Pennsylvanian. I was raised here, and my wife Lori and I are raising our four kids just a few miles down the road from where I grew up. I’ve spent my career serving the people of our Commonwealth, as a State Representative, a County Commissioner, and now as the People’s Attorney General.

We need all hands on deck to hold on to Pennsylvania in 2022, and I’m ready to work hard with this team to make it happen.
**During this campaign and as Pennsylvania’s next Governor, I’m going to take my cues from people in places like West Philly and Washington County — not from special interests in Washington, D.C. or big corporations trying to screw over Pennsylvanians. Because I’m not working for them — I’m working for Pennsylvanians. **
**[If you’re with us in this fight to protect our democracy, defend our rights, and win our tough races — can you split $3 today between my campaign and Senator Hassan's campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45866601/347843178/-916850662?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1089-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTBlOTIyNi01NGRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MX3iMiiB32o7A3npuw1zuiilAaY0gLEoS6Y0nT_xJSw=)**

We’re facing unprecedented challenges here in Pennsylvania, but I’ve taken on the big fights for the communities we call home — delivering for working families and holding special interests and bad actors accountable.

The fact is, our GOP opponent wants to bring an extremist, conservative agenda to Pennsylvania — and I’m ready to take him on with everything I’ve got.

I’ve spent my career taking on the big and powerful, whether it was taking on well-connected corporate interests to protect health care for nearly two million Western Pennsylvanians, holding predator priests accountable to get justice for survivors after decades of sexual abuse and cover-ups, or standing up to Trump’s election lies in the courtroom to protect our democracy.

As Pennsylvania’s Governor, I’ll keep taking on those big fights. I’ll fight to defend your right to vote, I’ll fight to defend access to abortion, and I’ll fight to defend our democracy — right here in the birthplace of our nation.
**[Can I count on you to join this important fight? Make a donation of any amount now to support my campaign for Governor and Senator Maggie Hassan as we fight to win our races this November.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45866606/347843183/-916850662?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1089-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTBlOTIyNi01NGRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MX3iMiiB32o7A3npuw1zuiilAaY0gLEoS6Y0nT_xJSw=)**

This is going to be one hell of a fight — but with you, I know we can win it.

Thanks for joining this team,

Josh Shapiro
_Democratic nominee for Governor of Pennsylvania_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45866607/347843184/-916850662?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1089-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwOTBlOTIyNi01NGRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MX3iMiiB32o7A3npuw1zuiilAaY0gLEoS6Y0nT_xJSw=)

I’ve spent my career taking on the big and powerful, whether it was taking on well-connected corporate interests to protect health care for nearly two million Western Pennsylvanians, holding predator priests accountable to get justice for survivors after decades of sexual abuse and cover-ups, or standing up to Trump’s election lies in the courtroom to protect our democracy. As Pennsylvania’s Governor, I’ll keep taking on those big fights. I’ll fight to defend your right to vote, I’ll fight to defend access to abortion, and I’ll fight to defend our democracy — right here in the birthplace of our nation. = This is going to be one hell of a fight — but with you, I know we can win it. Thanks for joining this team, Josh Shapiro Democratic nominee for Governor of Pennsylvania = | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can . Click here to . Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. Paid for by Maggie for NH |

body:
How we're fighting back against Obama's absurd lawsuit.
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480764:JmxIxnojN:m:1:3317145305:614C74FE1D0A66AA9741AD71C2D1A679:r)
---
Peter,
---
With Obama and Eric Holder now suing Gov. DeSantis in a last ditch-attempt to save Pelosi's majority, the upcoming end-of-month deadline has become our most important to date.
---
They're challenging Gov. DeSantis' new congressional map in the courts based on a meritless claim that it's "racist" that he added 4 more Republican seats in Florida.
---
__This is the exact same scheme the Left attempted here in Texas to try and ERASE our brand new 38th district.__
---
**That 's why we've launched the [Redistricting Defense Fund](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480764:JmxIxnojN:m:1:3317145305:614C74FE1D0A66AA9741AD71C2D1A679:r) to protect the 5 NEW SEATS between Florida and Texas that will FLIP the House from Pelosi's control.**

We’re facing crisis after crisis right now — and Elizabeth is tackling these tough fights head on. Just in the past month, she’s introduced a bill to crack down on corporate price gouging, channeled the outrage of abortion rights supporters to push for codifying Roe, and continued to make the case for other much-needed changes — like abolishing the filibuster, expanding the Supreme Court, and canceling student debt. She’s also helped over half a dozen Warren Democrats win their primaries. **But she’s only able to stay in this fight because of grassroots supporters like you.** [_**Our next fundraising deadline is midnight Tuesday. Can you pitch in $3 or whatever makes sense right now to help hit our monthly goal, re-elect Elizabeth, and support Warren Democrats across the country?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45872534/347854735/-713054994?refcode=EMZ5N_EOM_E_20220529_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGZhYWQwNy01OGRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wlWNXlg_uegAKWbfyAI6hIx5GeoKzvLArCgoulEgbRc=) | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I'll be honest with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
I never thought this is how it'd go.
| | |
---
Friend –
I’ll be honest with you. I never thought this is how it’d go.
When Gabby and I got married, I never thought this is the way things would turn out.
I never thought I’d run for public office. She was the elected official in the family, and on the International Space Station, I was about as far from Congress as you can get.
I never thought more than 1 million people would contribute and volunteer to help elect me.
And I never thought that I’d need to ask supporters to do more than that to defend this seat.
But I need to ask you to do more. We are facing millions of dollars in attack ads, the former president says beating me is the first step to “taking back America,” and we’ve missed a few fundraising goals in a row already this year.
So, please, friend. You may not have woken up this morning thinking you’d make a donation to my re-election, but **I really need you if we’re going to hold this seat.**
_[**Can you PLEASE make one more contribution – split between my campaign and Jacky Rosen’s – before our fundraising drive ends at midnight tonight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45874292/347858346/-1087597766?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1796-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTVhYmYwNy01OWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kZChSeLyou32IkkIVuVdjMf9Ej7i_bzbYgxzecEe4j4=)_

name: Alex Lasry
subject: The Supreme Court is poised to overturn Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin **[alexlasry
body:
Americans shouldn’t have to wake up every week wondering whether this will be the week that Roe is overturned. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45874857/347860124/1537047765?refcode=EM_FR_220529FRAM_N_AL_60DA_4_NG_TestB_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDBmYWZiNy01OWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVdXysUikogA9IQwaE_I0FGmNcMNlS5z4EpJ-LJSkBk=)
---
Peter,

Every week, for the next few weeks, the Supreme Court will be releasing opinions on the cases they’ve heard this term. And we all know that in the next few weeks, the SCOTUS is all but certain to either drastically chip away at or completely overturn _Roe v. Wade_.

I couldn’t be more clear about this: Choice and the right to a safe, legal abortion is on the ballot this November.

Americans shouldn’t have to wake up every week wondering whether this will be the week that _Roe_ is overturned. It’s past time to codify the protections granted under _Roe_ into federal law and abolish the filibuster. With your help, this November we will finally be able to do just that.

**I’m running against an anti-choice extremist who said _Roe v. Wade_ was a “tragedy.” Now is our chance to get rid of Ron Johnson and expand our Senate majority. [Help us win here by making a donation of whatever you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45874859/347860126/1537047765?refcode=EM_FR_220529FRAM_N_AL_60DA_4_NG_TestB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDBmYWZiNy01OWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bVdXysUikogA9IQwaE_I0FGmNcMNlS5z4EpJ-LJSkBk=)** clean_body: Americans shouldn’t have to wake up every week wondering whether this will be the week that Roe is overturned. | | = Peter, Every week, for the next few weeks, the Supreme Court will be releasing opinions on the cases they’ve heard this term. And we all know that in the next few weeks, the SCOTUS is all but certain to either drastically chip away at or completely overturn Roe v. Wade. I couldn’t be more clear about this: Choice and the right to a safe, legal abortion is on the ballot this November. Americans shouldn’t have to wake up every week wondering whether this will be the week that Roe is overturned. It’s past time to codify the protections granted under Roe into federal law and abolish the filibuster. With your help, this November we will finally be able to do just that. I’m running against an anti-choice extremist who said Roe v. Wade was a “tragedy.” Now is our chance to get rid of Ron Johnson and expand our Senate majority. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Alex Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. body:

As President Trump's former campaign manager and Senior White House Advisor, there's been a lot said about me these last five years by the Fake News media.

But now I'm telling my story, in my own words, and I think you'll want to read it. From the 2016 campaign to the halls of 1600 Pennsylvania Ave, I'll give you the true and uncensored account of my time working for President Trump.

But these are selling out fast, we only have **100 books left! **

So do you want a signed copy of my new book, _Here 's the Deal_?

**[To order your signed copy, contribute $35 or more RIGHT NOW!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480770:6c4FxnouN:m:1:3253819041:0816DED7A61370EE772662667B63FF82:r "To order your signed copy, contribute $35 or more RIGHT NOW! ")**

If you've always wanted a behind the scenes look at Trump's 2016 victory and his presidency, now's your chance.

**BUT YOU HAVE TO HURRY** - there are only 100 copies available. Plus, your contribution today will fuel our efforts to take back the House and restore conservative leadership in Washington.

Kellyanne Conway

body:

In a time when disinformation reigns supreme, here’s something you and I both know to be true: this election year is vital to saving our democracy. **[So I’m reaching out to give you an update on our end-of-month fundraising goal and then ask for a $10 contribution before our deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45875491/347863063/-1906939082?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.05.29_b1_eom2-aw_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=10&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.05.29_b1_eom2-aw_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTM1MTBkNS01YmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yt6ElMb5KJTpM_5-aEr-RrTSOpoQRHQnx5sjRVSSZJY=)** | [GIVE $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45875492/347863064/-1906939082?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.05.29_b1_eom2-aw_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=10&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.05.29_b1_eom2-aw_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTM1MTBkNS01YmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yt6ElMb5KJTpM_5-aEr-RrTSOpoQRHQnx5sjRVSSZJY=)
---

You might be asking yourself – why should I donate now? The general election isn’t until November. (Please keep reading, and we’ll tell you all about it.) →

If you knew that early money makes all the difference when going up against a Capitol insurrectionist whose campaign war chest is funded by a Trump Super PAC, **[would you consider making a $10 donation before getting to the end of this email?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45875493/347863065/-1906939082?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.05.29_b1_eom2-aw_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=10&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.05.29_b1_eom2-aw_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTM1MTBkNS01YmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yt6ElMb5KJTpM_5-aEr-RrTSOpoQRHQnx5sjRVSSZJY=)**
[GIVE $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45875494/347863066/-1906939082?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.05.29_b1_eom2-aw_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=10&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.05.29_b1_eom2-aw_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTM1MTBkNS01YmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yt6ElMb5KJTpM_5-aEr-RrTSOpoQRHQnx5sjRVSSZJY=)
---

Now that the new polling is out, and we have Brad leading the primary field by 20-points, we need to step up our donation rate as much as possible. Every donation coming in right now is going to fund critical voter outreach programs that we need to win in a rural district like Brad’s.

I can’t sugarcoat this: Derrick Van Orden already has millions in his war chest. Not only that, the National Republican Senate Committee has officially announced a $9 million ad buy, and you can be sure they’ll be blasting WI-03’s airwaves with Trump propaganda.

To win, we will have to run ads, mail literature, host events, and talk to voters – this all costs an enormous amount of money in a district that will be a top battleground seat. As I look at our budget right now, we are not where we need to be.

**[But, with you by our side, we can win this race! We’ve got to hit $5,000 by next Tuesday, which means we need to raise at least $1,250 today. Will you chip in $10 and help us protect our House majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45875495/347863067/-1906939082?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2022.05.29_b1_eom2-aw_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=10&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2022.05.29_b1_eom2-aw_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTM1MTBkNS01YmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yt6ElMb5KJTpM_5-aEr-RrTSOpoQRHQnx5sjRVSSZJY=)**

clean_body: Yuck. | = In a time when disinformation reigns supreme, here’s something you and I both know to be true: this election year is vital to saving our democracy. = | = You might be asking yourself – why should I donate now? The general election isn’t until November. (Please keep reading, and we’ll tell you all about it.) → If you knew that early money makes all the difference when going up against a Capitol insurrectionist whose campaign war chest is funded by a Trump Super PAC, = = Now that the new polling is out, and we have Brad leading the primary field by 20-points, we need to step up our donation rate as much as possible. Every donation coming in right now is going to fund critical voter outreach programs that we need to win in a rural district like Brad’s. I can’t sugarcoat this: Derrick Van Orden already has millions in his war chest. Not only that, the National Republican Senate Committee has officially announced a $9 million ad buy, and you can be sure they’ll be blasting WI-03’s airwaves with Trump propaganda. To win, we will have to run ads, mail literature, host events, and talk to voters – this all costs an enormous amount of money in a district that will be a top battleground seat. As I look at our budget right now, we are not where we need to be. = = = = = = = Thanks for a being a part of the team, Andrew Whitley Campaign Manager | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: History has proven Hillsdale correct
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWxWObThNP

For Hillsdale College, independence is invaluable. Hillsdale
refuses to accept a single penny of federal or state funding-not
even indirectly in
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWxWObThNP

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

For Hillsdale College, independence is
invaluable.

Hillsdale refuses to accept a single penny of
federal or state funding-not even indirectly in the form of
federal or state student grants and loans.

This independence frees Hillsdale from
corrupting and unconstitutional regulations and allows us to
remain true to the college's 1844 mission: to provide the kind of
education needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil
and religious liberty."

The kind of education offered by Hillsdale is
rare in American higher education today. There are several
reasons for this. Let me mention two important ones.

One reason is that since the 1960s, Left-wing
progressives have increasingly come to dominate American colleges
and universities. They have thrown out the old mission statements
and restructured their curricula to promote "progressive"
ideology.

Another contributing factor to the decline of
American higher education has been the massive influx of taxpayer
funding to colleges and universities-funding that comes with
regulatory strings attached.

Going back to the 1950s, when the direct
distribution of federal-taxpayer money first became available to
colleges, Hillsdale refused to accept such funds.

Since that time, Hillsdale's Board of
Trustees has pledged several times to resist any attempts by the
government to regulate its internal affairs. Hillsdale was almost
alone in seeing the dangers posed by federal funding.

History has proven Hillsdale's decision to be
correct-and Hillsdale's status as America's leading liberal arts
college that reaches and teaches increasing millions of citizens
nationwide stands as proof.

Hillsdale's independence also means that all
of the scholarships, grants, and loans that our students need to
attend Hillsdale College must be privately funded through the
generosity of citizens like you, who understand the importance of
education to liberty.

Indeed, all of Hillsdale's work is entirely
dependent on private support-and as I already mentioned, this
work is by no means confined to our Michigan campus.

Hillsdale radiates its educational mission
nationwide through its many outreach efforts on behalf of
liberty.

Consider our monthly speech digest, Imprimis.
Now in its 49th year, Imprimis reaches more than 5.7 million
households and businesses nationwide.

Hillsdale also produces online courses, and
we offer them free of charge to any citizen wishing to learn.
Over 2.5 million citizens have already enrolled in one or more of
these courses, which cover such topics as the Constitution,
American history, and free market economics.

Hillsdale also extends its mission into
American K-12 education. Our Barney Charter School Initiative has
already helped establish over 20 Hillsdale-affiliated classical
K-12 charter schools in over eleven states.

In addition, Hillsdale provides, free of
charge, an American classical K-12 curriculum -including American
civics-to a growing network of educators and homeschoolers.

Our effective educational outreach on behalf
of liberty has a tremendous impact-and in this time of increasing
threats to American liberty, we aim to expand these outreach
efforts even further.

None of this would be possible without your
support.

That's why I'm asking you to partner with
Hillsdale by making a generous donation today.

Your gift is vital to the continuation and
expansion of Hillsdale's work to promote informed patriotism.

You can give safely and securely online here:
https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/price-of-independence

With your help, Hillsdale will remain a
beacon of genuine independence … and will continue to work
tirelessly to preserve America's great heritage of liberty for
future generations.

All of us at Hillsdale College are deeply
grateful for your partnership.

Best regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since
1844

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: I need you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
I'm reaching out to humbly ask for your support in my race for Iowa's Senate seat
| | |
---
Hey, Peter. I'm reaching out to humbly ask for your support in my race for Iowa's Senate seat – because right now, we're forecasted to fall short of what we need to raise before our critical deadline TOMORROW. If we miss the most important goal for our campaign so far, we might not have the resources to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley and flip this seat blue.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45875751/347863938/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk780-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGJmOWM4My01Y2RmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=01Xck6A11g68dxUIROq_Ij9LrjWd0BLzzNAgHA03S8w=)
Defeating Sen. Grassley – who will be heavily backed by Mitch McConnell and his allies – will take unprecedented grassroots resources. [**Can you help us get back on track by making a contribution of $5 or more right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45875752/347863939/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk780-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGJmOWM4My01Y2RmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=01Xck6A11g68dxUIROq_Ij9LrjWd0BLzzNAgHA03S8w=)
Peter, our Senate majority is as thin as it can possibly be – and Democratic control of the Senate is the only reason we’ve been able to pass critical legislation like the American Rescue Plan to help working families in Iowa. Meanwhile, Sen. Grassley has lived in Washington for decades and turned his back on the interests of everyday Iowans. It’s long past time for new leadership.
But we can only win – and protect our Democratic Senate majority in the process – if we muster enough grassroots support to compete with a deeply entrenched incumbent like Sen. Grassley. **[So please, can you help us make up this fundraising shortfall by rushing a contribution of $5 or more right now? Every dollar you give will ensure we have the resources to flip Iowa blue and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45875753/347863940/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk780-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGJmOWM4My01Y2RmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=01Xck6A11g68dxUIROq_Ij9LrjWd0BLzzNAgHA03S8w=)**
Thank you,

Abby
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45875754/347863941/428800054?refcode=jtk780-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NGJmOWM4My01Y2RmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=01Xck6A11g68dxUIROq_Ij9LrjWd0BLzzNAgHA03S8w=&emci=4d82a592-c7b6-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=44bf9c83-5cdf-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=13784334) This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/pk-e07AH4kCJxaMTlYxs8g2?unsubscribedata=Yc%2BqAk3imfmpoofd6DByw57Mry4DiFcDsMjnIRNLcUm89zDsnvnlz5Gmaqo8Oa7i%2Fto%2BsP52SMEswrTWGEn37tLb241mZaKEMrWwSDfglaRis7s%2BKXPaWFwR1Rot0JevxYDkU9oSOfFBShjvU6%2BYU030KXnobDkcAx77TQ1L84dvBZVkIDIDGKTzZkq3wr9uekBkdohEayiT9mOCAuIU7CFdT9SUo67R8NyZFyqHaPKUpOVJHRIDw7yG49u7Yui7SbpP8BtFwlU0mnkKeMH7OBBrGpmscTYAFOoxS2iHKLPDWwQK67FVVEF0kOziXICFm5vp4y2itIQpNwjw5EAqv6dAhuEgdGzEJmYPC5rfPQZAF1Z4Odd%2BfVrJz989NkGOphqND2%2BT3KKA%2FxxUo26VnH0DDe%2F1DvFSsVfJ9iqiEn9Jq9rlVC%2BaD96fXJbZMVz6) | | Paid for by Abby for Iowa

name: Nikki Fried
subject: “Other stuff to do”
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Peter —
It’s the middle of our end-of-month fundraising push, but I’m stepping away from the phones for a minute because I needed you to see this.
This past week, Charlie Crist refused to accept any more debates, claiming that he has “other stuff to do.” 🙄🙄
Sun-Sentinel Editor Dan Sweeny said it best, Peter: Crist’s refusal to attend any more debates “looks like all his views are indefensible flip-floppery, based on sheer opportunism.”
I didn’t become Florida’s only statewide elected Democrat by running scared or making lame excuses. I did it by taking bold action, making my priorities clear, and defending my record.
Now, I'm running for Governor because I know that we need a candidate with a spine — a candidate with the courage to fight back against DeSantis' authoritarian regime. And if you agree, I hope you'll chip in $10, or anything you can, to help us out before our May deadline. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=529eom4]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=529eom4] Express Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=529eom4] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=529eom4] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=529eom4] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=529eom4] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=529eom4]
Like you, I’m sick of watching candidates like Charlie Crist lose over and over again, sticking to the same old playbook and hiding their real policy positions from voters.
It’s time for something new, Peter. It’s time to run a candidate with the guts to stand behind her own record and give Floridians the leadership we deserve.
I’ve got no "other stuff" to do — nothing is more important than standing up for Floridians, making your voices heard, and fighting back against DeSantis’ attacks on our freedoms. If you’re with me, click here to chip in $10 and help us meet our May fundraising goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=529eom4]
Thanks!
— Nikki
Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Stand for those with no voice
body:
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I feel like our culture has forgotten—or ignored—some very important and basic lessons when it comes to the development of human life. Our society has been infected by an anti-life ideology, treating its most vulnerable members as disposable objects. Abortion that was once thought of as a last resort in a medical emergency has become the new normal. Medicine tells us that life begins at the moment of conception. It also tells us when an unborn baby develops a heartbeat, brainwaves, and nervous system. Yet, despite all of this, the unborn are not treated as though they are alive or even human. **As a surgeon, I have operated on infants pre-birth. I can assure you that they are very much alive.** [[](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFUE1rxCAQ_TXJzaDGmOSQw8Kyty2lFHoUV8es1I-ghv79mt0WeivMZWbee_Pm6UUrLYlq7UIxpXigM8FsYqwDxfGg2cjI0GOiecOwdJBKl2Dbb84qGYrMnyYmBZ2Kvr0vfAI8TjORN2DUzMxw0o8TpTNVnBFD24-ruErrbFhfpIclFSNSFkEKqSzaUnTWgBgQnRGlgrRuuZey5aY_NfRSKxoDKXeVmo7zKqZQ-xIDdDGtFVAl0KGBcpEFPIRyEPvLXrzIca9Om_5cQXkDVaqLhvJj5UHb3dcV-OruZ6ik36Rdw5MhHtb-yD4xMZSj68-vJ_T2fkG_GbZp0duXdc5mPtbk1kP4kVL57-tvTn6F2g)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ Life is a precious gift that has been given to us from our creator. No person is disposable, and every life is precious according to Him. I believe that everyone deserves life, even those who have been denied this right by our society. I believe that together we can make a difference and bring dignity and a voice to the unborn. I also believe that I’m not alone in this belief. I believe that you believe that too. I’ve started working with a group of like-minded individuals who are looking to change our culture. We want to build a society that values life but that takes people like you and I making a commitment. The first step is clearly stating what we believe and what we are willing to do to protect the lives of the unborn. [**Will you join me today and stand up for those who cannot do it for themselves?**](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFUE1rxCAQ_TXJzaDGmOSQw8Kyty2lFHoUV8es1I-ghv79mt0WeivMZWbee_Pm6UUrLYlq7UIxpXigM8FsYqwDxfGg2cjI0GOiecOwdJBKl2Dbb84qGYrMnyYmBZ2Kvr0vfAI8TjORN2DUzMxw0o8TpTNVnBFD24-ruErrbFhfpIclFSNSFkEKqSzaUnTWgBgQnRGlgrRuuZey5aY_NfRSKxoDKXeVmo7zKqZQ-xIDdDGtFVAl0KGBcpEFPIRyEPvLXrzIca9Om_5cQXkDVaqLhvJj5UHb3dcV-OruZ6ik36Rdw5MhHtb-yD4xMZSj68-vJ_T2fkG_GbZp0duXdc5mPtbk1kP4kVL57-tvTn6F2g) I’ve created a new pro-life pledge; I’d love your support. Would you read the pledge below to see if you align with our shared goals and are willing to commit to fighting for the lives of the unborn? [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/pro-life-statement/](http://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyFUE1rxCAQ_TXJzaDGmOSQw8Kyty2lFHoUV8es1I-ghv79mt0WeivMZWbee_Pm6UUrLYlq7UIxpXigM8FsYqwDxfGg2cjI0GOiecOwdJBKl2Dbb84qGYrMnyYmBZ2Kvr0vfAI8TjORN2DUzMxw0o8TpTNVnBFD24-ruErrbFhfpIclFSNSFkEKqSzaUnTWgBgQnRGlgrRuuZey5aY_NfRSKxoDKXeVmo7zKqZQ-xIDdDGtFVAl0KGBcpEFPIRyEPvLXrzIca9Om_5cQXkDVaqLhvJj5UHb3dcV-OruZ6ik36Rdw5MhHtb-yD4xMZSj68-vJ_T2fkG_GbZp0duXdc5mPtbk1kP4kVL57-tvTn6F2g) Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---

body:
We have just four weeks to prepare for whatever Michael’s official opponent will send our way. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45876358/347866707/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjk5M2Q3ZC01ZmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kxDiPj3gUlU0vop2zJur39E6LYJWvKaWZr-S82Z9KTg=)
Team, **In one month, the Colorado GOP will choose their candidate to go against Michael.** They’re deciding between: 1) A January 6 insurrectionist who tried to outright ban abortions in Colorado, wants to strip half-a-million Coloradans of their health care coverage, and travelled the country denying the results of the 2020 election. 2) And a wealthy opponent who writes his own campaign six-figure checks when grassroots support is low, instead of listening to Coloradans and wants to restrict reproductive rights. Folks, no matter who the Colorado GOP chooses to run against Michael next month, neither will represent Coloradans’ interests. Michael’s record of creating jobs, protecting our communities from climate change, and investing in working families stands tall against his extreme opponents. But Michael won his last midterm election race by _less than two points_ , and after the National GOP announced that they spent $53 million in ad buys in battleground states, they could flood the airwaves right here in Colorado, so we have to be prepared for whatever comes next. **We have just four weeks to prepare for whatever Michael’s official opponent will send our way. clean_body: We have just four weeks to prepare for whatever Michael’s official opponent will send our way. | = Team, In one month, the Colorado GOP will choose their candidate to go against Michael. They’re deciding between: 1) A January 6 insurrectionist who tried to outright ban abortions in Colorado, wants to strip half-a-million Coloradans of their health care coverage, and travelled the country denying the results of the 2020 election. 2) And a wealthy opponent who writes his own campaign six-figure checks when grassroots support is low, instead of listening to Coloradans and wants to restrict reproductive rights. Folks, no matter who the Colorado GOP chooses to run against Michael next month, neither will represent Coloradans’ interests. Michael’s record of creating jobs, protecting our communities from climate change, and investing in working families stands tall against his extreme opponents. But Michael won his last midterm election race by less than two points , and after the National GOP announced that they spent $53 million in ad buys in battleground states, they could flood the airwaves right here in Colorado, so we have to be prepared for whatever comes next. We have just four weeks to prepare for whatever Michael’s official opponent will send our way. Can you rush a $10 donation before Tuesday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline to power our campaign to re-elect Michael and defend our majority? name: Andrew P. McIndoe
subject: Share your thoughts on American energy independence
body:
Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgfci5hb0mrivqp3h11ht4ho53pabrp1u6ekmcm0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq69pbks3jb3crk6lh70p5ie2q76obh66r3fc3gsqrm6cb5m9hb8criclp72d1n6v970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj666pb6p30ear6cdb4mdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933clj61pj3c5i66oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfgo6nd941uqggtn8aekmspl3egsdirqi5h0rirg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3j66ob4cdh2bs)
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, Gas prices have risen dramatically since the Biden administration took office, and I’m sure you’ve felt the pinch at the pump just like the rest of your fellow Americans. There’s no doubt in my mind that our nation’s citizens are in need of relief. But instead, President Biden has throttled U.S. energy production. And he has trapped much of our nation’s vast energy reserves behind a wall of bureaucratic red tape. That’s why I’m sending you this email today. I’d like to hear how the Biden administration’s energy policies have affected you and your family. [**Would you be willing to share your thoughts in this brief 8 question survey?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrml0lig4f06sgu52219v3s9c6u1odfcjdetq1bg_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3j66ob4cdh2bs) By doing so, you will help The Heritage Foundation understand what people like you think—and use your answers to fight back against the Biden administration’s radical anti-energy agenda. The survey should only take a few minutes of your time, but your opinion is incredibly valuable. **You can get started right now using this secure link:[https://secured.heritage.org/energy-independence-survey/](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsn7jpuc3gktcncek9fcee80oqqu3m0gjqgh3088_rp22sh2s8i66pb6c3j66ob4cdh2bs)** Thank you so much for your time. I am truly grateful. Best, Andrew P. McIndoe
VP, Development
---
| | The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002
---

subject: I need your eyes on this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
The Omaha World-Herald just reported...

|
---

| | I asked.
My wife asked.
Bob Kerrey told you the stakes. _[**But I had to reach out again as soon as I heard:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45877629/347873165/1129282168?refcode=20220529_em_fr_b1_tony_30&amount=14&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDU4YWU2Yi02MWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yc4F0ilJaaHdvkmelcA_5P7GTC0_TVtIjjAHwdwTofI=)_ [**__The Omaha World-Herald_ just reported that this November election is going to be a "showdown for Nebraska’s 2nd District." Truly, my race could decide whether Democrats keep the House -- and I can win. But Republican Don Bacon has me outraised by hundreds of thousands of dollars -- and he’ll wipe me out if I can’t pick up the pace before my End of Month Deadline. name: Giffords.org
subject: remember this every 29th
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
For the people of Uvalde, Texas, life will never, ever be the same again.
#

Friends --
For the people of Uvalde, Texas, life will never, ever be the same again.
But soon, the television cameras will leave. The national conversation about gun violence prevention will fade from the headlines.
But our work will continue.
It continues every day.
And the truth is, we need your support whether mass shootings are in the news or not. Because no matter the day, we are fighting to pass laws that will make our communities safer from gun violence.
So we want to ask you to do something important today.
[**Make a recurring contribution to Giffords today. And when it hits on the 29th of each month, take a moment to remember how committed you were at this moment to fight to change our gun laws.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22-rec?refcode=em220529-1-15&recurring=true&t=1&refcode2=2085_3935704_Sb4V6_&akid=2085%2E3935704%2ESb4V6_)**
**[MAKE A RECURRING DONATION TO GIFFORDS](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-may22-rec?refcode=em220529-1-15&recurring=true&t=2&refcode2=2085_3935704_Sb4V6_&akid=2085%2E3935704%2ESb4V6_)**
Thank you,
Gabby’s always said this is going to be a long, hard haul. Your recurring donation keeps us going.
The team at Giffords

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2085%2E3935704%2ESb4V6_) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

I'm about to ask you for $15.
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45878383/347877107/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1266-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjE4ZTc5Yy02NWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_iXYshNBAoDZOll7w1J4lGdNWUG1VQszsZCWCaHg3c=)
---
I'm about to ask you for $15.

I know it doesn't sound like much – but this grassroots movement is built on thousands of small-dollar donations from people like you.
**Fundraising has slowed over the past few days – but if 453 people give $15 right now, I'll get back on track to meet my $100,000 end-of-month fundraising goal and keep New Mexico blue.**
**[Will you donate $15 to protect New Mexico from the GOP, Peter?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45878384/347877108/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1266-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjE4ZTc5Yy02NWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_iXYshNBAoDZOll7w1J4lGdNWUG1VQszsZCWCaHg3c=)**
I wasn't able to fundraise a single dollar for several months this year due to regulations around legislative sessions. Now, I'm behind on my goals at the worst possible moment – **right when a poll shows one of my GOP opponents catching up.**
There's too much on the line to leave this race up to chance. This election will determine whether we can keep abortion safe and legal, continue to support working families, and take the bold action necessary to mitigate climate change.
**That's why I'm counting on you to help me reach my $100,000 end-of-month fundraising goal.[I can't defeat my far-right opponents without your help, so please: Will you donate $15 now to keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45878385/347877109/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk1266-fr-nd-v2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjE4ZTc5Yy02NWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_iXYshNBAoDZOll7w1J4lGdNWUG1VQszsZCWCaHg3c=)**

Michelle Lujan Grisham
