name: Mark Kelly
subject: I really need you if we’re going to hold this seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
I’ll be honest, I never thought this is how it’d go. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45878443/347877353/1927938479?refcode=220529_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWE3NjhlZi02NWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dsFR8qZm5dP3NcO3VPt4Kex0LhO3UNNNWGVx3lJEN6w=)
Friends — I’ll be honest with you. I never thought this is how it’d go. When Gabby and I got married, I never thought this is the way things would turn out. I never thought I’d run for public office. She was the elected official in the family, and on the International Space Station, I was about as far from Congress as you can get. I never thought more than 1 million people would contribute and volunteer to help elect me. And I never thought that I’d need to ask supporters to do more than that to defend this seat. But I need to ask you to do more. We are facing millions of dollars in attack ads, the former president says beating me is the first step to “taking back America,” and we’ve missed a few fundraising goals in a row already this year. So, please. You may not have woken up this morning thinking you’d make a donation to my re-election, but I really need you if we’re going to hold this seat. [**Can you PLEASE make a contribution -- split between my campaign and Seth Moulton -- before our May fundraising drive ends? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45878444/347877363/1927938479?refcode=220529_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWE3NjhlZi02NWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dsFR8qZm5dP3NcO3VPt4Kex0LhO3UNNNWGVx3lJEN6w=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45878445/347877370/-1534947712?refcode=220529_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWE3NjhlZi02NWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dsFR8qZm5dP3NcO3VPt4Kex0LhO3UNNNWGVx3lJEN6w=)
Thank you in advance for chipping in. It all adds up when we all do our part. Mark Kelly
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45878446/347877371/-1534947712?refcode=220529_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWE3NjhlZi02NWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dsFR8qZm5dP3NcO3VPt4Kex0LhO3UNNNWGVx3lJEN6w=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Senator=20Brian=20Dahle?=
subject: How California will change when I am elected
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brian Dahle for Governor 2022
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=2f118c9070&e=f9133ea432)
---
|
Hi , Recently I had the honor of being interviewed at Newsmax and was asked the question: “If you are elected as governor, what are your solutions for the state?”

Rather than recap my plans to save California over email, would you take 4 minutes to watch the interview?

[Watch the interview here. ](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=c270553446&e=f9133ea432)

The truth is, Gavin Newsom has run this state into the ground.

Because of that, people are leaving in droves either due to the insane cost of living, the wildly high crime rate and lack of criminal justice, the historically poor education standards, or all of the above.

But I have plans to turn that around quickly once elected.

So again, please, if you have a moment, [go watch that interview right here. ](https://briandahle.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11c7ad6aa59a7d39fc5819cc1&id=74875f6717&e=f9133ea432)

**Don’t forget - the primary election is less than two weeks away.**

Can I count on you to raise your voice and vote for me?

Thank you for your continued support.

\- Senator Brian Dahle
---
| |

---
|
---

body:
Together, we can build something better for our communities.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45878627/347879808/-1740198439?amount=25&refcode=ea.1ea37565-68df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ms=ea.1ea37565-68df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZWEzNzU2NS02OGRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zU8bdyKI7ZfWAkkPcr5sCrHx4Uh-xT5-e7JAYPHlzHw=) Peter -

I launched my campaign for Congress just about five months ago. I hope you have gotten to know me a little better by now - as I have also enjoyed hearing from you through your responses to emails like this one and out on the campaign trail.

Here’s what you need to know about me: I am a mother of three, a former Army Captain, retired CIA officer, and daughter to a school teacher and a WW2 and Korean conflict veteran (and former Congressman to the district I’m running to serve). I have spent my career serving our country and working to improve representation for women in the military. **Most importantly, I’m a proud daughter of Wisconsin and I will do whatever is needed to improve the lives of my neighbors and community members.**

That’s precisely why I am running for Congress. Our country is facing many challenges: Russian aggression, rising prices, gun violence, a Supreme Court that is hostile to women’s rights, and a growing number of politicians who refuse to accept the legitimacy of our free and fair elections.

I know the remaining months ahead will not be easy, especially running against a Trump-endorsed radical opponent who has nearly 2 million dollars in his campaign coffers.

However, if I’ve learned anything from raising three children while my husband and I served our country, it’s that we are stronger together - and that sometimes it takes a mom to get things done.

I am emailing you today because I’m just days away from my biggest end-of-month deadline yet, and I am falling behind on my goal.

**[I need your help to reach my $15,000 online fundraising goal. clean_body: | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | ---|--- | Congrats! After a rigorous selection process, Dr. Ruiz and the team chose you to participate in our new Listen, Secretary Buttigieg is leading the charge to fix America’s crumbling infrastructure. But he needs a foolproof strategy to ensure things go according to plan. So we’re asking for your immediate input. We’re depending on your insight to help us answer crucial questions: • Do you support electric vehicles or high-speed rail? • Do you have problems with bridges or potholes in your community? • Are there any issues specific to your area that you don’t want overlooked? We chose you as one of only [5] Pennsylvania Democrats for this exclusive survey, so please make sure to fully submit your response to ensure accurate data for your area. Thanks in advance, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. Hello,
Russian state media is right now airing clips from Fox News of people like Donald Trump and Tucker Carlson praising Vladimir Putin.
When I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy and the commander of all U.S. forces in East Africa, I requested that Fox News be turned off in the mess halls during meal hours. Its lie-filled propaganda was a national security threat to my troops’ ability to carry out our mission.
I’ve seen the real-life consequences of disinformation and media lies that are manufactured and repeated by people like Donald Trump and his acolytes like my opponent Chuck Grassley. And as January 6th showed, it is a threat to our very democracy.
It will take significant campaign funding to fight back against all of the lies Fox News and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are going to tell about me. That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising another $250,000 before our critical end-of-month deadline at midnight on Tuesday to keep our new TV ads up.
Right now, we are still falling a little short, but with the help of grassroots donors like you now, we can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue:

clean_body: Hello, Russian state media is right now airing clips from Fox News of people like Donald Trump and Tucker Carlson praising Vladimir Putin. When I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy and the commander of all U.S. forces in East Africa, I requested that Fox News be turned off in the mess halls during meal hours. Its lie-filled propaganda was a national security threat to my troops’ ability to carry out our mission. I’ve seen the real-life consequences of disinformation and media lies that are manufactured and repeated by people like Donald Trump and his acolytes like my opponent Chuck Grassley. And as January 6th showed, it is a threat to our very democracy. It will take significant campaign funding to fight back against all of the lies Fox News and Mitch McConnell’s Super PACs are going to tell about me. That’s why we’ve set a goal of raising another $250,000 before our critical end-of-month deadline at midnight on Tuesday to keep our new TV ads up. name: Fmr. Navy SEAL Rob O'Neill
subject: Help us win this race, flip the seat RED, and send Nancy Pelosi packing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
Still defending America's future

---

Peter - This is former Navy SEAL Rob O'Neill. I don't send emails like this often, but I need to tell you about something important today. Look, I'm the guy who took out Osama Bin Laden, so I know exactly what it means to be in a tough situation - and that's why I'm asking for your help. Everything is on the line in the must-win race in Wisconsin's Third District, and my good friend and fellow SEAL, Derrick Van Orden, is facing the fight of his life against Nancy Pelosi and the radical left. The Democrats have already raised **$350 MILLION** to smear every Pro-Trump conservative in America - and they will do ANYTHING to crush a common-sense conservative patriot like Derrick. [**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help and hoping you will join me by stepping up and chipping in right now to help us win this race, flip the seat RED, and send Nancy Pelosi packing. **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60481319:JBVNqnokN:m:1:3317145305:97B7078536DDD1B6DC30E2FB5CD6E77A:r) I was part of 400 combat missions - and defending America's future has been my life's work. But if we don't step up now, there may not be an America left. **Derrick Van Orden and I took a blood oath to defend this country. Derrick has President Trump 's endorsement, and he has my endorsement-and I hope he has yours too.** This is THE race that will decide the House majority, but we'll NEVER win without your help: ****[**CONTRIBUTE $25**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60481319:JBVNqnokN:m:1:3317145305:97B7078536DDD1B6DC30E2FB5CD6E77A:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $50**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60481319:JBVNqnokN:m:1:3317145305:97B7078536DDD1B6DC30E2FB5CD6E77A:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $100**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60481319:JBVNqnokN:m:1:3317145305:97B7078536DDD1B6DC30E2FB5CD6E77A:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $200**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60481319:JBVNqnokN:m:1:3317145305:97B7078536DDD1B6DC30E2FB5CD6E77A:r)**** ** ** Thank you for your support, [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60481319:JBVNqnokN:m:1:3317145305:97B7078536DDD1B6DC30E2FB5CD6E77A:r)

Rob O'Neill
Former SEAL Team Combat Veteran **
** ****
Paid for by Van Orden for Congress

subject: Not on our watch! 👀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
want proof that our strategy is making a difference? Look no further than Pennsylvania and North Carolina
|
---

---
Folks – want proof that our strategy is making a difference? Look no further than Pennsylvania and North Carolina, two important swing states.

In 2011, Republicans gerrymandered both states. But in 2021, we were ready for them. Here's how the congressional maps changed between the 2012 election and the 2022 election: | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45878918/347880612/2144045629?amount=20&refcode=20220529.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1YTM3NTY1LTY4ZGYtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h85i1SsDr8v-AT5GNNOLd5S71-7GZ3mU_NT5_eEvUJ4=)
---
[_You can help us win more victories like these: Chip in toward our end-of-month goal!_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45878919/347880613/2144045629?amount=20&refcode=20220529.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE1YTM3NTY1LTY4ZGYtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=h85i1SsDr8v-AT5GNNOLd5S71-7GZ3mU_NT5_eEvUJ4=)

Despite this progress, our work isn’t finished. That's because Republicans are defending their gerrymanders in many states, and in others, the maps could be redrawn after this year. On top of that, GOP map manipulators are seeking reelection and trying to evade accountability for their actions.

**_Not on our watch!_** With your help, we'll make sure voters know about the anti-democratic gerrymandering of politicians like Ron DeSantis, and we’ll prevent Republicans from stacking state courts with their preferred judges. **Will you pitch in before midnight on Tuesday to help us hit our end-of-month goal?**

clean_body: want proof that our strategy is making a difference? Look no further than Pennsylvania and North Carolina | Folks – want proof that our strategy is making a difference? Look no further than Pennsylvania and North Carolina, two important swing states. In 2011, Republicans gerrymandered both states. But in 2021, we were ready for them. Here's how the congressional maps changed between the 2012 election and the 2022 election: | = = Despite this progress, our work isn’t finished. That's because Republicans are defending their gerrymanders in many states, and in others, the maps could be redrawn after this year. On top of that, GOP map manipulators are seeking reelection and trying to evade accountability for their actions. Not on our watch! With your help, we'll make sure voters know about the anti-democratic gerrymandering of politicians like Ron DeSantis, and we’ll prevent Republicans from stacking state courts with their preferred judges. Will you pitch in before midnight on Tuesday to help us hit our end-of-month goal? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = — Team NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: Focus group closes in a few hours!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
I’m bumping your personal invitation to my focus group one more time, Peter.

When I became attorney general, I vowed to ___always_ let the people inform my work – and that includes my campaign strategy. That’s why my team selected a small handful of engaged supporters to participate in this exclusive focus group, but I checked with my team a few moments ago, and your response is still missing.

Peter, the responses I receive from this group are _critical_ in my fight for re-election – especially now that my Republican opponent and his funders are _determined_ to defeat me. So please, will you participate in this group before midnight to help me improve my strategy?

**You can click this link to accept my personal invitation:[https://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY22-2022-focus-group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45879320/347882554/734485942?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk517-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWM3ZTMxNS02OWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jocamD4ZT2IPxVRpZiJRjHM5elF1L4WO75EbDp-IZFY=&emci=59b326c5-54dd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=c1c7e315-69df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)**
Thank you for your help,

Letitia
---
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Sat, May 28, 2022
Subject: Exclusive Focus Group for Peter
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45879323/347882559/265476937?code=jtk517-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWM3ZTMxNS02OWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jocamD4ZT2IPxVRpZiJRjHM5elF1L4WO75EbDp-IZFY=)
---
Peter, in a moment I’m going to ask you to be a critical part of my focus group. But first, I wanted to take a moment to explain why your opinion is so valuable to me.

I wasn’t born to a family of power or privilege. Like millions of other New Yorkers, I didn’t attend a fancy private school or have any special connections with the people who made the laws that directly affected my neighborhood. **In short: I know what it is to feel voiceless – and that’s why I’m giving you this opportunity to make your voice heard today.

Peter, I’m reaching out to you because your name was on the list of my most engaged supporters. So I have to ask: [Will you help strengthen my campaign strategy for re-election and participate in this exclusive focus group?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45879325/347882588/734485942?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk517-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWM3ZTMxNS02OWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jocamD4ZT2IPxVRpZiJRjHM5elF1L4WO75EbDp-IZFY=&emci=59b326c5-54dd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=c1c7e315-69df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)**
| | [JOIN FOCUS GROUP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45879327/347882591/734485942?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk517-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWM3ZTMxNS02OWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jocamD4ZT2IPxVRpZiJRjHM5elF1L4WO75EbDp-IZFY=&emci=59b326c5-54dd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=c1c7e315-69df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)
---
I’ve spent every moment as your attorney general fighting to defend New York’s working families from the powerful and corrupt – but I can’t continue my fight without your help. Especially when groups like the Republican Attorneys General Association – an organization that has raised nearly $6 million so far this year – want to install people like my GOP opponent into power.

**Peter, the responses I receive from this focus group will be critical in my efforts to build an airtight strategy for re-election.[So please, as a top supporter of this campaign, will you help me once again and answer these quick questions? I can’t take on the GOP’s multimillion dollar money machine without your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45879329/347882595/734485942?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk517-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWM3ZTMxNS02OWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jocamD4ZT2IPxVRpZiJRjHM5elF1L4WO75EbDp-IZFY=&emci=59b326c5-54dd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=c1c7e315-69df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)**
| | [JOIN FOCUS GROUP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45879340/347882606/734485942?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk517-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWM3ZTMxNS02OWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jocamD4ZT2IPxVRpZiJRjHM5elF1L4WO75EbDp-IZFY=&emci=59b326c5-54dd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=c1c7e315-69df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=25369504)

name: Never Again PAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Open this email to see who burned incriminating documents. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45879790/347884908/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZlMGU4YWYyLTY5ZGYtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1VFzSoxgONKN_5ZCR-c8Kymn5szxumbOnD6hcswopx4=&emci=cb5e1493-f2dd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=fe0e8af2-69df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=16335001) Team,

It seems like every single day there is more and more evidence that confirms the heinous intentions of the Trump administration and the Treason Caucus before, during, and after the events of January 6.

We're never surprised, but we are sometimes shocked at the level of blatant disregard for the law that these people have. Recent news has come out that after a meeting with Treason Caucus leader Scott Perry to strategize on overturning the 2020 election, former White House chief of staff Mark Meadows **burned several documents relating to the meeting and the Trump administration.**

We'll probably never know what damning evidence those documents could have held or what exactly was so terrifying to Mark Meadows that he had to make them disappear into a pile of ashes. **But what we do know is that this is dangerous.**

Our government was created to exist on the principles of accountability and transparency. Trump’s crimes were enabled by the Treason Caucus. It is our mission to make sure that doesn't happen ever again and that the people responsible are held accountable at the ballot box.

clean_body: Open this email to see who burned incriminating documents. Team, It seems like every single day there is more and more evidence that confirms the heinous intentions of the Trump administration and the Treason Caucus before, during, and after the events of January 6. We're never surprised, but we are sometimes shocked at the level of blatant disregard for the law that these people have. Recent news has come out that after a meeting with Treason Caucus leader Scott Perry to strategize on overturning the 2020 election, former White House chief of staff Mark Meadows burned several documents relating to the meeting and the Trump administration. We'll probably never know what damning evidence those documents could have held or what exactly was so terrifying to Mark Meadows that he had to make them disappear into a pile of ashes. But what we do know is that this is dangerous. Our government was created to exist on the principles of accountability and transparency. Trump’s crimes were enabled by the Treason Caucus. It is our mission to make sure that doesn't happen ever again and that the people responsible are held accountable at the ballot box. | Thank you, Never Again PAC Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. name: Fmr. Navy SEAL Rob O'Neill
subject: The Democrats have already raised $350 MILLION to smear us. ➡
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
Still defending America's future

---

- This is former Navy SEAL Rob O'Neill. I don't send emails like this often, but I need to tell you about something important today. Look, I'm the guy who took out Osama Bin Laden, so I know exactly what it means to be in a tough situation - and that's why I'm asking for your help. Everything is on the line in the must-win race in Wisconsin's Third District, and my good friend and fellow SEAL, Derrick Van Orden, is facing the fight of his life against Nancy Pelosi and the radical left. The Democrats have already raised **$350 MILLION** to smear every Pro-Trump conservative in America - and they will do ANYTHING to crush a common-sense conservative patriot like Derrick. [**That 's why I'm humbly asking for your help and hoping you will join me by stepping up and chipping in right now to help us win this race, flip the seat RED, and send Nancy Pelosi packing. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60482537:68X2qnoNM:m:1:3299561967:06C609CB32795B7F4C83A89CE951EB8B:r) I was part of 400 combat missions - and defending America's future has been my life's work. But if we don't step up now, there may not be an America left. **Derrick Van Orden and I took a blood oath to defend this country. Derrick has President Trump 's endorsement, and he has my endorsement-and I hope he has yours too.** This is THE race that will decide the House majority, but we'll NEVER win without your help: ****[**CONTRIBUTE $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60482537:68X2qnoNM:m:1:3299561967:06C609CB32795B7F4C83A89CE951EB8B:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60482537:68X2qnoNM:m:1:3299561967:06C609CB32795B7F4C83A89CE951EB8B:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60482537:68X2qnoNM:m:1:3299561967:06C609CB32795B7F4C83A89CE951EB8B:r)**** ** ** ****[**CONTRIBUTE $200**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60482537:68X2qnoNM:m:1:3299561967:06C609CB32795B7F4C83A89CE951EB8B:r)**** ** ** Thank you for your support, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60482537:68X2qnoNM:m:1:3299561967:06C609CB32795B7F4C83A89CE951EB8B:r)

Rob O'Neill
Former SEAL Team Combat Veteran **
** ****

name: Team Hayes
subject: The Work…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
There are no words to describe the pain and horror we have seen over the past week. Our entire team is praying for the families of those who were senselessly murdered in Uvalde and the Robb Elementary community. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45879938/347886064/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyODEyMDE0ZC02Y2RmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1Bs_iYD1IvpebQY6aFdD1AueoFteHFZeYde3D2nVUr0=&emci=59f47925-e2dd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=2812014d-6cdf-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=15529135) | There are no words to describe the pain and horror we have seen over the past week. Our entire team is praying for the families of those who were senselessly murdered in Uvalde and the Robb Elementary community. Nearly ten years after the massacre in Sandy Hook, this pain is fresh in our hearts – _and doing nothing is not an option on ANY of the critical issues facing our community._ Once again, we see that elections matter. They have real consequences. We should all know where every candidate on the ballot stands on issues as important as sensible gun reform. We know where Jahana stands. She has been unambiguous and unequivocal in her stance on gun violence prevention and responsible gun ownership. In Washington, she has been pushing for red flag, background and safe storage laws. She knows that gun violence is not just an issue – it is an epidemic in America. So, we ask you: Are you ready to hold candidates accountable? Are you going to support those who are fighting to reform this absolutely inexcusable stagnation on gun reform? Because, the bottom line is: **_The only way to solve this is to make sure we elect people who are committed to solving the problem._** [**The House majority is on the line in November – and along with it, the gun sense majority. clean_body: There are no words to describe the pain and horror we have seen over the past week. Our entire team is praying for the families of those who were senselessly murdered in Uvalde and the Robb Elementary community. | | There are no words to describe the pain and horror we have seen over the past week. Our entire team is praying for the families of those who were senselessly murdered in Uvalde and the Robb Elementary community. Nearly ten years after the massacre in Sandy Hook, this pain is fresh in our hearts – and doing nothing is not an option on ANY of the critical issues facing our community. Once again, we see that elections matter. They have real consequences. We should all know where every candidate on the ballot stands on issues as important as sensible gun reform. We know where Jahana stands. She has been unambiguous and unequivocal in her stance on gun violence prevention and responsible gun ownership. In Washington, she has been pushing for red flag, background and safe storage laws. She knows that gun violence is not just an issue – it is an epidemic in America. So, we ask you: Are you ready to hold candidates accountable? Are you going to support those who are fighting to reform this absolutely inexcusable stagnation on gun reform? Because, the bottom line is: The only way to solve this is to make sure we elect people who are committed to solving the problem. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for caring, and thank you for all you do, – Team Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: Peter Franchot
subject: Critical End-of-May Fundraising Deadline
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]
Dear Peter,
I’m just reaching out to let you know that we’re running up against our critical End-of-May fundraising deadline. With the July 19 primary just weeks away, and mail-in ballots about to be sent to voters even earlier than that, we are officially entering the home-run stretch of this race. I couldn’t be more excited.
I need your help to reach our May grassroots fundraising goal of $10,000 dollars by our May 31, 11:59 PM deadline. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mayendofmonth_0529?amount=20.22] If we can reach our goal, this money will help pay for the crucial tools we need to continue reaching out to voters in the month of June. By pitching in, you can help us pay for more yard signs and field literature, create more digital ads and campaign videos, place more phone calls and knock on more doors, and ultimately build the critical mass of support we need to win this race. So, what do you say?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mayendofmonth_0529?amount=10]
CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mayendofmonth_0529?amount=20.22]
CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mayendofmonth_0529?amount=50]
CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mayendofmonth_0529?amount=100]
CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mayendofmonth_0529]
Anything you can give is greatly appreciated, and I know that a groundswell of grassroots donations can easily get us to our fundraising goal by the end of this month. The clock is counting down towards election day – it’s important that we get as many donations as quickly and as early as possible so as to maximize the number of voters we can reach in these final weeks.
Thank you for your continued support of our inclusive movement. We are the frontrunners in this crowded field, and it’s all thanks to the incredible activists, allies, and friends who continue to power this movement from the grassroots up.
Click here to help us reach our fundraising goal of $10,000 by our May 31 deadline. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mayendofmonth_0529?amount=20.22]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mayendofmonth_0529]
By Authority: Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate; Thomas C. Brennan, Treasurer.
Franchot Anderson-Walker for Maryland Slate
4831 Tesla Dr, Suite J
Bowie, MD 20715
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Z0Lo20pRx0OQ6QeYLZWLCw2?unsubscribedata=BgwiNUlvXLEBom8ilOvn0JpVIXFXrGHpSmi1xMFmUm38hHEfPLN2Y4QAoGzB0bvgeXdyACmXYzxQDGeD5mIuA0tw0Rb3Mt0TrVbnRybrg5rdIY2PUtYinz2bl%2FZohv7PPTGXJywNVfvECKbw5xAciK6Xro1FMSW01si0IhRJgkq7U5jGcsmdUPtdHjQzhhba%2F6DAqO6KR8fvPPH1mBOLAf0tyy5n%2BF5sPNJsiKLMwVc1xIriAYCPWTrFon7h7BeTXMpmBYaPDmtfC0aSHNEeot5zNopM5ldm3pcuaKpB6ujX%2FOzqaV1g%2B%2FpXXAEVPqsPAike0LW77MEg3FRmcy8aCCHn547axGKp1Q6U%2FC%2F6Vpq7IJeknIKf3wSgNySrim%2BvVrlBA9yOU7SLe3aDa%2FiVMqv8m6T4%2FbhMOluYrbsSnKbMvY3zErcmn9uBVD4DXdkx .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

With just over five months until Election Day, we can't afford to miss this goal. National Republicans think they can flip RI-02 red this November. That's why they are attacking Seth directly. The GOP is rallying around Seth's Trump-supporting Republican opponent, Allan Fung, because they know he's in lockstep with Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy, and right-wing extremist Republicans.

Reaching our end-of-month goal helps ensure we can take on national Republicans and Allan Fung so we can send Seth to Congress to fight for all Rhode Islanders. But we can't do it without your support.

**[Chip in before our end-of-month deadline tomorrow at midnight to be one of the 6 donors we need from Cresco to help us reach our goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45880788/347890275/-1204412561?refcode=em22_220529_eom3_fnd_gq_act___kr_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220529_eom3_fnd_gq_act___kr_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTY2M2ZjOC03MGRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3oGxIJpYSeyQ_FB6UmvMYRRPx7ud-DAziAdnWXQ4fmo=)**

Thanks,

Kate
Team Seth

Seth Magaziner has a proven record of fighting for working people in Rhode Island. As General Treasurer, he’s created thousands of good paying jobs through his programs to revitalize public school buildings and build clean energy infrastructure across our state. Now, he's running for Congress in the competitive open Second District to keep fighting for all Rhode Islanders. Will you chip in to elect Seth in November and keep RI-02 blue

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Getting the facts on Jan. 6
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER
body:
|
---
Hello Friend,

The House Jan. 6 Committee has been doing the nation a tremendous service by investigating the facts behind the Capitol insurrection. And on June 9, they’re going to be holding the first in a series of six public hearings to present answers to the American people.
We deserve to know the answers to critical questions: What did Trump know about members of Congress’ plan to object to the results? What was he doing as rioters stormed the Capitol? Why did it take him more than three hours to respond to the attack? RAP has been following the committee’s investigation intently. Major events like longtime Trump aide Dan Scavino ignoring the committee’s subpoena show that the investigation has extended to the highest positions in the Trump administration. [Listen to Rep. Adam Kinzinger's statement on holding Scavino in contempt:](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VX9hXW22BsV-W68JH_-3T-DCrW1qZjFf4KGsMQMBB8TX3q90pV1-WJV7CgFpjW4jLGmj7NpR-kW4lW4MV9gjNDqW6t2fyP6PPYkzW5jhY2g9ct0dCW8sVPZs1SlFYzW7jDfwW6kXD8QVPx7B97H3qQqW7mVjVb6gvmphN230fskkgt-mN4N2BZt95HT8W7NC3P43XknHxMwWDyD_CM3ZW1kNFMs71_BGvW6Xt8BH7v2T8gW2F_4Zr4kQXMKW8w3Z9c73-49gW1Djc1k2l21JKW3Xp7Fk2bZDpFVd8vST23VF3wN8DPZLL9G86YW1qgbxD494BG0W1Q_5q565DrRFW5hYdSy2BNplxN2GCrmCytR46VsBGFv5VQv-1W6YBZBX89xNrQ36yG1)
---
[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VX9hXW22BsV-W68JH_-3T-DCrW1qZjFf4KGsMQMBB8TX3q90pV1-WJV7CgDKqW1S9XNl4J1Wt-W6-r4fs4lGdX-W4dCtLF262CFYW1kY86579tK8ZW3QKz4f6v7LpzW1k5Vfv6kNW9DW4nWPr_75fSNNW7D4p183kZZnPW88NQXr8nlJPpW5xCfYY7WcHBhW2zyglP64v_MCW5-sfwj9kN44_W6hzy-053zYjlW64yWkZ6B__0DN7FjmBwNZtg5W3vnRH45CgsQNV3LgPt7cDX78W9dZlDN7ZnxgbW5TQ9MB1jvZxDW2j2kVF2zxH9ZW9d-VM27ltH1hW5JhYRS2wvG8RW6JYZzJ9kgH3wW2sCrjV1-q9H1W7BKXlc8LjRz0W2T4Gpt2HZP1N3dzF1)
---
Even with the failure of many people to cooperate with the committee, new information and insights have already come to light. For example, RAP recently [**launched this timeline**](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VX9hXW22BsV-W68JH_-3T-DCrW1qZjFf4KGsMQMBB8TX3q90pV1-WJV7CgYy2W969zsQ4MvH0NW2WPkgX5-cfg9W60F0Wp2yzss0W6tg5js3qzPQLW4NXTBh7-x-x4W1Bg9dx4rfZsHW8cjxVv3mmND1N4K4NbKj1RmXW5Pnqt25Xn1dJW7_sSzL3tFVfmV_DKms7pQHqGW7DQ3vv3PZmYMW7HbnYk3qvghqW9460Px2C-QxDW4fThvV8VHskVW8M3xWk8HDDZSW2y5h088Zfp0tW18M-Ws8kLsVmW90N5Kz2Y4rnPW6tKt853ss1yVW1n91LC5NMnSdVH7d5v1lnMS6W6pkvsX7T9DYhW5t3KtJ6mDhkZW5NglJ36Lr1LDVFD0J11mT-Dq3brL1) of what Mark Meadows—Trump’s former chief of staff—and the rest of Trump’s inner circle were doing and saying before, during, and after the insurrection. That was made possible because of the committee’s hard work. There will undoubtedly be a lot more information to come.
##
With the hearing finally on the horizon, now is a good time to [remember Rep. Liz Cheney’s words](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VX9hXW22BsV-W68JH_-3T-DCrW1qZjFf4KGsMQMBB8TX3q90pV1-WJV7Cg-J7V8m0Mt6vCh1sVHFZq-9h0f5sW44SKmF2SN8mCW3TVMTM5TnVSNW7RQgdC5v-tFvW8FBp1_4k_Hl0W3YntNt27CL0JW7mrl1H72fZCRW1mWFy01ytlgmW1ff53H44v4-PW5xHZlM1fXXTmN7Zv2s-w75JZW2smZVS41qhN5W4K93b77F-CFZW7rNqF_63sxjLVmFLnv2_5Lz8W8nvLYs2Ql5cTW8qM6Mf8R57-tW5TdNpk20-xgwW4x9Dsv38bxm4Mw7NRZ9Vn-5W5C4RbV4mrKcRW3CGRwg6q5ZTcW4lTTrh5SW69-W32BvJZ4Gwq-1W7dBrLs7l-l0r3lk01) about why it is so important to hold accountable those who threaten our democracy.

clean_body: | Hello Friend, The House Jan. 6 Committee has been doing the nation a tremendous service by investigating the facts behind the Capitol insurrection. And on June 9, they’re going to be holding the first in a series of six public hearings to present answers to the American people. We deserve to know the answers to critical questions: What did Trump know about members of Congress’ plan to object to the results? What was he doing as rioters stormed the Capitol? Why did it take him more than three hours to respond to the attack? RAP has been following the committee’s investigation intently. Major events like longtime Trump aide Dan Scavino ignoring the committee’s subpoena show that the investigation has extended to the highest positions in the Trump administration. Even with the failure of many people to cooperate with the committee, new information and insights have already come to light. For example, RAP recently of what Mark Meadows—Trump’s former chief of staff—and the rest of Trump’s inner circle were doing and saying before, during, and after the insurrection. That was made possible because of the committee’s hard work. There will undoubtedly be a lot more information to come. With the hearing finally on the horizon, now is a good time to about why it is so important to hold accountable those who threaten our democracy. “Only a few generations have been granted the role of defending freedom in its hour of maximum danger,” Cheney said. “Today, that role is ours.” That goes for all of us. Sarah Longwell, Executive Director Republican Accountability Project | | | | | | | | Republican Accountability Project, 925 15th Street NW, Washington, DC 20005 PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.

name: Gary Sinise
subject: The National Memorial Day Parade is back
body:
It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6089%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=8VqtvgJlzOkAXwES7cY%2b7g&sysid=1)
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62732%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UDKQiOUR%2fA69H00IIfG65g&sysid=1)
---
Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like _Apollo 13_ and _The Green Mile_ -- but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in _Forrest Gump_. **This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. [**Fellow American, the National Memorial Day Parade is PRIMARILY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous Americans like you. Will you help chip in today to help support the Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62733%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GveSBJjmVJTRRS5C82HNeg&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62734%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XST88rvsi5AMUx2zdMZzzg&sysid=1)
---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62732%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UDKQiOUR%2fA69H00IIfG65g&sysid=1)
---
When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. **Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is _more important now than ever_ -- as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home.** [**Please make your most generous contribution of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, to support the National Memorial Day Parade and make it the tribute that our nation’s heroes deserve.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62745%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b3MMGYa2hYUxwAUW8q%2bofA&sysid=1)
---
[**Support the National Memorial Day Parade**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62734%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XST88rvsi5AMUx2zdMZzzg&sysid=1)
---
The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, _the entire parade_ costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! _That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event._ Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like:
* Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever.
* Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam.
* Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom.

---
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62732%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UDKQiOUR%2fA69H00IIfG65g&sysid=1)
---
[**Please join me in support of the National Memorial Day Parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, $250, $500, or more right now.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62746%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=l6EXp5sVCETKD9yB6Uzukw&sysid=1) But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you.

On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. _I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more._ Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- [**if you're able, make a gift to help fund the National Memorial Day Parade right now.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c62747%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Z0W68kI1jyr1sfq4ByhAAw&sysid=1)
---
Sincerely,

Gary Sinise
Honorary Grand Marshal
National Memorial Day Parade

clean_body: It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump. | | | Fellow American, It’s Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile -- but the role that changed my life, and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, was as Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump. This year, I’m honored to again serve as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. The National Memorial Day Parade is an event like no other ... and this year, the American Veterans Center is bringing it BACK in full force, with 5,000+ participants marching down Constitution Avenue before a crowd of 250,000+ in-person, as well as T.V. broadcast that reaches 100 million households around the country. When the American Veterans Center first called me more than 15 years ago and invited me to the National Memorial Day Parade, I was honored to join the event to remember our fallen heroes. The American Veterans Center revived the Parade in 2005 after it had been dormant for nearly 70 years. Now, in 2022, they’re bringing the Parade back to its full-scale glory after two years of pandemic precautions. Every American should be proud that generations of our brave servicemen and servicewomen, from the last of our “Greatest Generation” heroes of World War II to our veterans from Afghanistan and Iraq, will get the public thanks for their service that they deserve this year. But I know that the defenders and families of the fallen who will join me in the National Memorial Day Parade will be thinking of their friends and loved ones who made the ultimate sacrifice for our country -- the brave Americans we honor on Memorial Day. Sadly, our country is losing hundreds of World War II veterans each day, so the mission of the National Memorial Day Parade is more important now than ever -- as this year’s event may be the LAST opportunity for our WWII heroes to commemorate their friends who never came home. The National Memorial Day Parade costs a fraction of other major public events to put on each year. In fact, the entire parade costs about as much as just THREE balloons in the Macy’s Thanksgiving Day Parade or TWO floats in the Rose Bowl Parade! That means that every dollar that’s contributed by a generous American like you makes a difference for this important event. Your support of the American Veterans Center not only helps the Parade, but also supports great programs like: Record hundreds of oral histories of veterans from World War II to Today before we lose these stories forever. Hold our National Youth Summit which allows young students a chance to hear first-hand from veterans from WWII, Korea, and Vietnam. * Produce veteran focused T.V. documentaries and specials that remind Americans the price of our freedom. But no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day -- this year and every year -- please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in D.C. Visit a local veterans’ cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, but we can always do a little more. Fellow American, thank you for your support of America's heroes, and please -- Sincerely, Gary Sinise Honorary Grand Marshal National Memorial Day Parade | The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. | Bumping Debbie Stabenow’s message for you. She’s right — this race is critical to holding the House and we need your help to keep our momentum up — especially now that one of our opponents is already up on TV with a negative ad mischaracterizing Dan’s record!

Here’s the link to donate: **[https://go.dankildee.com/a/dan-debbie-2022](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45881239/347892122/-1680338188?amount=15&contactdata=zFt0arJ052yQ8G5rpgMX6UqGZ8GWRKTWkyvkp88tUbaz4MMZySpP9OVGZCMxFWS7WyAJsxzSCeYXcE4%2FKTAcVNQRFjGWXPANwVoS5F9drFEofU04Y7G2SllU9j3icEDVsWNARRh9SEPlE5bXwnadTA%3D%3D&refcode2=24e02c98-71df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_220529_1_7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUwMmM5OC03MWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yi06NddvkAAUj98woswCb2ZMsbHNtwV2Cx-EQvnhI4Q=)**

* * *
**_Debbie’s Original Message:_**

I’m not going to sugarcoat it: once again, Michigan is a make-it-or-break-it battleground state in November, and races like Dan Kildee's are going to determine control of Congress.

National Republicans like Trump are counting on our grassroots supporters being tuned out, but I know that isn’t the case.

_Michiganders are fired up and ready to win in these really tough races. Now, we just have to prove it._

**As one of the top races nationwide, Dan needs your help before our May budget deadline. He is up against a self-funding millionaire who is already running misleading ads against him.**

**[Please rush $15 today to stand with Dan.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45881240/347892123/-1680338188?amount=15&contactdata=zFt0arJ052yQ8G5rpgMX6UqGZ8GWRKTWkyvkp88tUbaz4MMZySpP9OVGZCMxFWS7WyAJsxzSCeYXcE4%2FKTAcVNQRFjGWXPANwVoS5F9drFEofU04Y7G2SllU9j3icEDVsWNARRh9SEPlE5bXwnadTA%3D%3D&refcode2=24e02c98-71df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&refcode=DK_EM_FR_3MO_220529_1_7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGUwMmM5OC03MWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Yi06NddvkAAUj98woswCb2ZMsbHNtwV2Cx-EQvnhI4Q=)**

Dan has always been a great colleague in Congress. We’ve worked together to pass legislation to support working Michigan families and the fact is, we need people like him to fight for us in Congress.

name: Tanisha Sullivan
subject: Make a difference today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Tanisha M
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45881313/347892370/-813958335?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTJmZmViZS03MWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XesVPqWsDAcqbZU-oc11Pdu1IUiqSMqefS08xgO5InE=)

Friend,
Here at Team Tanisha, we’re not just talking about women’s rights, LGBTQ rights, racial justice, immigrant rights, workers rights, and disability rights.
We’re fighting for them.
We’re making sure those voices are at the table.
We’re being intentional and intersectional with our movement.
We’re living in a time when a woman's right to choose is in peril. When Black people are killed while shopping for milk or praying in church, and AAPI people are attacked and mocked walking down the street.
We’re living in a time when our Latino brothers and sisters are questioned as to whether they belong here and our LGBTQ neighbors wonder if Marriage Equality and Transgender rights are next.
We’re living in a time when our grandparents are concerned about their retirement and working families wonder how to make ends meet...and still plan for their children’s future.
We’re living in a time when we really need our democracy to work...and it’s broken.
So as we pray for affected families and the nation, we need our government to act...with us.
Our democracy is under a coordinated attack and we need to be coordinated in fighting back.
When we fight together, we win together.
**If you are able, please contribute to our campaign to ensure that our voices -[the voices of ALL OF US - are represented in government.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45881314/347892371/-803204647?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTJmZmViZS03MWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XesVPqWsDAcqbZU-oc11Pdu1IUiqSMqefS08xgO5InE=)**
In Solidarity,
Tanisha Sullivan

\---

Boston, MA 02132
United States

Peter Willis,

Across the nation, our members are defending democracy by filing legal complaints against criminal insurrectionists — like Majorie Taylor Greene — to stop them from running for office ever again.

Now, a Federal appeals court judge has ruled that the Constitution is on our side — the 14th Amendment disqualifies insurrectionists who broke their oath of office from running for office. Period.

As Congress gets ready to hold hearings on the January 6th insurrection plot, we’re proving that regular people can stand up to defend our democracy – and win!

Peter Willis, unlike corporate Democrats— who are busy criticizing the January 6th committee when they aren’t attending fundraisers, we are in the trenches holding the insurrectionists accountable to the rule of law. name: Irene Lin
subject: It’s all about workers for Tom – and all about 💰 for Ron
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | I’m so proud to be standing with Tom in this fight because his message resonates with the majority of America: **It’s all about workers.**

Unfortunately, words aren’t always enough when we’re up against opponents like Ron Johnson who are _self-funding millions of dollars into their own campaigns._ Tom isn’t a multi-millionaire, meaning it’s up to our grassroots supporters to help us raise the funds we need to keep up.

[If everyone who reads this email donates _just $3_ , we’ll be able to reach our $12,000 goal by the end of the month. This goal is CRUCIAL to making sure we reach every corner of Wisconsin before Ron Johnson can, so please rush a donation to Tom’s campaign NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45881362/347892674/1808582475?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220529_1_4&refcode2=817aa0ff-71df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTdhYTBmZi03MWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e-C6DGeDv-_baIGN3kV8NDRwLZMZmzw8P-nM8SAAxmQ=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I'm worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
A recent poll has me down two points to an anti-choice Republican.
| | |
---
I'm worried, folks.
A recent poll has me down two points to an anti-choice Republican.
Here's why this is concerning:
1\. Roe v. Wade is on the verge of being overturned by SCOTUS. 2\. Democrats can't keep the majority without winning here in New Hampshire. 3\. Mitch McConnell is threatening a nationwide abortion ban if he becomes the Senate majority leader.
With reproductive rights under attack at the highest level of government, our best chance at protecting access to abortion is by protecting and expanding our pro-choice Senate majority.
But Mitch McConnell is targeting my race because every single one of my opponents would be a rubber-stamp for his anti-choice agenda.
**Putting it simply: What happens in New Hampshire could shape the course of our country for decades.**
[**So please, chip in $3 or whatever you can before our end-of-month deadline. Hey, I wanted to make sure you saw this message from my Finance Team. They are working overtime to deliver on this huge goal and we are running down the clock on making it happen. I'll keep this brief: we increased our budget for next month by $15,000 because we know Republicans are only getting started with their continued attacks on our rights and our safety, and we need to fight back. There's no better example of the GOP's dangerous extremism than their response to the shooting in Uvalde, Texas on Tuesday: to once again do nothing at all about gun violence. We have to go big if we want to stop them, keep the progress we've made AND fight for our progressive agenda. I believe we can do it, but we can't do it without your help. This deadline is urgent and we are counting on our grassroots supporters to back us up with our ambitious plans. Can you rush a donation ASAP so we can follow through? subject: In nine days, we take a stand.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgette Gómez for Assembly 2022 Special Election, #1443884
body:
https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
This has been a tough couple of weeks.
Working families are struggling to make ends meet, the Supreme Court is poised to overturn Roe v. Wade , and gun violence has rocked our nation once again.
It can be hard to stay motivated when the problems seem so overwhelming.
But here's what I promise: I will fight nonstop to give our working families relief payments to address the cost of gas, to expand affordable housing and public transportation, to pass laws that protect reproductive freedom for out-of-state travelers, and to make sure common-sense gun control is law.
My opponent is being supported by Big Oil, special interests, and the Republican party. His allegiances are clear. If we want change, he won't make it happen.
That's why I have to ask: will you help me and my campaign reach as many undecided voters as possible before Election Day by donating whatever you can? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_052922_NineDays]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_052922_NineDays [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_052922_NineDays]
Thank you!
-- Georgette
http://facebook.com/GeorgetteForAssembly [http://facebook.com/GeorgetteForAssembly] http://twitter.com/GomezForAD80 [http://twitter.com/GomezForAD80] https://georgettegomez.org/ [https://georgettegomez.org/]
A community organizer and the first LGBTQ Latina City Council President, Georgette Gómez has spent her life fighting for working families and underserved communities. And that’s who she’ll always fight for in the State Assembly — us.
Georgette is running for AD-80, but corporate PACs and special interests are pouring hundreds of thousands of dollars into attacking her. That's why the support of grassroots donors like you can make all the difference in this race.
Can you give now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/georgette_gomez_for_assembly_2022_special_election?refcode=X_Footer]
Paid for by Georgette Gómez for Assembly 2022 Special Election, #1443884
Georgette Gómez
5445 Madison Avenue
Sacramento, CA 95841
United States

body:

Friend, my campaign is close to ending May with a $4,147 shortfall - which is why I must ask you for $5.
Senate Republicans just failed the American people, again.
First, let me say this: I'm so grateful to count you as a member of this grassroots team. When people like you take action, it puts us in the best possible position to protect this must-win Senate seat.
I know you've stepped up before, but here's why I'm asking again: Now that Republican attacks against me are ramping up, hitting these fundraising goals matters more than ever. We are operating with the most tenuous possible control of the Senate - with absolutely zero margin for error - and Democratic control will vanish if we lose a single seat.
**Your donation could prevent us from ending the month with a fundraising shortfall.**
**Your donation will ensure we have the resources to combat GOP attacks.**
**Your donation will ensure we can WIN and protect Democratic Senate control.**
**But if more supporters don 't step up before midnight, we'll likely fall short.**
**[So please, before my end-of-month fundraising deadline, will you donate $5 or more to protect Connecticut's Democratic Senate seat and ensure control of the Senate stays out of the hands of Mitch McConnell?](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1188-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**

Dick

name: Mark Kelly
subject: my decision
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?refcode=em220529-1-7&refcode2=2933.6688874.EhX5ST&t=1&akid=2933%2E6688874%2EEhX5ST)
---
Friends —
I have about 15 minutes of free time in my schedule today. I know that doesn’t sound like a lot of time, but with a schedule like mine, I can assure you it’s a gift.
And while I know our campaign sends a lot of emails your way, I want to take a few of those minutes to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place — and why your support today is so important to our success.
The truth is: When Gabby and I first started talking about running, we weren’t sure what to expect. We knew that Arizona needed new leadership in the Senate — someone who would always put the people of our state first, who was willing to work across the aisle to deliver real results, and who would prioritize building bridges between the two parties — not burning them down.
We also knew we had some friends who would help us out. But when you’re talking about such a big campaign, we realized we’d need support from a lot of people we hadn’t met yet as well. Especially since I was making the decision to reject corporate PAC money.
You know the rest... We won in 2020 in large part because we ran the biggest grassroots campaign Arizona has ever seen.
But now we have a new mission: re-election.
Not too long ago, the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) dumped $1,000,000 in attack ads against me on TV in Arizona. They’re spending it all in ONE WEEK with plans to spend $8,000,000 more — that’s the most significant sum of money anybody has dropped against us so far in this campaign.
If they are willing to spend this much against us without an opponent I can only imagine how much more they will pour into this race once we do have one.
That’s why we have to be prepared now for whatever they’re planning to throw at us next. So please, I’m humbly asking:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to my re-election campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona? The amount you give isn’t as important as the number of donations we receive. Because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?refcode=em220529-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2933_6688874_EhX5ST&akid=2933%2E6688874%2EEhX5ST)

name: Mayor Justin Bibb (via NanWhaley.com)
subject: I want to tell you about my friend Nan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Whaley/Stephens
body:
As mayor of Cleveland, I know firsthand the challenges that our state is facing – the same challenges that Nan faced as mayor of Dayton.

Team,

**I want to tell you about my friend Nan Whaley.**

As mayor of Cleveland, I know firsthand the challenges that our state is facing – the same challenges that Nan faced as mayor of Dayton.

From COVID-19 to the opioid epidemic to falling paychecks and rising costs, Ohio has faced tough times in recent years – and Mike DeWine and his Republican allies have done little to help, too often caving to extremists on the issues that matter most.

**[I’m backing Nan Whaley for governor of Ohio – because I know that she has the experience and the drive to make our state better and ensure that our government works for all. I hope you’ll join me and pitch in to her campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45882137/347895776/-1664405127?refcode=nw_em_220529_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjkzYzY1ZC03NmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ugws0I7mvrSLdqbW-P7XRHc2uxUjNp6F7mtYDM77VAc=)**

I know what it’s like to grow up in a working class family in Ohio. Too many families like mine have had to choose between paying rent and tuition, or between putting food on the table and purchasing life-saving medication.

**Nan knows too.** Nan learned the value of hard work, strength, and resilience at a young age from her parents, and moved to Ohio for the opportunities our state once boasted.

Nan and I both know that Ohio can become that state again – that elected officials, community leaders, and business leaders can work together to lead a comeback for Ohio and make our state a place where people move for a better life.

But that future isn’t possible under Mike DeWine, not when he and his friends are more focused on how to profit at taxpayers’ expense than on how to help working families.

**[Ohio deserves better than current leadership – and I know that Nan can make that happen. Please, join me in supporting Nan Whaley for Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45882138/347895777/-1664405127?refcode=nw_em_220529_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZjkzYzY1ZC03NmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ugws0I7mvrSLdqbW-P7XRHc2uxUjNp6F7mtYDM77VAc=)**

Thank you,

Justin Bibb
Mayor of Cleveland

subject: I know, it’s a lot!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Putorti for Congress
body:
Elise Stefanik has been in the headlines non-stop this month.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45882140/347895808/-1336798533?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220529-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTg5ZThjYS03NmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bTAUsPOz3wPTf_zcrj1MzYXNOWs_9sbJdrGAugGkCOY=)

| [_**In a moment, I will ask you to please contribute to my campaign before our May deadline**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45882141/347895809/-1336798533?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220529-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTg5ZThjYS03NmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bTAUsPOz3wPTf_zcrj1MzYXNOWs_9sbJdrGAugGkCOY=). But first, I wanted to reach out personally to give you an update on all of the recent developments in our race.

Elise Stefanik has been in the headlines non-stop this month, claiming she’s proud to be “ultra-MAGA” before proving her MAGA credentials by leaning into QAnon conspiracy theories and doubling down on her campaign ads promoting the same “replacement theory” that inspired violence in our state.

Yeah, I know, it’s a lot!

**If all that wasn’t enough, CNN is reporting that the buzz at Mar-a-Lago is that Donald Trump is seriously considering making Stefanik his running mate in 2024.**

_Suddenly Stefanik’s decision to up the ante on her deplorable behavior in recent weeks makes more sense._

And if all that isn’t bad enough, Stefanik and Trump are teaming up next week for a fundraiser where tickets go as high as $25,000.

_**But here’s the good news: the new district maps were released last week, and Elise Stefanik is more vulnerable than ever given how extreme she has become. This race is winnable if we have the resources to compete.**_

I’ll be honest, I don’t have the connections to raise as much as Stefanik has. Instead, I’m relying on folks like you to give what you can. [_**Will you please ensure that we have the resources to stop Stefanik at the ballot box this November by pitching in $10 or $25 today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45882142/347895810/-1336798533?refcode=BLU-PUT-20220529-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTEwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTg5ZThjYS03NmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bTAUsPOz3wPTf_zcrj1MzYXNOWs_9sbJdrGAugGkCOY=)

clean_body: Elise Stefanik has been in the headlines non-stop this month. | = | =. But first, I wanted to reach out personally to give you an update on all of the recent developments in our race. Elise Stefanik has been in the headlines non-stop this month, claiming she’s proud to be “ultra-MAGA” before proving her MAGA credentials by leaning into QAnon conspiracy theories and doubling down on her campaign ads promoting the same “replacement theory” that inspired violence in our state. Yeah, I know, it’s a lot! If all that wasn’t enough, CNN is reporting that the buzz at Mar-a-Lago is that Donald Trump is seriously considering making Stefanik his running mate in 2024. Suddenly Stefanik’s decision to up the ante on her deplorable behavior in recent weeks makes more sense. And if all that isn’t bad enough, Stefanik and Trump are teaming up next week for a fundraiser where tickets go as high as $25,000. But here’s the good news: the new district maps were released last week, and Elise Stefanik is more vulnerable than ever given how extreme she has become. This race is winnable if we have the resources to compete. I’ll be honest, I don’t have the connections to raise as much as Stefanik has. name: Mckayla Wilkes
subject: We could lead the country
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE
body:
| | | Team, Every day, I watch in awe all of the incredible people in our district making change that matters. People like Dominique who work hard day in and day out as a teacher. Folks like DeJuan who start organizations dedicated to providing opportunities to keep our youth educated, employed, and off the streets. And inspirational leaders like Qiana who make sure that formerly incarcerated people have the opportunities they need when they re-enter society . **Simply put: The people in Maryland’s 5th District are a guiding light for our whole country.** We should have a Representative who helps us shine a light on the good and help lead the fight for justice for our country. Fighting for our district is a tremendous and critical undertaking – and I need to know that I’ve got your support. **[_Will you pitch in a donation before our End-of-Month Fundraising Deadline and help keep our momentum going strong?_ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zFAc3Wx6QcT5KV8XYmGwPOsfdjWYdpLKaxpKfODMffDFOElJGhT1LQykUxDqyTQnPgkVDIz2jzUwCPJ7jJOTMFKIMpl4mVVVlOnTuNsrtVah0XXlzgVbbpTHT51fLbNWUYdd1ODTC2u9QjeEhVg4uHvSzEPCsEjvCk5rRImp-p8gC5DMh31KknOKvMJuaygWHn5W9SOasArWK3lQDQjKeNWWaaHjH6rFfOR5k6j0FoHZ5puTH3u6cxrDgKGYVBAl_J9W8IQzrioO733SiEd2mWfFbNEH2ln6MrHprCqOisZVAVuS10ZcHujldtj4NY2VPinSbrsF8viUyaz5skeltQeP5oEpeI_54eyyx02G9kUg/3mg/AAo5cPUrSe6sR4Sz5UhoVQ/h0/6A3tzypH_-89HuUS-Ks2aoThVJoac08PJSwxNmuQCRE)** In the past few weeks, I’ve been meeting with voters across the district. It has affirmed everything I believe about the people who live here, the people I grew up with. We believe in justice – and we believe that we can’t wait around forever to see it through. We want health care free at the point of use, we want actions to address the climate crisis, and we want an end to mass incarceration. That’s what we’re willing to fight for every single day and that’s why I need you in my corner to keep this fight going and turn our beliefs into reality. **[_If you’re ready to fight with all we’ve got for our values, I’m asking for your support right now. Add your donation today below:_ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zFAc3Wx6QcT5KV8XYmGwPOsfdjWYdpLKaxpKfODMffDIJO0e4eeKGlVG6Hn_jgB8rZ8BQ4455hVa0m_cqwC0ONTJel70E137WmHgN45sbiudpUMXOSkxuXlQTO9v9C8QbLGuI_uMz_7HyDKZAC2PsfkcIVxajFgWorN42_PcoX12oYWNY8IMWqFIYtuB4yg1XLtkK7Z551ekq3ZbCsUIRoovH2mrftYPaLDO9O2DQnxaXcgxVWQUyYDOYLO1WuaSh0lgz8Ys27Y81eU8B6sMqqHhkZ_y4rJZN1DSKUE7B0i3zZICw8aPCxO7bAIyjmcINzXNo-SYIH7VZO424MCYhEXH5t5WvEcOxHUt3jmS-Zmg/3mg/AAo5cPUrSe6sR4Sz5UhoVQ/h1/t9SSwaoooUb56g9rFfer8gWuAx9RNj-aqaxTcu2avAE)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zFAc3Wx6QcT5KV8XYmGwPOp5Z1JRPZU6y-H3qqhHoz_BeMKz2AQdlkELJ-YeQKc5BcGhjdtzHbEKDyj-nfZqt8XISM4D6SaB_dv4rh-f1Oz0kSXE9Sx8kDYNCVDZqyEr25cqh5GqzHKATiiGpRd1zWgOXFbOiy9sLdiAYa_oMbt8OxxNl9xj6EiggtyRFxKHlgcerJRwCfRijp-FO5FQp7QT8FeSo818zA5lbWlDb6k-PQzfHJBn7Bp_a7__0wwFtRq7k1KqDiqoJbECfezyjG0_HHKN4xSlSWDfO1FpImUgsSBclfEFsLx6Hny0uE-CbV8p8YL7CNWFzn4eZrYcq71xGcSIugmvSvDNxo7jGQoBXUTdWOXUbYrT8G6g_pbns/3mg/AAo5cPUrSe6sR4Sz5UhoVQ/h2/7dMriQ_whnGJwDAaXR1hsbg8wLgYjSkqonGEq_aTIMw)

clean_body: | | | Team, Every day, I watch in awe all of the incredible people in our district making change that matters. People like Dominique who work hard day in and day out as a teacher. Folks like DeJuan who start organizations dedicated to providing opportunities to keep our youth educated, employed, and off the streets. And inspirational leaders like Qiana who make sure that formerly incarcerated people have the opportunities they need when they re-enter society . Simply put: The people in Maryland’s 5th District are a guiding light for our whole country. We should have a Representative who helps us shine a light on the good and help lead the fight for justice for our country. Fighting for our district is a tremendous and critical undertaking – and I need to know that I’ve got your support. In the past few weeks, I’ve been meeting with voters across the district. It has affirmed everything I believe about the people who live here, the people I grew up with. We believe in justice – and we believe that we can’t wait around forever to see it through. We want health care free at the point of use, we want actions to address the climate crisis, and we want an end to mass incarceration. That’s what we’re willing to fight for every single day and that’s why I need you in my corner to keep this fight going and turn our beliefs into reality. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | Thank you for all your support so far, Mckayla PAID FOR BY MCKAYLA 2022 AND PROUDLY POWERED BY THE PEOPLE mckaylawilkes.com | "Privacy Policy" Mckayla 2022 P.O.
