name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Antifa leftists arrested
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480856:6qV0RnoNY:m:1:3253819041:675213553E6EC4EA755FBC6688CFE6B4:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America 's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America 's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480856:6qV0RnoNY:m:1:3253819041:675213553E6EC4EA755FBC6688CFE6B4:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480856:6qV0RnoNY:m:1:3253819041:675213553E6EC4EA755FBC6688CFE6B4:r) Peter, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America 's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480856:6qV0RnoNY:m:1:3253819041:675213553E6EC4EA755FBC6688CFE6B4:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480856:6qV0RnoNY:m:1:3253819041:675213553E6EC4EA755FBC6688CFE6B4:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480856:6qV0RnoNY:m:1:3253819041:675213553E6EC4EA755FBC6688CFE6B4:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480857:6qV0RnoNY:m:1:3253819041:675213553E6EC4EA755FBC6688CFE6B4:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480858:6qV0RnoNY:m:1:3253819041:675213553E6EC4EA755FBC6688CFE6B4:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480859:6qV0RnoNY:m:1:3253819041:675213553E6EC4EA755FBC6688CFE6B4:r)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480860:6qV0RnoNY:m:1:3253819041:675213553E6EC4EA755FBC6688CFE6B4:r)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480861:6qV0RnoNY:m:1:3253819041:675213553E6EC4EA755FBC6688CFE6B4:r) **

name: Max Steiner
subject: LaMalfa finally spoke about gun violence. It's as bad as you imagined.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45885967/347916013/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTVkZjJmMC05MGRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HKrzuawOSCyhhvo0WqXO1QLVEc9fbufKT4RMRPbj1z4=)
Friend,

A CD-1 voter recently wrote to Rep. LaMalfa about gun violence in America. She forwarded to me the email she received in response. It is a brain-dead mishmash of empty platitudes. I've been critical of LaMalfa's cowardly silence on this issue: he has said nothing about guns on either Facebook or Twitter since the May 14th shooting in Buffalo or the shooting in Uvalde this week. However, after reading his email, I can understand why he has kept his 'thoughts" to himself.

The maxim "Better to be thought a fool than to open your mouth and remove all doubt" definitely applies to LaMalfa's views on gun violence.

I've included his full response at the bottom of this email.

In the very first paragraph, LaMalfa tries to deflect from Buffalo and Uvalde. Instead of confronting his constituent's concerns about "gun violence," he switches to "violence" in general. It is transparently dishonest.

But that's just the first paragraph! LaMalfa goes on to say that "regardless of how strictly we write our laws, criminals will always be able to acquire weapons." Is LaMalfa proposing that we not have any laws, because SOME criminals will surely break them? For someone who professes to care about "law and order" so much, that is a very strange stance to take.

Then there's the inevitable GOP pivot to mental health. To be clear, LaMalfa does not want to do anything about either mental health or gun violence. He claims that he wants to increase mental health funding, but this bald-faced lie is contradicted by his voting record. He writes that he wants "to provide additional tools to local law enforcement to ensure more effective treatment for the individuals with mental health conditions." This coded misuse of simple English is what turns so many voters off politics: LaMalfa isn't interested in "fixing" anyone. He simply wants to make it easier for cops to lock people up under the guise of "mental health" concerns.

LaMalfa's second pivot is to criticism of "soft-on-crime" policies (which clashes with his earlier dismissal of stricter gun laws), early release (even though the shooter had never been jailed or imprisoned), and porous borders (even though the shooter was born in the U.S.). It's a trifecta of misdirection and is even more moronic than the current GOP push for "more locked doors."

The fact is, we do need to give Law Enforcement more tools for keeping guns out of the hands of mentally-ill individuals. We do need "red flag" laws that allow a judge to authorize the temporary seizure of weapons whenever there is a reasonable fear that a crime is about to be committed. We do need better-integrated reporting systems and better tip lines for family members, friends, and strangers on the internet who want to report problematic comments. These reporting systems and tip lines would allow us to bar individuals from buying or holding weapons pending mental health evaluation or treatment. LaMalfa, however, wants none of this. LaMalfa answers to the NRA rather than to his voters, and the NRA wants to sell as many guns as possible to as many buyers as possible.

Most Democrats want an assault weapon ban and are upset that I have a different opinion on this issue. (Yes, I do read the many emails I have received on the topic.) We disagree on one piece of the solution to the problem of gun violence in America, but we do agree that there is a problem and that the federal government has a role to play in making us safer. I want to reduce gun violence. I have concrete proposals for how to reduce gun violence. LaMalfa does not.

LaMalfa is an overpaid coward who talks tough but does nothing. Just like the overpaid cowards in the Uvalde Police Department, he and the GOP always have an excuse for "waiting."

I value your opinions, and I would appreciate your vote.

Max
---

And team, it’s going to be an uphill battle. House Republicans' main super PAC placed an $8.1 million ad reservation in Arizona with Tom as one of the targets. Not to mention that Roll Call and National Journal both just ranked Tom as the most vulnerable House Democrat up for reelection. With this tough race and MAGA Republicans pouring in money, it’s more important than ever that we meet our May budget goal, but we’re still = short with just two days left. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = JoAnna Campaign Manager Tom O’Halleran for Congress Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. Hi Peter, it’s Dana Balter. In 2018, I came _extremely_ close to flipping a GOP seat from red to blue.

Now, we have another golden opportunity in Upstate New York with my friend, Josh Riley, in the newly-drawn 19th Congressional District.

There’s a lot at stake on the ballot in November. Democrats can defend the House majority with the right candidates. I know that Josh Riley has the dedication, values, and experience to win this race and deliver for communities across Upstate New York.

But, Josh’s new district was JUST named a tossup seat by the _Cook Political Report_ , and he’s up against his first fundraising deadline since getting drawn into this competitive seat.

[_**So, I’m personally reaching out before his May end-of-month deadline — can you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help his team hit their $12,000 goal?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45886116/347916510/-1015964469?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20220529-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWUwYzgzMi05MmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dN17p7z1tXOfXBeQl5bT3qHzB3tjjir-h0RSbBU5ax8=)

| | Dear Peter, Steven is excited to be out on the campaign trail, talking with voters and sharing our vision for a new, more inclusive kind of politics. Music has been an incredible way to connect with community members in Stevens Point, Green Bay, Dunn County, and beyond. Steven grew up playing in diverse bands, giving him the opportunity to learn about and build community with people from all different backgrounds, bridging racial, cultural, and political divides. These experiences became fundamental to his politics: when you create open spaces rooted in dignity, respect, and empathy, you can achieve more dynamic and creative art and public policy. As a campaign, we are investing in people and building a grassroots movement. Please contribute today to help bridge the divides in our politics.

clean_body: Support the Singing Senator and our campaign to make government work for all of us. | | | | | Dear Peter, Steven is excited to be out on the campaign trail, talking with voters and sharing our vision for a new, more inclusive kind of politics. Music has been an incredible way to connect with community members in Stevens Point, Green Bay, Dunn County, and beyond. Steven grew up playing in diverse bands, giving him the opportunity to learn about and build community with people from all different backgrounds, bridging racial, cultural, and political divides. These experiences became fundamental to his politics: when you create open spaces rooted in dignity, respect, and empathy, you can achieve more dynamic and creative art and public policy. As a campaign, we are investing in people and building a grassroots movement. Please contribute today to help bridge the divides in our politics. | | = | | | = | | | = | | | = | | | = | | | = | | | As always, we’re deeply grateful for your support and wish you and your family all the best in 2022 and always. \- Team Olikara Songs will be performed virtually or in-person. | | | This is a movement to build a more inclusive, honest, and kind form of politics, and we need your help to continue reaching more people throughout the state.** = | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Olikara for Senate P.O. Box 510216 Milwaukee, WI 53203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

Let’s turn our outrage into action.
#
Peter,
This week, rocked by the news of a devastating shooting at an elementary school in Texas, folks across the country have been lifting their voices in support of urgent action on gun safety.
Everytown for Gun Safety is one of the organizations leading the charge – and today, I am asking my supporters to make a difference by **[contributing $5 to this movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45886325/347917600/-988856866?refcode=dd_em_220529_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjA0ZTI1Ni05MmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6SRb-shpCLpxXUpy5SSRrZbOwEifQu9pmT4PdpEofK4=)**
Tragically, school shootings like the one in Uvalde have become far too commonplace in today’s America. Parents should not have to worry in the carpool line if they will see their children at the end of the day. We cannot become numb to this reality.
It is essential that we support Everytown in their efforts to demand more than thoughts and prayers and end the scourge of gun violence for good. Let’s turn our outrage into action.
**[Please donate $5 now and join Everytown in the fight for common sense gun reform.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45886326/347917601/-988856866?refcode=dd_em_220529_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YjA0ZTI1Ni05MmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6SRb-shpCLpxXUpy5SSRrZbOwEifQu9pmT4PdpEofK4=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

clean_body: Our campaign is being outraised by our opponent, and we need your help to pick up the pace. Our campaign is being outraised by our opponent, and we need your help to pick up the pace. | Fellow American, We were just reviewing a campaign update that our finance team sent over, and we wanted to personally follow up with you. Our Democrat opponent in the Georgia Senate race is off to a record-breaking fundraising pace, and he already has $23 MILLION in his war chest. If 450 new grassroots supporters will chip in just $3 right now, it will give our conservative campaign the boost it needs to WIN! I entered this Senate race because our country is going in the wrong direction. The costs of food and gasoline are skyrocketing. Brazen criminals are on smash-and-grab crime sprees in cities across the country. We've got to get this country back on the right track. The Democrats are determined to defeat our campaign because they know if Republicans WIN in Georgia - we'll WIN BACK the Senate majority and STOP the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer agenda. So how about it? Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? clean_body: Where we stand against Evers’ war chest ahead of the May deadline. | Friend, Tony Evers is sitting on a war chest the likes of which Wisconsin has never seen before... He bragged that his $10 million cash on hand was TRIPLE what Governor Walker had at the same point in his last reelection bid. And that doesn’t even include the $75 million the DGA is offering up to try and buy this race for Evers amidst his disastrous polling numbers. As much as I hate to admit it, this battleground governor’s race may come down to fundraising. With our most important end-of-month deadline to date right around the corner, we simply can’t come up short. As if it weren’t enough that we already have to contend with Evers’ war chest and the DGA’s $75 million, we’re also public enemy #1 to Evers’ pals in the Madison swamp. The very same cronies that Governor Walker and I fought back against for 8 years to put YOU first are now terrified that I can and will defeat their favorite liberal puppet. But just like the radical Left, they know money will have a huge impact on this race. If we can keep pace Friend, you have my word, we will take back Wisconsin for conservatives. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Alex Padilla
subject: quick note
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
I know your time is valuable, so I’ll keep this quick.

Hey there, I know your time is valuable, so I’ll keep this quick.
We’re closing the books on our May fundraising goal in two days, and our fundraising has slowed down a bit because of the holiday weekend.
That’s not a surprise, but it is something that we cannot afford right now when the primary is days away — and with it the start of our general election.
So we’re trying to make up some ground today, and I’m hoping some of our top supporters can step up now to chip in $5 and get us on track. Can you be one of them? You can use this link:
[**https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/May-Fundraising-Deadline**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may22?refcode=em220529-1-30&t=1&refcode2=821_159979_jhdlL9&akid=821%2E159979%2EjhdlL9)
Thank you for all you do to support our movement. People like you coming together to fight -- that’s how we will hold this seat and win the fight to make real change in the U.S. Senate.
I know it can be tough and frustrating at times, but I’m not giving up or backing down. This moment is too urgent for us to fail, so I hope you’ll keep up the fight too.
Thank you,
Alex
**[DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may22?refcode=em220529-1-30&t=2&refcode2=821_159979_jhdlL9&akid=821%2E159979%2EjhdlL9)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=821%2E159979%2EjhdlL9)

Dear Friend,

This month has been rough for our nation. We've seen so much heartbreak: horrific gun violence and immanent threats to our voting and abortion rights. It's hard to know what actions to take next.

But at Keystone Progress, we know the only way to make a difference is by growing our progressive movement. In coalition with community members, we are leading the way in Pennsylvania, focusing on amplifying progressive efforts to unseat politicians who are dead set on destroying our democracy.

Stand with us today.

We have only three days left to meet our end-of-month deadline. Please donate to support a progressive Pennsylvania.

_**Marjorie Taylor Greene Says Joining Military is 'Throwing Your Life Away'**_ Hi, it's Marcus Flowers, Democrat and Army Veteran running for Congress against Marjorie Taylor Greene. My opponent, Marjorie Taylor Greene, just said that joining the military is "throwing your life away." **Really? I proudly served this country overseas on multiple continents --****_protecting the democracy and freedoms that you and your radical-right cronies are trying to destroy from within!_** It’s mind-boggling that someone who calls herself a “patriot” can be so brazenly disrespectful to the over 600,000 veterans across Georgia (including me) who know what it means to put service above self. **You have my word: When I defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and am elected to Congress I will ALWAYS have the backs of our brave men and women in uniform.** [**Will you support my campaign to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene with a Democratic veteran who will stand up for our democracy by DONATING today? name: Jenny Delwood, Campaign Manager
subject: Caruso: $37.5 million down the drain.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Hello, I have three important updates for you:
1. Rick Caruso has already spent $37.5 MILLION of his own personal funds to buy the race for Los Angeles mayor.

2. An _LA Times_ poll showed this race is neck-and-neck. Caruso's spending is not only jaw-dropping — it's actually helping him climb in the polls.

3. We made a tough budget call a few weeks ago to go up on TV. By going up on the air, we're sharing Karen's vision for L.A. to help get out the vote before the primary.

I'm going to level with you: we took a huge risk placing that TV buy. TV ads are expensive, especially in Los Angeles. So to make sure we can keep our ads running through the primary, we set a goal of raising $50,000 before Tuesday's end-of-month deadline.

**[Team, will you donate to help us fight back against Caruso's spending and keep our ads up on the air? Chip in whatever you can before Tuesday's end-of-month deadline — our final end-of-month deadline before the primary — to ensure Karen comes out on top!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45886688/347919435/-1030761386?ms=em22_220529_eom1_fndd_gq_act___JD_ettx&refcode=em22_220529_eom1_fndd_gq_act___JD_ettx&source=em22_220529_eom1_fndd_gq_act___JD_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220529_eom1_fndd_gq_act___JD_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=OO1OyQzRwhf8dmpRyU7GKxHa6YyS1y%2FgWoWgb8GoSkOCye0DlNRrzcMLmtyPOJNSRAO%2F3Jiz%2FZE4r7n5zdVnGCwzxG1mhTUvD7siUaXyoYR2%2BX2%2FacR%2Bgy7f1qec2qzoBGCuNUgomy6jDxdyQYtVAA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS85NDYxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWI1ZjIzNy05N2RmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E16eTwMCl35MvBiXxOpLD5IBWljkJKlfnajoo_b1xy0=&emci=561e3e78-f7dd-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=a1b5f237-97df-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=2429742)**

clean_body: Hi Peter, I just wanted to uplift this message from my team yesterday. Since launching in January, our campaign has built so much momentum – we are truly building something special together. Hi Peter, I just wanted to uplift this message from my team yesterday. Since launching in January, our campaign has built so much momentum – we are truly building something special together. Grassroots donors like Chris, Paul, and Janet are the backbone of this campaign, and I couldn’t be more grateful. But I am going to need your support every step of the way, so I’m asking you to step up to help us hit our end-of-month goal by chipping in now. You can use this secure link: = Thank you, Emilia \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Emili <info@emiliasykesforcongress.com> Date: Saturday, May 28, 2022 at 3:12 PM Subject: Thank you, Paul, Janet, and Peter To: Peter <dpwillis67@gmail.com> = Peter, Since the day Emilia launched her campaign, she has been committed to building a grassroots movement that reflects the values and priorities of Northeast Ohioans. Everything we do – every door we knock, every ad we air, and every voter we reach – is because of the support of this grassroots team, which is why we wanted to take a moment to thank Paul in Akron, Janet in Hubbard, and Chris in Warren for chipping in! Thank you! = We still need to raise $15,505 before Tuesday at midnight to ensure we’re in the best position possible to counter every attack our MAGA Republican opponent will throw our way. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Thank you, – Everyone at Emilia HQ A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change. name: Team Cora via CoraForMontana.com
subject: Here’s what voters are saying about Cora:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cora for Montana
body:
See what voters across our district are saying about Cora in local Montana papers | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45886836/347920319/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTcyYzVlOS05OWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fofQtp1BIJzrITag4ZwN5GY3MtrWfzRTiFZIZdzjOfM=) Friend, As we close in on Election Day, we’ve noticed that papers like _The Missoulian_ are running a number of letters to the editor from folks expressing who they plan to support on June 7th. Quite a few local endorsements for Cora’s campaign have made it to print! Here are some of the highlights – straight from the pages: | | “**Cora Neumann has a track record of delivering results for Montana** , particularly for individuals and communities lacking access to critical services and supplies.” -Dawn M. “Cora Neumann will guide our future by science, reason, and knowledge. Her passion and life’s work of bringing people together to find science based solutions makes her **the right choice for Montana.** ” -Karen W. “**Cora Neumann represents my first choice** to oppose a further embarrassing stain on Montana that the election of the deeply-corrupt Ryan Zinke would represent.” -Chris L. “I have worked for and with many elected officials over my 40 plus years in public service. **I see a true champion for our Montana values in Cora Neumann.** ” -Tim L.
---
We’re humbled to have made a positive impression on these voters, and it’s not just Dawn, Karen, Chris, and Tim who are excited to elect Cora. We’ve met with _hundreds_ of voters across our community who are fed up with the status quo and ready to build a better future for Montana.
**Our challenge now is making sure folks know Cora is the viable Democrat challenging Zinke. That's how we win, and it’s why your support is so important in these final days.**
We’re continuing spreading the word – in mailboxes, via digital ads, and TV. We’re even meeting face-to-face with friends and neighbors about the importance of this race, but we still need your support.

**[Will you contribute $3 to help us win this seat? Sending a donation now will help us reach our end-of-month goal and give us time to use your dollars when they’re needed most.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45886837/347920320/-10092236?refcode=em-5.29.22-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTcyYzVlOS05OWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fofQtp1BIJzrITag4ZwN5GY3MtrWfzRTiFZIZdzjOfM=)**

clean_body: See what voters across our district are saying about Cora in local Montana papers | = Friend, As we close in on Election Day, we’ve noticed that papers like The Missoulian are running a number of letters to the editor from folks expressing who they plan to support on June 7th. Quite a few local endorsements for Cora’s campaign have made it to print! Here are some of the highlights – straight from the pages: | | “Cora Neumann has a track record of delivering results for Montana , particularly for individuals and communities lacking access to critical services and supplies.” -Dawn M. “Cora Neumann will guide our future by science, reason, and knowledge. Her passion and life’s work of bringing people together to find science based solutions makes her the right choice for Montana. ” -Karen W. “Cora Neumann represents my first choice to oppose a further embarrassing stain on Montana that the election of the deeply-corrupt Ryan Zinke would represent.” -Chris L. “I have worked for and with many elected officials over my 40 plus years in public service. I see a true champion for our Montana values in Cora Neumann. ” -Tim L. We’re humbled to have made a positive impression on these voters, and it’s not just Dawn, Karen, Chris, and Tim who are excited to elect Cora. We’ve met with hundreds of voters across our community who are fed up with the status quo and ready to build a better future for Montana. Our challenge now is making sure folks know Cora is the viable Democrat challenging Zinke. That's how we win, and it’s why your support is so important in these final days. We’re continuing spreading the word – in mailboxes, via digital ads, and TV. We’re even meeting face-to-face with friends and neighbors about the importance of this race, but we still need your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks in advance, Team Cora = Paid for by Cora for Montana Cora Neumann is a public health and economic development expert running for Congress in Montana's new 1st Congressional District. To learn more about Cora, visit her website Consider supporting Cora's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . | | Hey there Peter, We’ve been overwhelmed with gratitude since our victory in the primary election. Thanks to your support, we proved that Western North Carolina was tired of Madison Cawthorn’s reckless antics – and that a gay woman _can_ win in the South. Now, Jasmine will face off against Republican Chuck Edwards in November. Although he isn’t in the national spotlight, Edwards’ brand of politics is no better than Cawthorn’s. He refuses to call January 6th an insurrection, is anti-choice, and won his primary thanks to loads of dark money and by using the divisive and dirty political tactics that prevent us from moving forward. Jasmine is the exact opposite of Edwards. She has a plan to unite WNC with a different kind of politics guided by love, hope, and empathy – but she can’t do it alone. There are still thousands of voters across the district that we have to reach with Jasmine’s message. Since Edwards secured the Republican nomination, Jasmine has been closing the gap with him. Now, thanks to supporters like you, the margin is within single digits. This is the closest poll of the race, but this surge in support could slip away from us unless we maintain our fundraising. , Early voting for the June 14th primary starts THIS WEEK! Our team has been hard at work finalizing our GOTV plans, and I'm headed out the door to meet with voters-- I only have a minute to send this message. I just spoke with my campaign team, and we're closing in on our fundraising goal for this period. We've been preparing for this moment for months, and I'm so grateful to you and all of #TeamMia for getting us this far. We can't come up short now; doing so would force us to cut critical funding to our voter contact efforts in these final days before the primary. **[Can I count on you to pitch in before our internal deadline tomorrow? clean_body: Early voting for the June 14th primary starts THIS WEEK! | | , Early voting for the June 14th primary starts THIS WEEK! Our team has been hard at work finalizing our GOTV plans, and I'm headed out the door to meet with voters-- I only have a minute to send this message. I just spoke with my campaign team, and we're closing in on our fundraising goal for this period. We've been preparing for this moment for months, and I'm so grateful to you and all of #TeamMia for getting us this far. We can't come up short now; doing so would force us to cut critical funding to our voter contact efforts in these final days before the primary. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: You know we wouldn't ask if it wasn't so important. Grassroots contributions from folks like you are what make our voter outreach possible. With gratitude, Heidi Mia for SC About Senator Mia McLeod: Senator Mia McLeod is a working mom, small business owner, and seventh-generation South Carolinian from Bennettsville, South Carolina. # Would teachers with guns keep school children safe?
|
---
[ ](https://83nr6.r.a.d.sendibm1.com/mk/cl/f/nMGVvizK_a0uSG8iV68xwlpVXAsi310ozhds2_49gPQiz4OVrm14FqO92CHQSWMHtCeSvkcM-QvJufHG1gIgy_do_NrnwjiQO-xmYcqCmR-8YRv92criq7wGOFO43FzhGJjHLGNpao6JZ-6ubHI8CyGtD5TKRXnu7NZtmDXCRTQ_Cvlh-CAq3Z5R6H7UFSvemFgKzFjKyGiuvTgtz2MyfxAg1HPQ0JY9u-fAZL9JDYF6aj0e-gOpYSbO9-ucF0uPtxzly_O2BxT4otpG4m7Lm4TEBFEP_xzRFnL2amdGP9vqpLvk3AV19YIo-UAlPlY9K1AQ)

|
---
In this weeks episode of the Freedom Corner Podcast, Rep. Dana Criswell outlines three suggestions that would keep school children safe.
* Lock School Doors - this is an easy step but sometimes the simple steps are the most important.
* School Resource Officers - School Resource Officers are law enforcement officers who are assigned to protect schools. The state of Mississippi will help pay the officer's salary through the MCOPs program.
* Arm Teachers - School boards and the local sheriff should design a training program for teachers who volunteered to carry a gun in school.

No new laws need to be created and passed. Local communities, parents and teachers must demand these simple steps are taken to protect our schools.

name: CJ Grover, Campaign Manager
subject: Important Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Did you see our team’s last note? We’re quickly approaching the end of May, and we’re still shy of our monthly fundraising goal. And we can’t stress t| | |
---
| | Friend, Did you see our team’s last note? We’re quickly approaching the end of May, and we’re still shy of our monthly fundraising goal. And we can’t stress this enough - you’ve probably seen all of the ads on television from Laura Kelly’s campaign and her dark money allies attacking Derek. They’ve jumped out to an almost $3 million head start on us in spending on TV. I know that you’ve been with us all along, and Derek and the rest of the team can’t thank you enough for that... But we really could use any help you can give us before the end of this month to help us meet our goals and close the gap. We need YOUR help to make sure that we end May on a high note, and catapult our campaign into June, full speed ahead. clean_body: Did you see our team’s last note? We’re quickly approaching the end of May, and we’re still shy of our monthly fundraising goal. And we can’t stress t| | | | | Friend, Did you see our team’s last note? We’re quickly approaching the end of May, and we’re still shy of our monthly fundraising goal. And we can’t stress this enough - you’ve probably seen all of the ads on television from Laura Kelly’s campaign and her dark money allies attacking Derek. They’ve jumped out to an almost $3 million head start on us in spending on TV. I know that you’ve been with us all along, and Derek and the rest of the team can’t thank you enough for that... But we really could use any help you can give us before the end of this month to help us meet our goals and close the gap. We need YOUR help to make sure that we end May on a high note, and catapult our campaign into June, full speed ahead. What do you say, friend? If I win, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend and expand our Senate majority, which is why **national Republicans have already poured $10 MILLION into on-the-ground organizing to stop me from flipping Florida blue in November.**
**Experts say my biggest barrier to winning is resources. Every dollar will matter in my race because Florida's last Senate race was decided by less than one percentage point. If I don't hit my grassroots fundraising goal tonight, I won't have the resources I need to surge ahead.**
**[Please, friend, I'm on the cusp of overcoming Rubio and on a trajectory to win in Florida, but I can't expand our Senate majority without your help. name: Sarah Palin
subject: Publicly endorse my campaign for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Alaska
body:
Join President Trump and Elise Stefanik | Our movement is growing stronger by the day. In addition to President Trump's endorsement...
Peter,

Our movement is growing stronger by the day.

In addition to President Trump's endorsement, **I recently received the endorsement of Congresswoman Elise Stefanik, Chairwoman of the House Republican Conference.** Elise is a tireless advocate for the America First agenda, and I'm honored to have her support as I work to restore President Trump's America First agenda in Alaska and across the country.

During the course of this campaign, I've earned the endorsements of many great Republican leaders: President Trump, Newt Gingrich, Nikki Haley, and now Elise Stefanik. However, there's one endorsement that I haven't received yet, and that's **YOURS, Peter.**

Your support is critical to my success in this election. Without the support of every pro-Trump, pro-America patriot, I won't win.

_**[Sign your name before midnight tonight to PUBLICLY ENDORSE my campaign for United States Congress.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60480878:6KEUjBoqN:m:1:3253819041:13E00924DCC4AFA452AEFB0CFC0F3FC5:r)**_

name: Fetterman for PA
subject: Will you officially endorse John?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Become one of John’s official endorsers.
#
Hey Derek,
**It's official: John is your Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate!**
Now that we’ve won the primary, it’s critical we build our momentum and hit the ground running towards November. The support our campaign receives leading up to the General Election will determine if we’re able to overcome the Republicans and the millions they’ll spend to keep Pennsylvania red.
**That’s why we’re putting together a list of dedicated supporters who are all-in for John.**
[**Will you add your name to our list of supporters who endorse John for U.S. Senate? Let’s show how strong Team Fetterman already is — with official endorsers from Cresco and across the country.**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-endorse-general/?source=em20220529-2&akid=6023%2E434096%2E4UqqB2)
**[Endorse John »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-endorse-general/?source=em20220529-2&akid=6023%2E434096%2E4UqqB2)**
**Derek, this is the most important Senate race of 2022.** Not only did CNN name it the most flippable seat, but it was also named the most expensive Senate race in the country — _and that was even before our primary._
Having a long list of dedicated official endorsers will show the Republicans the strength of the grassroots campaign to elect John.
**[We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important, Derek. Will you add your name to officially endorse John for U.S. Senate right now?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-endorse-general/?source=em20220529-2&akid=6023%2E434096%2E4UqqB2)**
**[Endorse John »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/jf-email-endorse-general/?source=em20220529-2&akid=6023%2E434096%2E4UqqB2)**
Together,
Fetterman for PA

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220529-6023-footer&t=1&refcode2=6023_434096_4UqqB2&akid=6023%2E434096%2E4UqqB2)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

clean_body: I’m in a RUNOFF | Friend, I didn’t want it to come down to this, but desperate times call for desperate measures. And now is the time to step up. I hate asking for your support again, because you’ve already done so much to help me and my campaign combat the media and Georgia’s RINO Right, BUT I’M IN A RUNOFF. That’s why I’m relieved to tell you that a patriotic supporter offered to help us KICK OFF THIS RUNOFF WITH ALL THE MOMENTUM. **They are offering a 500% match for ALL donations made in the next 24 hours! In my times of need, you have stepped up and encouraged me fiercely and loyally. | You have NEVER let me down before, and I know you will not let me down now. When Mike Collins is doing everything she can to take this district, take this election away from us. I hate to have to ask for your support again so soon, right after you did everything you could to help me last year, but there’s just too much on the line not to ask. This is going to be a DOG FIGHT and it’s only getting tougher from here on out. That’s why I’m so glad I have you by my side. I am humbly asking you to give anything you can, so we can make the most of this **incredible matching opportunity in the next 24 hours. The only way we’re going to save America is by pushing through these tough times, knowing that victory will mean EVERYTHING AND MORE IN NOVEMBER! Please don’t wait until it’s too late. God Bless you, Vernon Jones Representative Jones is an America- First candidate and one of the most visible and impassioned supporters of President Trump. name: Jason Lindsay, Pride Fund to End Gun Violence
subject: As we approach Memorial Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Pride Fund to End Gun Violence PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Peter,

As we approach Memorial Day, I’ve been thinking a lot about the 14 years I spent with the Army Reserves. It was an honor to serve our country, and I’ll always cherish the lessons I learned during my service, especially when I was deployed to Iraq. One of the key lessons was the constant focus on gun safety and the importance of continual training.

My time in the reserves taught me a thing or two about weapons. Most importantly it showed me the devastation that assault weapons can inflict on masses in a matter of seconds. I actually know how much destruction they can cause, how many lives they can end. I know better than the gun lobby that these weapons have no place on America’s streets.

Can you donate today to help fund our advocacy, legislative and political efforts to bring about change to our gun laws? CLICK: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pf-memorialday22?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes

The gun lobby wants to argue about small, unimportant distinctions between different categories of weapons. Let me be crystal clear, many of the assault weapons sold today in America were originally designed for military use and only have slight differences. These weapons of war were designed to do one thing and one thing only, and that is to kill human beings, and to kill as many humans as many times as the trigger of those guns can be pulled. The gun manufacturers even market these weapons as “battle tested, adaptable to any mission, and tactical.” That is not how you describe a “hunting” rifle.

The majority of Americans have arrived at a consensus: weapons that are specifically designed to fire large amounts of ammunition pose a grave danger to the public. Not only does this type of firearm serve no practical purpose among the sporting community, it is also vastly ill-equipped to be used as a means for self-defense.

The shootings in Newtown, Aurora, Columbine, Orlando, San Bernardino, and Parkland and most recently in Buffalo and Uvalde all have one thing in common: the shooter was armed with a military-style assault weapon. These weapons of devastation should not and cannot be on American streets.

Will you please donate today to help us bring changes to our elected officials and our gun laws?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pf-memorialday22?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes

In solidarity,

Jason Lindsay
Executive Director

DONATE https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pf-memorialday22?refcode=2022&amount=25&recurring=yes

To help us grow this movement, will you please forward this email to 2 friends to get them involved?

name: Adam Schiff
subject: We’re working to motivate voters and amplify our core messages
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I know with the screaming news headlines in right-wing media, and the Republican misinformation that clouds our politics every day, it can be tempting to fight fire with fire.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=291%2E5257348%2EGDwCuu)
Derek,
There's no secret formula to winning our primary election **in just 9 days.**
I know with the screaming news headlines in right-wing media, and the Republican misinformation that clouds our politics every day, it can be tempting to fight fire with fire. But there are a few key truths that our campaign is striving to share with the voters of my new district over the next 9 days:
1. We're fighting for **universal health care** because every human being has a right to receive the medical care they need without exception.
2. We're fighting for a **Green New Deal** because our climate is at a tipping point with disastrous effects already in California and across the country, and we need a national mobilization to address it.
3. We're fighting for what's **right** , for **truth** , and **for our democracy** — no matter what attacks Donald Trump and the far-right throw our way.

All that’s left to do now is communicate our core message and motivate voters to turn out and support our campaign.
**[Please chip in if you can to help my team over the final 9 days of our primary campaign, so we can go into the general with the momentum to defend our seat and our Democratic majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220529_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&refcode2=291_5257348_GDwCuu&akid=291%2E5257348%2EGDwCuu)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220529_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=10&t=5&refcode2=291_5257348_GDwCuu&akid=291%2E5257348%2EGDwCuu)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220529_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=25&t=6&refcode2=291_5257348_GDwCuu&akid=291%2E5257348%2EGDwCuu)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220529_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=50&t=7&refcode2=291_5257348_GDwCuu&akid=291%2E5257348%2EGDwCuu)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220529_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=100&t=8&refcode2=291_5257348_GDwCuu&akid=291%2E5257348%2EGDwCuu)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220529_PM1_V1_S1&email=&express_lane=true&amount=250&t=9&refcode2=291_5257348_GDwCuu&akid=291%2E5257348%2EGDwCuu)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220529_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&refcode2=291_5257348_GDwCuu&akid=291%2E5257348%2EGDwCuu)
---
With our Democratic majority, we’ve passed legislation like the _American Rescue Plan_ that has helped communities, local businesses, and families across the country get shots in arms and checks in hand.
We’ve also been able to make an historic investment in our nation’s infrastructure that provides billions of dollars to transform and repair our roads and bridges and provide much-needed funds toward improving public transportation and internet access to all corners of our communities.
This work wouldn’t be possible without the support of grassroots activists like you, Derek. I’m so grateful to have a coalition of dedicated and motivated individuals who share the same vision of a more equitable, more unified nation.
However, there’s still so much work that needs to get done to protect our democracy, strengthen voting rights, codify reproductive rights, and more.
**[If you can, pitch in $10 today to help me win my primary election and defend our Democratic majority in the general.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/may2022_abs_em?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20220529_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&refcode2=291_5257348_GDwCuu&akid=291%2E5257348%2EGDwCuu)**
Thank you for all that you do,
— Adam
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=291%2E5257348%2EGDwCuu) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=291%2E5257348%2EGDwCuu)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
---
If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=291%2E5257348%2EGDwCuu)

name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: No amount is too small.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
This race is heating up. That’s why we’re counting on you.
#

Make no mistake: Far-right super PACs are flooding millions of dollars into North Carolina’s Senate race, distorting Cheri’s record and attacking decades of public service, because they know that she has what it takes to win statewide for the third time and flip this seat.
The strength of Cheri’s historic candidacy paired with the people power behind our campaign has them scared, and they’re fighting back the only way they know how: limitless sums of dark money.
Winning this race will take all of us stepping up. That’s why we’re reaching out to you today.
[**Will you chip in $3 or anything you can to help fuel Cheri Beasley’s campaign? Our May fundraising deadline is in just two days, and we need to pick up the pace on fundraising if we’re going to reach our goal.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220529-2-ma&refcode2=965.357359.bWuYN5&t=1&akid=965%2E357359%2EbWuYN5)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220529-2-ma&refcode2=965.357359.bWuYN5&t=20&akid=965%2E357359%2EbWuYN5)**

---
****
| **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220529-2-ma&refcode2=965.357359.bWuYN5&t=23&akid=965%2E357359%2EbWuYN5)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220529-2-ma&refcode2=965.357359.bWuYN5&t=24&akid=965%2E357359%2EbWuYN5)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?express_lane=true&refcode=em220529-2-ma&refcode2=965.357359.bWuYN5&t=25&akid=965%2E357359%2EbWuYN5)**
---
****
Unlike our opponent Ted Budd — who is funding his campaign through personal wealth and corporate PAC money — Cheri’s campaign is fueled by lots and lots of small donations from supporters like you.
Whether you can contribute $5, $25 or more, it makes a difference. No amount is too small.
Every single grassroots donation adds up and helps us fight back against the attack ads that far-right groups have already launched and will continue to send Cheri’s way.
Pitch in what you can and put us one step closer to victory:
[**Please, make a contribution of any amount today before our fundraising deadline on May 31st. We cannot afford to miss this goal — our first one of the general election.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220529-2-ma&refcode2=965.357359.bWuYN5&t=26&akid=965%2E357359%2EbWuYN5)
Thank you. Your support doesn’t go unnoticed.
\- Team Beasley
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220529-2-ma&refcode2=965.357359.bWuYN5&t=27&akid=965%2E357359%2EbWuYN5)**

name: Nick Savas, Wade Herring HQ
subject: Fwd: It’s official – runoff time!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0529 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0529]
Hey Peter,
I’ll keep this brief for the holiday weekend – Wade needs to win the runoff election on Tuesday, June 21st!
The First District deserves the best candidate to go up against Buddy Carter in November, and we know that Wade is the one for the job.
Before I log off for the holiday, here’s my quick ask: can you chip in a few dollars today to fuel our TV ads & mail programs for these critical next few weeks? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0529]
Or if you want to get involved in our voter outreach programs – please reach out to Volunteer@WadeHerringForCongress.com [Volunteer@WadeHerringForCongress.com] to find out about our virtual & in-person opportunities!
Our path to the Democratic nomination on June 21st is in your hands!
In this together,
Nick Savas
Campaign Manager | Wade Herring for Congress
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Wade Herring HQ <info@wadeherringforcongress.com>
Date: Thurs, May 26, 2022 at 5:25pm
Subject: It’s official - runoff time!
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
Peter, the votes are in! We’re going to a runoff election on Tuesday, June 21st – which is only a few weeks away!
Thank you to everyone who helped us get to this point. We could not have done it without you!
Our team is using all the momentum we have but it’s going to take everything we’ve got to persuade voters to show up to the polls again so we can secure the Democratic nomination on June 21st.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0526 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0526]
Wade's post-election interviews with local news stations WTOC and WJCL.
"As a first-time candidate, I am excited to continue the fight in the runoff. We are giving the people and the families of this district a different option, rather than sending the same candidate who was unsuccessful in 2 prior election cycles. We are as motivated as ever to fight for the families of Georgia's First District.” - Wade Herring
We need to contact as many voters as possible in the little time we have before Election Day – which requires resources. Can you chip in today to set us on the right path to victory in June? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0529]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringrunoff?refcode=whem0529]
In this together,
Wade Herring HQ

name: Imani Oakley
subject: Help us win ANOTHER progressive victory!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oakley for Congress
body:
Peter —
Primary season is in full swing, and so far, we’ve seen some incredible progressive victories across the country.
And it just goes to show that with the right message, the right team, and the right race, we can win major victories for our progressive movement. We can elect candidates who aren’t bought by corporations — candidates who will fight like hell for a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and housing justice.
That’s why we need to make our last end-of-month deadline count, Peter .
We have an incredible grassroots movement. We have a strong progressive message, and we have momentum. Now, all we need is one final push to bring it home on June 7th and win another victory for progressives everywhere. Will you chip in $27 to help us do it? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?refcode=eom4]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.
Express Donate $7 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=eom4] Express Donate $27 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=eom4] Express Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=eom4] Express Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=eom4] Express Donate $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=eom4] Another Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?refcode=eom4]
People across the country are realizing what we already know — that if we play it safe and keep electing do-nothing corporate politicians like Rep. Donald Payne Jr., we won’t see any real progress.
We need change NOW, Peter, and the only way to make that happen is to ruffle some feathers, upset the status quo, and send proud, unapologetic progressives like me to Congress.
We’re two days away from our May deadline. If you’re ready to send another proud progressive to Congress this year, click here to chip in $27 before time runs out. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-io-may-2022?refcode=eom4]
Thank you for being a part of our movement.
— Imani

name: Senator Dick Durbin
subject: Nikki Budzinski needs your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki For Congress P
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45888334/347926911/292184910?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWYyZWE1ZC1hNWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lfWuWweWNQNPWn9U4uA6o904ufr1CO_HxRw8HL72rbI=)
---
Friend, it’s Senator Dick Durbin from Illinois.

I’ll be frank: Working families in our country need a champion in the House.

With the prices for food, housing, gas, and the other essentials surging across the country, we need an advocate who will fight the corporate special interest Republicans who block the bills that benefit working families.

**Nikki Budzinski is the champion that working families need.**

She’s an Illinoisan, a labor activist, and she has spent her entire life fighting for working families. [**Look, Nikki needs your support to win this extremely competitive district. I'm proud to be supporting her campaign for Congress, and I hope that you'll join me. So please, will you chip in $3 to help elect Democrat Nikki Budzinski?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45888335/347926912/161715760?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=NBFC_20220527_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWYyZWE1ZC1hNWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lfWuWweWNQNPWn9U4uA6o904ufr1CO_HxRw8HL72rbI=) | [Chip in $3 to elect Democrat Nikki Budzinski »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45888336/347926913/161715760?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=NBFC_20220527_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWYyZWE1ZC1hNWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lfWuWweWNQNPWn9U4uA6o904ufr1CO_HxRw8HL72rbI=)
---
Listen, we’re working to make sure we don’t lose the House this year.

Republicans would cut vital reproductive health care, abandon working families, and undo all of President Biden’s hard work.

**But there’s hope.** By bringing people together, staying true to our word and our values, and turning out our voters, we can keep our majority.

We must send Nikki to Congress to build on her life’s work. She’ll fight for affordable college and job training, accessible child care, and an economic recovery that doesn’t leave working families behind.

_But she can’t do it without your support._
**[Nikki’s race will be one of the most competitive races in the country. If we can flip her seat, we can protect our House majority. So will you chip in $3?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45888337/347926914/161715760?amount=3&amounts=10,25,50,100&refcode=NBFC_20220527_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWYyZWE1ZC1hNWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lfWuWweWNQNPWn9U4uA6o904ufr1CO_HxRw8HL72rbI=)**

clean_body: | = Friend, it’s Senator Dick Durbin from Illinois. I’ll be frank: Working families in our country need a champion in the House. With the prices for food, housing, gas, and the other essentials surging across the country, we need an advocate who will fight the corporate special interest Republicans who block the bills that benefit working families. Nikki Budzinski is the champion that working families need. She’s an Illinoisan, a labor activist, and she has spent her entire life fighting for working families. = | = Listen, we’re working to make sure we don’t lose the House this year. Republicans would cut vital reproductive health care, abandon working families, and undo all of President Biden’s hard work. But there’s hope. By bringing people together, staying true to our word and our values, and turning out our voters, we can keep our majority. We must send Nikki to Congress to build on her life’s work. Our May end-of-month deadline is shaping up to be our most crucial yet, and **we still haven’t reached our $70,000 goal.** If we’re going to beat Ron DeSantis in November, we need your help to change that as soon as possible — [_click here to donate now!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45888498/347927868/1828376163?amount=25&refcode=20220529_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTU5YTViMC1hOGRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YhMiWgimJoQGFavuPhn5f1zx9uRn7rwWGgsUyhS9P8g=) Here’s why it’s so important:

* **Gov. DeSantis just made a $5 MILLION ad buy** that he’ll no doubt use to spread more lies and misinformation, so we need to be ready to fight back.

* **Far-right billionaires** continue to pour money into the state at an incredible pace. They know Charlie has what it takes to win, and they’re _desperate_ to stop him.

name: Team Nikki
subject: Check out this timeline
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
2008: Republican Governor Charlie Crist appointed Justice Charles Canaday, an "anti-choice extremist" according to Planned Parenthood.
2022: Charles Canady is our Chief Justice, abortion rights are hanging by a thread, and Charlie Crist is pretending like none of this ever happened and saying he's "still pro-life."
1977-Present: Nikki Fried is pro-choice and never wavers in the fight for reproductive justice.

Our campaign does way more than just work to re-elect me, folks. Every day we’re working to help expand the Senate majority, elect strong Democratic leaders at every level of government, reach voters with up-to-date ballot and voting information, and support local communities in New Mexico. That includes helping to provide supplies to families impacted by the devastating wildfires that have ravaged our state for weeks. Strengthening our communities through winning important elections and providing on-the-ground support is a key part of my campaign. I will always put the people of New Mexico at the center of everything we do. Contributions from folks like you help support all of these crucial efforts I mentioned and more. name: Beto for Texas
subject: This is on you, Governor Abbott
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

The moment to stop the next mass shooting is right now.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220529?refcode=ema20220529-191523&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=191523_444211_0QqQbh&akid=191523%2E444211%2E0QqQbh ]Together, we will choose to protect the lives of those in our lives. If
you're ready to elect Beto O'Rourke and finally take on gun violence
across America, please consider chipping in $3 or more now.

In the seven years that Abbott has been in office, Texas has suffered six
mass shootings. Yet instead of taking action to prevent another, Abbott
has deliberately put the gun lobby ahead of the lives of our children, our
families, and our communities.

Instead of listening to the people of Texas and following the advice of
law enforcement, Abbott signed a dangerous permitless carry law that makes
it easier to carry a loaded gun in public without any background check,
training, or permit.

Instead of immediately going to Uvalde to be with the community, Abbott
went to a political fundraiser 300 miles away just hours after the
shooting. He was counting dollars while they were counting bodies.

Instead of working to stop the next slaughter right now, Abbott is
continuing to make his priority the gun lobby.

There will be more Uvaldes, El Pasos, Sutherland Springs, and Santa Fes
until we remove gun lobby politicians like Greg Abbott from office. We
have the power to change this, and we will.

Time
and time again Abbott has turned his back on Texans. [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220529?refcode=ema20220529-191523&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=191523_444211_0QqQbh&akid=191523%2E444211%2E0QqQbh ]Please, will you
donate $3 or more right now to elect new leadership in this
state?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bft-em-20220529?refcode=ema20220529-191523&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&refcode2=191523_444211_0QqQbh&akid=191523%2E444211%2E0QqQbh ]Contribute $3

These massacres aren't natural disasters, acts of God, or random.

They are totally predictable, direct consequences of the choices made by
Greg Abbott and the majority of those in the legislature.

Imagine if we had a Governor who believed in listening to the people who
elected him. Who took action to create a safer, healthier state. A
Governor who serves the people of Texas instead of special interests and
corporate donors.

Together, we can make that our reality while saving lives.

—Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1022&akid=191523%2E444211%2E0QqQbh

Hello,
When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful.
People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ **I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened.**
They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service.
**And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other.**
This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue.
**In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $250,000 before our end-of-month fundraising deadline, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – every dollar you can afford before our critical fundraising deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45888636/347929113/-42398318?refcode=em20220529pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzk4Yzg3OC1hYmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xnlbiBMRWGCrVR3hwc_fcREeFdxmXmWwSvfLNDC1wuE=)

name: Erika, Team NDRC
subject: the DeSantis Vision vs. the Holder Vision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
for America
|
---

---
There are two competing visions of America, friend – I call them the “DeSantis Vision” and the “Holder Vision.”

The “DeSantis Vision” looks more like an autocracy. A lot of folks can’t vote – especially if you’re a person of color or disabled. If your community tends to vote Democratic, your vote counts for less than the votes of Republicans. First Amendment protest is criminalized. So is abortion and even the _discussion_ of LGBTQ issues in schools.

DeSantis is trying to make some of that happen in Florida, and the entire country could be next. And even though DeSantis’s map was blocked by a court at first, it’s now back in effect. **But there’s hope – people are fighting back.** | [Help the NDRC
defeat the DeSantis Vision](https://click.everyaction.com/k/45888719/347929588/2144045629?amount=20&refcode=20220529.3r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3OThjODc4LWFiZGYtZWMxMS1iNjU2LTI4MTg3OGI4NTExMCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OAEQV3whmhbgiRMoN6byoNiEAj62dyhETYaePQWkYq0=)
---
Now let’s talk about the “Holder Vision” for America. Every eligible voter can cast a ballot and most importantly, everyone's vote counts equally because **gerrymandering is a thing of the past.** As a result, politicians are actually responsive to the people – which means we can enact the progressive policies Americans support and say they want, like access to reproductive health care, gun violence prevention, climate action, and much more.

I know it may seem like the authoritarians are winning, but **I want you to think about everything we've achieved together** , including a congressional map for the 2022 midterm elections that many experts say is more fair than we've had in a generation. With your support, I know we can keep going and make the Holder Vision for America a reality.

**Will you help us hit our end-of-month goal to make it happen?**

clean_body: for America | There are two competing visions of America, friend – I call them the “DeSantis Vision” and the “Holder Vision.” The “DeSantis Vision” looks more like an autocracy. A lot of folks can’t vote – especially if you’re a person of color or disabled. If your community tends to vote Democratic, your vote counts for less than the votes of Republicans. First Amendment protest is criminalized. So is abortion and even the discussion of LGBTQ issues in schools. DeSantis is trying to make some of that happen in Florida, and the entire country could be next. And even though DeSantis’s map was blocked by a court at first, it’s now back in effect. But there’s hope – people are fighting back. | = Now let’s talk about the “Holder Vision” for America. Every eligible voter can cast a ballot and most importantly, everyone's vote counts equally because gerrymandering is a thing of the past. As a result, politicians are actually responsive to the people – which means we can enact the progressive policies Americans support and say they want, like access to reproductive health care, gun violence prevention, climate action, and much more. I know it may seem like the authoritarians are winning, but I want you to think about everything we've achieved together , including a congressional map for the 2022 midterm elections that many experts say is more fair than we've had in a generation. With your support, I know we can keep going and make the Holder Vision for America a reality. Will you help us hit our end-of-month goal to make it happen? President Barack Obama is calling on grassroots Democrats to take action to save reproductive freedom!
| | |

**Peter: President Barack Obama is calling on grassroots Democrats to take action to save reproductive freedom!**
He knows that it's never been more important to defend our Senate majority and elect pro-choice Democrats like Abby Finkenauer – who would become the youngest woman senator EVER!
**[So please, before Abby's urgent end-of-month deadline, will you stand with President Obama by rushing $5 to defeat anti-abortion villain Sen. Chuck Grassley and flip this seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45889010/347931888/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1095-fr-nd-r&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjU5NjQyZS1hY2RmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e1z2qEEjWlEPbEZz101_UKU25hkhcQBpDskQRN3QRyo=)**

This is critical, Peter. After a draft decision from the Supreme Court revealed that _Roe v. Wade_ is likely to be overturned, President Obama put out an urgent call to grassroots Democrats like you.**He's asking you to do everything you can to elect leaders who will fight back against this dangerous agenda – leaders like Abby!**
Abby is a fierce advocate for reproductive rights. She proudly fought for abortion access in the Iowa Statehouse and in Congress – and as senator she would be our 50th vote to end the filibuster so that we can finally codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law.
Meanwhile, her opponent Sen. Grassley is one of the biggest anti-choice villains out there. During his 47 years in Washington, **he's done everything he can to destroy our reproductive freedoms –****and he holds direct responsibility for the out-of-touch, ultraconservative majority now making decisions about these freedoms from the comfort of the Supreme Court.**
Iowans have had it with his right-wing agenda – 64% of likely voters here said that they don't want to reelect him! **But the GOP has a war chest of $45 MILLION to defend vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley and defeat challengers like Abby!** She needs strong grassroots support to compete with their far-right megadonors.
**Abby cannot afford to miss a single fundraising goal, but right now, she's still short of her urgent end-of-month goal![Please, will you answer President Obama's call by rushing a $5 donation NOW to support Abby?
