name: Marshall for Congress
subject: Sign on: legalize marijuana
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/Derek%20Marshall%20Logo%20-%20Standard%20Stacked%20Lockup%20JTree%20MAIN%20COLOR.png]
Tell Congress: BAN assault weapons [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-ban-assault-rifles?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220527_01%26noskip%3Dtrue]
We must not accept an America where, week-in and week-out, we are heartbroken by yet another mass shooting.
We need more than thoughts and prayers. We need more than platitudes. We need Congress to act and get weapons of war, designed to kill with speed and efficiency, off our streets.
A Pew poll finds that 63% of Americans support banning assault weapons - a wide majority.
Tell Congress: Ban assault weapons now! [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-ban-assault-rifles?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220527_01%26noskip%3Dtrue]
Uvalde. Sandy Hook. Parkland. San Bernardino. Las Vegas. The Pulse nightclub.
Every single one of those massacres was committed with an assault rifle.
Enough is enough.
How many more men, women, and children must be murdered before Congress takes on the NRA?
Tell Congress: Ban assault weapons now! [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/tell-congress-ban-assault-rifles?source=direct_link&referrer=group-derek-marshall-for-congress&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fpl_derekmarshall%3Famount%3D10%26refcode%3Dpl_20220527_01%26noskip%3Dtrue]
Thanks for fighting back.
– Marshall for Congress
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pl_derekmarshall?amount=10&refcode=pl_footer]

P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416 [tel:(760) 486-2416]

_But the Left is furious that I _rightly_ invoked the attorney-client and executive privilege that I have with President Trump._

Of course, the Left doesn't care about attorney-client privilege. Frankly, they don't have much regard for the rule of law.
---

_With the battle for my freedom and justice ongoing, I recorded a video for you to talk about the injustice I'm facing for successfully defending President Trump as his lawyer._

Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher and I am the volunteer coordinator for Will Rollins Congressional Campaign!

I am pleased to meet you, and excited to help channel your enthusiasm for electing an awesome progressive, LGBTQ+ candidates like Will! Between now and election day, volunteers are getting together for phone banks and canvasses to turn out Democratic voters for Will. **[If you can, please sign up to volunteer here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45889096/347939743/1340111964?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGZhMWRhYS1hZmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ysO0eOcKbmktYp3HaReFKCsbkZVS_s9AKXzubwI-64=&emci=3c58bbdf-17de-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8dfa1daa-afdf-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=12636851)**

I also have some big news to share: We've just opened a new campaign office in Palm Springs on 342 N. Palm Canyon Drive.

This will be home base for Palm Springs volunteers to come by and get out the vote for Will. We will be hosting our grand opening on Thursday, June 2nd. **[We hope you can attend.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45889097/347939744/1787732567?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZGZhMWRhYS1hZmRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2ysO0eOcKbmktYp3HaReFKCsbkZVS_s9AKXzubwI-64=&emci=3c58bbdf-17de-ec11-b656-281878b85110&emdi=8dfa1daa-afdf-ec11-b656-281878b85110&ceid=12636851)**

Please let me know if you have any questions and I will be happy to help you out.

Thank you so much for your support for Will, and respond to this email directly if you have any questions --I will be happy to help you out!

Let's do this,

Christopher Sandino
Volunteer Coordinator

I am pleased to meet you, and excited to help channel your enthusiasm for electing an awesome progressive, LGBTQ+ candidates like Will! Between now and election day, volunteers are getting together for phone banks and canvasses to turn out Democratic voters for Will. I also have some big news to share: We've just opened a new campaign office in Palm Springs on 342 N. Palm Canyon Drive. This will be home base for Palm Springs volunteers to come by and get out the vote for Will. We will be hosting our grand opening on Thursday, June 2nd. Please let me know if you have any questions and I will be happy to help you out. body:
Why Patty Murray isn’t invited...
#
Did you see this, Peter?
There’s a clip going around on Twitter of the head of the National Republican Senatorial Committee, Senator Rick Scott, saying he once asked big GOP donors if any of them have invited Patty Murray to dinner–and was shocked when they said no.
Honestly, we’re shocked that he was surprised by that! Because if there’s one thing Patty does not spend her time doing it’s catering to wealthy Republican donors who are propping up the MAGA Republican agenda.
**[ Let’s send a message to big GOP donors that this grassroots team has Patty’s back. Will you chip in $5 right now toward our $50,000 end-of-month goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45889145/347945229/-379223437?refcode=pm_em_220529_2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzkzMTJjMy1iMWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNWvTQnqOfJui2ffq-QvMuc7HKxFCh8h26ajaqOE0Es=)**
Patty is and always has been laser-focused on delivering for the people of Washington state. She takes the stories she hears at the grocery store, the ferry terminal, and in meetings with advocates and local leaders back to the other Washington to fight for solutions that will help our families and communities.
**[We need to do everything we can to make sure she can keep fighting for the people of Washington state. Please, contribute now to make sure we meet our end-of-month goal and send Patty back to the U.S. Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45889146/347945230/-379223437?refcode=pm_em_220529_2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzkzMTJjMy1iMWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KNWvTQnqOfJui2ffq-QvMuc7HKxFCh8h26ajaqOE0Es=)**
Thanks,

Team Patty

We’re working around the clock to ensure Alaskans in every corner of the state hear Chris’ message. And here’s the deal:

**Less experienced candidates with loud, angry voices and big-money backers believe they’re _entitled_ to go to Congress.**

I can't afford to cut back on resources
| |

I'm sorry to crowd your inbox, friend, but I wouldn't bump my last message if it weren't critical to defeating Marco Rubio.
My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of Tuesday's End of Month fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short.
While national Republicans are funneling _upward of $10 million _into this race _ _ to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. **I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly:**
[**Please, rush $5, $25 or whatever you can spare to close my fundraising gap. Every dollar will help this people-powered team defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/45889149/347945888/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3317-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTkzMTJjMy1iMWRmLWVjMTEtYjY1Ni0yODE4NzhiODUxMTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XymCN9rYJo1wpIr5GxTlk3OpD_gxXvArhy3rzXsUxLg=)

**If I don't have the resources to narrow this polling gap, we could hand Senate control straight back to Mitch McConnell.**

clean_body: I can't afford to cut back on resources | | I'm sorry to crowd your inbox, friend, but I wouldn't bump my last message if it weren't critical to defeating Marco Rubio. My finance team tells me that even after a small surge in grassroots donations to my campaign over the last few hours, I'm still short of Tuesday's End of Month fundraising goal – and at this pace, I may need to make budget cuts if I fall short. While national Republicans are funneling upward of $10 million into this race to flip Florida red permanently, I simply cannot afford to cut back on resources. I'm running out of time to fix this, so I'm humbly asking you to act quickly: = | | = Thank you, thank you, thank you. Val Demings \------- Forwarded message ------- From: Rep. Val Demings Subject: Friend, PLEASE | | | = | | | | DAYS | | HRS | | | MINS | | SECS Friend, I am hours away from my midnight deadline, and I'm still short of my can't-miss goal. My race in Florida is most likely to determine Senate control, so I cannot fall behind on resources. Please, take a look at your supporter record: | | SUPPORTER RECORD EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com DONOR STATUS: PENDING SUGGESTED CONTRIBUTION: $5 DEADLINE: 11:59 p.m. | = The timing – and the sheer consequences – of falling short right now couldn't be more serious. I don't say that lightly. Polling has me down a few points behind Marco Rubio, just as he and the GOP hauled in more than $51 million to dismantle our Senate majority. If I don't have the resources to narrow this polling gap, we could hand Senate control straight back to Mitch McConnell. With a grassroots team this strong, I know that if we dig deep, we will flip Florida blue. Point-blank, friend: That means hitting my fundraising goal. It's truly the only path we have to fighting back against GOP megadonors. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Val Demings | | | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. body:
DeSantis has got to go
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/8842?t=6&akid=1124%2E564421%2ERmYJzt) Friend --

For those who don't know me, my name is Nikki Fried, and I'm running for Governor of Florida.

For decades, we've been making progress on abortion rights, working to expand access to reproductive care, provide women with safe abortions, and secure reproductive freedom for more women than ever before.

But this year, all of that could change.

With the Supreme Court's decision to overturn Roe v. Wade, women in Florida are going to see some of the strictest, most punitive attacks on our reproductive freedom in recent memory. And you know who will be leading the charge?

**That 's right -- _Ron DeSantis._**

**We need to act NOW to end DeSantis ' reign in Florida, take back women's reproductive rights, and make sure that every woman has the freedom to make her own choices.**

[ ****If you agree, click here to split a contribution between me and Ron Be Gone and help us fight back against DeSantis ' anti-woman agenda. »****](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/8844?t=8&akid=1124%2E564421%2ERmYJzt) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Nikki Fried and Ron Be Gone immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/8850?t=14&akid=1124%2E564421%2ERmYJzt)

Thanks!

\-- Nikki Fried

(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

MAGA Republican Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst Governor in America and an utter nightmare for Floridians. He is relentless in his praise for Donald Trump, he completely botched Florida's pandemic response and put lives at risk, and he gave scarce COVID vaccines to his major campaign donors instead of the most vulnerable Floridians. He MUST be defeated in the next election. We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution to beat Ron DeSantis by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/118?t=1&akid=1124%2E564421%2ERmYJzt). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/119?t=2&akid=1124%2E564421%2ERmYJzt).**

subject: Thank you from Darin Harbick
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Harbick for U
body:
Darin Harbick 5/29/22 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/55dff28ac141/thank-you-from-darinharbick?e=97f786938b)
---
| |
---
| |
**Thank you everyone for your support!**

I, and the Harbick For Oregon Team, want to say a **BIG thank you** for your support, friendship, and contributions of time and treasure.
Specifically, thank you for the money donated to this campaign, the 2,500 plus yard signs displayed in yards across the entire state, and your “likes and shares” to establish the best social media presence.

While this race did not end with the opportunity to challenge Senator Wyden in November. I am proud of the work accomplished from our team. It couldn’t have happened without **your support**.

I have called Jo Rae Perkins to congratulate her. She will carry the GOP banner into the fall and our team will cheer her on to victory.

Please **stay engaged and involved**. 2022 can be a tremendous year for us to turn Oregon and our nation around.

Darin Harbick Paid for and authorized by Harbick for U.S. Senate PO Box 2122 McKenzie Bridge, Oregon 97413 [info@harbickforussenate.com](mailto:info@harbickforussenate.com) [https://harbickforussenate.com/](https://harbickforussenate.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3dd8e7fd3b4e92c0bcc1988f&id=9750cfb2f2&e=97f786938b)

| Team, every time the efforts to overturn the 2020 election are brought up, there is usually a member of the AZ GOP mentioned as being involved.

So when news broke that far-right activist Ginni Thomas (yes, wife of Justice Thomas) was actively involved in encouraging AZ GOP legislators to ignore the will of the voters and vote to overturn the results of the 2020 election, that wasn’t surprising. **Ginni has been an architect of January 6 events and Arizona is full of Republicans who promote Trump’s lies.** _But then we saw this graphic:_

| [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbywQ62J9Rt8rW-o73drhkAGdSA8cTIIIAch_J5eYsXQxpHpwdGqgWySbyzUFvJELtvKYwHDDxnMmkFBQsj7q1k_W6G1H6MaGcKj4RnbGdtC1BjllnGJG3vF23KaQPon6yL4fDieq-PfubDsBhRwV2IHazqyD6LRt7N_IpjL8TwdT7hu-hpEXuV60MwvGfSUJ8a0El97B9SVOOe460a5GWGYRyyYmY2u4IJHLOfkFx2oA1YrZjJykPApbpKj_Du0TdaQ5FNA105-1uWv_9TGgkHOtpa4KyLiIqwv6Zce2Mh-Xy_sVpHyBBDQd9J-wQb3xul5BdjZ5Oo48zyk5p6nr-lTy6MyAyoCC6au21dIv78nPLHaDACrPeGJ8qb3qxu8nf_0GXD83T9peVElGw1mXgAoJ6crCy5Gt3MsOtDdYe_w/3mg/0gWZRajjRrWza9ZQgkI_jg/h1/1-8Pm79wjnN3VTEJLrIXR4gOi4FS212Wet3uZvzeFpo) [](?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-81-percent-of-az-gop-legislators-involved-in-the-big-lie&email_referrer=email_1559305&email_subject=this-number-is-stark)
**[Team, 81 percent of Republican legislators were involved in trying to end our democracy. This is not something Arizona should lead the nation in. Can you donate $10 right now so we can remove as many of these Trump loyalists from our state legislature as possible?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbywQ62J9Rt8rW-o73drhkAGdSA8cTIIIAch_J5eYsXQxpHpwdGqgWySbyzUFvJELtvKYwHDDxnMmkFBQsj7q1tgeEJexixsthD5mF07-GAjb0zqd9RSeALN6RiTk1r4T06t-lO5tAuwpV7OQMtQpb-fgvrppnkvvc2188P6_GXZzWTaPE5wzuYfDCqMj9q70YVGCHZQ-HgOsZ7v7YJNEslIqPDZWhUcHgXahryYXkNz5PImeRVql9cVaO60ZfdrecM1ZS5Rf1mpvRkb79Y9K2WvO0RnonZAphZIGDyVFRjwt6IuXzFG_W4-D7xigmgYLu0Ho268BsUVKX-KQ0-9TXyGRzlci9o9mxRI_LKQ8c537ZcLWzSMd5lYIu8hwi_6kESoQtV1UdzdaGaRHjZ4kTyfOYE0SF8K8AnkqUegq86Q/3mg/0gWZRajjRrWza9ZQgkI_jg/h2/3iN0HfZtZsK5dondMCQ5rWYPuMLcoCd78vttRoZ3MSg)** [
DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbywQ62J9Rt8rW-o73drhkAGdSA8cTIIIAch_J5eYsXQxpHpwdGqgWySbyzUFvJELtvKYwHDDxnMmkFBQsj7q1gLY9qFE08zjKznbKRce_6-iMdiF1ljvS3GO_kZcYYf2TmxzHqlgkXvW7PxIPeV1PceZVfaj-oz9FUIDyv9O6cU5V9t97Oe9uSZJ8PwaXRnRvQsURGxO96LcFGY3-ua6KgofhT04Dw8HbS4mQXPd3Ka1LoB2qV4NSbXd1XMdeClcdkIyxsq5sSrA-lIaGGrN_RtHQLoMQNS207gif4L0zza0hAkklO2z_vIromhQpjw72yz76J7M3A63QwKP7Mc9mehT-i8L-YmojItJ-sZvvhdzFmkPtgjlZRWRzMhFFjPgZ_XXy15wptPXYDiNRFeroeulNbGny0ui5ntSaWFfk0A/3mg/0gWZRajjRrWza9ZQgkI_jg/h3/cMw_obI_C1gxeH5DBjCOKlwhV5wmIwU2pFQf8bBlmjI)
We’ve said it before, but this re-affirms it. With 81 percent of the AZ GOP already involved in trying to overthrow our elections, they will absolutely do it again for Trump in 2024. It’s why Trump picked Arizona as his first rally, because he knows these Republicans will do anything for him.

This makes our status as a toss-up territory even more important. We have to defeat as many of these Republicans as possible this November – up and down the ballot.

Our country – and democracy – is too important to let Republicans have another chance at ruining it.

clean_body: | | | Help us get rid of them | | | Team, every time the efforts to overturn the 2020 election are brought up, there is usually a member of the AZ GOP mentioned as being involved. So when news broke that far-right activist Ginni Thomas (yes, wife of Justice Thomas) was actively involved in encouraging AZ GOP legislators to ignore the will of the voters and vote to overturn the results of the 2020 election, that wasn’t surprising. Ginni has been an architect of January 6 events and Arizona is full of Republicans who promote Trump’s lies. But then we saw this graphic: | ?linkid=2&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-81-percent-of-az-gop-legislators-involved-in-the-big-lie&emailreferrer=email1559305&emailsubject=this-number-is-stark We’ve said it before, but this re-affirms it. With 81 percent of the AZ GOP already involved in trying to overthrow our elections, they will absolutely do it again for Trump in 2024. It’s why Trump picked Arizona as his first rally, because he knows these Republicans will do anything for him. This makes our status as a toss-up territory even more important. We have to defeat as many of these Republicans as possible this November – up and down the ballot. Our country – and democracy – is too important to let Republicans have another chance at ruining it. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Enough is enough, AZ Dems For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: =?utf-8?Q?Greg=20Lopez?=
subject: FREE MONEY FROM THE GOVERNMENT!!
body:
Pro Tip: It's never free (or from the government)

http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=55cf1111ed-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_28_04_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-55cf1111ed-584862049

** Where does the money come from?
------------------------------------------------------------

** It's your money from our TABOR!
------------------------------------------------------------

** Colorado needs a governor who will not play games with your money.
------------------------------------------------------------

Our present governor recently signed Senate Bill 22-233 (https://leg.colorado.gov/bills/sb22-233?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=55cf1111ed-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_28_04_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-55cf1111ed-584862049) that will expediate Taxpayer’s Bill of Rights, TABOR, refunds from spring, 2023, to early fall, 2022. All refunds with his signature are slated to be dropped in the mail around September 30^th. This just happens to be right before mail in ballots drop on October 17^th for the November 2022, election. Coincidence? You be the judge. Another note on this bill, this TABOR refund mechanism is for this year only.

We do not need deceptive leadership. We need a governor with integrity and one who will govern with honesty. I am that person. I will work hard to put more money in the pockets of all Coloradans by reducing taxes, fees, rules and regulations that have become a financial burden for families and businesses. The cost of living is escalating to the point where people are reluctantly moving out of the state. Government in Colorado is growing out of control and the expenses to feed this beast must be scaled back. I will govern for the people and not for the government, and I will always put people over politics.

Sincerely,
Greg Lopez

Donate today! Together we can win this battle!!

https://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=55cf1111ed-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_28_04_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-55cf1111ed-584862049
Find Out More (https://www.lopez2022.com/?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=55cf1111ed-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_28_04_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-55cf1111ed-584862049)

============================================================
** (http://www.lopez2022.com?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=55cf1111ed-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_28_04_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-55cf1111ed-584862049)
We are Coloradans who want to freely and responsibly live our best lives. We refuse to be told by so-called experts and politicians how we must live. Together, we can flip the power back to the people by electing a new governor that’s one of us, for all of us. Vote for Greg Lopez, a proven servant leader who puts people over politics to make Colorado the State of Systemic Opportunity for all.
** Make A Donation (http://www.lopez2022.com/donate?utm_source=Greg+Lopez+For+Governor&utm_campaign=55cf1111ed-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_05_28_04_28&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_9fbc254cd8-55cf1111ed-584862049)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Baugh=20Finance=20Team?=
subject: Respectfully, this can’t wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=fb99cc21a5&e=8a657725d1)
---
| | Peter,

Our campaign’s last major financial deadline before Election Day is on Tuesday, and with Monday being Memorial Day, we are not planning to solicit any donations that day out of respect for our fallen heroes.

That’s putting pressure on us this weekend to make up the budget deficit we are facing before this major deadline. Do you think you can come through for us?
---
| [DONATE $50](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=aca9904138&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE $50")
---
| [DONATE $25](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=70accb1308&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE $25")
---
| [DONATE $10](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=cb899c3df1&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE $10")
---
| [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=4248757b87&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT")
---
| We’ll give it to you straight –[ we are currently up against a $8,305 budget shortfall](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=cfa6b44f2e&e=8a657725d1) with just a few days left to make up the deficit. We’re pouring every spare dollar we have into voter outreach before Election Day, but this simply won’t be feasible if we can’t even meet our basic budget needs.

We are terrified that we might let Scott down this close to Election Day. It wouldn’t just be Scott that we’d be letting down, though. The entire Republican Party is counting on us to flip California’s 47th Congressional District from blue to red. It is one of the most important districts in the entire country to national efforts to take back the House of Representatives.

So, please, before this final deadline before election day – will you please come through to help us fire Katie Porter and take back the House?
---
| [FUND LAST MINUTE GET OUT THE VOTE EFFORTS](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=cb9acbfeae&e=8a657725d1 "FUND LAST MINUTE GET OUT THE VOTE EFFORTS")
---
| Your support in this urgent moment of need will not be forgotten!

Thank you,

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, Our campaign’s last major financial deadline before Election Day is on Tuesday, and with Monday being Memorial Day, we are not planning to solicit any donations that day out of respect for our fallen heroes. That’s putting pressure on us this weekend to make up the budget deficit we are facing before this major deadline. Do you think you can come through for us? | "DONATE $50" | "DONATE $25" | "DONATE $10" | "DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT" | We’ll give it to you straight – with just a few days left to make up the deficit. We’re pouring every spare dollar we have into voter outreach before Election Day, but this simply won’t be feasible if we can’t even meet our basic budget needs. We are terrified that we might let Scott down this close to Election Day. It wouldn’t just be Scott that we’d be letting down, though. The entire Republican Party is counting on us to flip California’s 47th Congressional District from blue to red. It is one of the most important districts in the entire country to national efforts to take back the House of Representatives. So, please, before this final deadline before election day – will you please come through to help us fire Katie Porter and take back the House? | "FUND LAST MINUTE GET OUT THE VOTE EFFORTS" | Your support in this urgent moment of need will not be forgotten! Thank you, Baugh Finance Team | | "Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress. FEC ID# C00798322" | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2022 Scott Baugh for Congress, All rights reserved.

| | Friend, With the primary election just over one week away, I wanted to reach out personally. Now, I want to defeat far-left Democrat Andy Kim and bring my common sense work ethic to Washington. But I can’t do that without winning this primary, and hitting our May end-of-month goal will be CRUCIAL.

clean_body: If we can hit this critical goal, we’ll have an edge in the primary| | | | | Friend, With the primary election just over one week away, I wanted to reach out personally. My primary opponent – a former Bernie Sanders supporter – is working hard, and I’m counting on supporters like you to help our campaign stay ahead. The BEST way for us to keep the momentum by the primary is hitting our FINAL end of month goal, and the deadline is TOMORROW NIGHT. | | | | Friend, I’ve spent my life creating THOUSANDS of jobs and giving back to less fortunate people here in New Jersey and across the world. Now, I want to defeat far-left Democrat Andy Kim and bring my common sense work ethic to Washington. But I can’t do that without winning this primary, and hitting our May end-of-month goal will be CRUCIAL. | | | | | | | | I’m doing everything I can to take back NJ-03 and bring our district the leadership it deserves. | | | | Thanks, friend, Bob Healey | | | | | | Paid for by Bob Healey for Congress | | P.O. Box 999, Edison NJ, 08818 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

I am working hard on legislation that would help protect our families from gun violence, incentivize the use of clean energy to reduce our carbon input, and lower taxes for the middle class. To continue the momentum in Congress for progress on these priorities for our home, I need your help.

There is still more to accomplish, and I look forward to continuing my fight for you in Congress.

name: Rick Scott
subject: Joe Biden called rising prices “an incredible transition”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, I can’t believe it.

**Joe Biden said that rising gas prices were an “incredible transition” for America.**

_An incredible transition?_

Families are struggling to pay at the pump. People are having to make sacrifices. **Americans are hurting, and there’s nothing incredible about that.**

Every day, Joe Biden shocks me more and more with just how out of touch he is.

**If he and his party are celebrating your pain, they can’t be trusted to lead our country.**

Right now, we have the chance to take back America from these elitists - but I need your help.

**Our end-of-month deadline is just two days away, and I need every patriot’s support in our fight to take back the Senate. **

I know things are hard in Joe Biden’s America, but even just a $5 donation now can help make a difference in our future.

[**Can you pitch in just $10 today to help us meet our end-of-month goal and take back the Senate from Joe Biden’s cronies?**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=df50dd88ad284d8a90e7aa7eff268433&_e=cfJt-Cr6OnBAh25ky77CZ1qreIO3vBjBMoPONqsEbx4hkWOT86a_dxw-Uixsp6Wp13cdzUBFWe9GmgMft5pG3P43bifEx3Xdbji1d9mJF4_rkQjDbMdzLyQiqSpXFK28S2aM-iur1T5cyHwePMT9WGuDCz7SZfx2sLV7I69L2_9bXLRhQPHt14eMdQPxvUHDMLyZptVEY5xLGW2yxpvM6nD346nyLS9RylHzogNFQVUYVV1k1IJepbWVBpzzf8V1aazCyt76UkxyyuItT8KrXxb51x5zD8PO_bG2hO__QCVTWZikHNf9SRDMbc-ROBnWfni5t1HPNvKPspQCUC3mvZV7YGzK8sPEHUth6whLuqnI8eh7xQgsJKnlqtyQK_jfHd8uIToaJ_J10h982-blWRff-cCxFiQzAqG1gNurCbEdnyajRKHz8q_5Xzeys2k7)

clean_body: We have to stay in the lead | Friend, I hate to say it,but this race is close. We have less than 6 months until the General Election, and time is running out. Cheri Beasley is rallying her Radical Socialist friends to try to pull an upset - and it MIGHT work. The North Carolina Senate Election is super close, and we have the chance to start an America First wave across the state. I’m the America First, Trump-endorsed candidate in this race – President Trump trusts me to protect his legacy in NC. But it starts with winning this race. Your support could make the difference between victory and defeat. | | ---|--- | | | We can win this. Let’s do everything we can to make sure of it. In Liberty, Ted Budd | Ted Budd is a father, small business owner, and conservative leader running for Senate in North Carolina. He is the ONLY candidate who is endorsed by President Trump and the only candidate who will fight for the America First Agenda in Washington. To support our campaign, please click below to make a donation. | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Ted Budd for Senate Copyright © 2021 Ted Budd for Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
How we’ll defeat Greg Abbott:
#
Greg Abbott has spent the last seven years hurting the people of Texas. >From his deadly power grid failure and his foster care crisis, to his attacks on teachers, transgender kids, and a woman’s freedom to control her own body — he has refused to put Texans first.
It's clear, now more than ever, that in order to help all the people that Abbott is hurting, we need to win this election.
[**Will you join Beto on Thursday at 7 PM CDT for an emergency organizing call?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56085?utm_source=ema20220529-191530&t=1&akid=191530%2E444211%2EQLm95Y) **We can only win this election if everyone steps up and joins us right now.**

When: Thursday, June 2 | 7 – 7:30 PM CDT
Where: Virtual Event (Join from anywhere)
**[SIGN UP »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56085?utm_source=ema20220529-191530&t=3&akid=191530%2E444211%2EQLm95Y)**
In order to defeat Greg Abbott in November and put an end to his administration’s extremism, we need to build the biggest organizing operation that Texas has ever seen. We need you to join us.
Thank you for your support,
Team Beto
